title: Legal Assistant/Paralegal
description:
LEGAL ASSISTANT – FULL TIME

Small Law Firm | Criminal & Civil Litigation



Description:

We are a small, dedicated law firm specializing in Criminal Defense and Civil Litigation. Our team is collaborative and committed to delivering exceptional legal services to our clients. We are seeking a motivated, highly organized Full-Time Legal Assistant to support our Attorney and Paralegal in the day-to-day operations of a busy litigation practice. This position operates during standard business hours, Eastern Time. The ideal candidate is a self-starter who communicates clearly, manages time effectively, and thrives in a fast-paced legal environment. We are looking for someone who is trustworthy, detail-oriented, honest, and eager to learn. This is a career opportunity with room to grow in a supportive, professional environment.



Responsibilities:

Manage and organize attorney and firm
 correspondence

Maintain case files and document management systems

Answer and route client and court calls professionally and with discretion

Schedule and coordinate meetings, court appearances, hearings, and deadlines

Conform, format, and proofread legal documents to court and firm standards

Draft routine correspondence under attorney supervision

Track deadlines, docket entries, and follow-up items across active matters





Qualifications:

Knowledge of legal terminology is required

Exceptional English reading, writing, and verbal communication skills

Strong organizational skills and meticulous attention to detail

Ability to handle confidential information with discretion and integrity

Proficiency with Microsoft Office, Clio, and computing generally. 

Prior experience in a legal or professional office setting preferred; litigation experience a plus



Application: 

Please submit a resume, cover letter and short writing sample.

Jatan B2B Solutions is a Spokane-based wholesale leader launching a massive national expansion. We are looking for an elite "Hunter" who is tired of low-cap appointment setting and wants a role with uncapped earning potential.

You will lead the national rollout of our #1 best-selling performance products (Lucky Guy Original) and viral exotic snacks to US retailers. We provide the leads; you close the doors.

Requirements:

Expert proficiency in Monday.com and QuickBooks.



Shift: US Pacific Time (Spokane, WA).

description:

s, LinkedIn.

title: High-Performance Real Estate Cold Caller (SDR)
description:
Base Pay + Performance Commission (Wholesale Platform Experience a Plus!)



The Role:

I am a Real Estate Business Owner building a national acquisition team. I am looking for a highly motivated, thick-skinned, and persuasive Cold Callers to join my team. Your mission is simple: Call homeowners, gauge their motivation to sell, and book qualified discovery calls for me to close.



What You’ll Be Doing:



Making 100–150+ outbound dials per day using RESimpli.



Targeting specific lists: Pre-Foreclosures, Absentee Owners, and High-Equity leads.



Using a "Pillars of Motivation" framework to qualify sellers (Condition, Timeline, Motivation, Price).



Overcoming objections like "How did you get my number?" and "I’m not interested" with professional persistence.



Accurately logging every call and setting follow-up tasks in the CRM.



What’s In It For You?



Base Pay: $5.00 – $7.00 per hour.



Qualified Lead Bonus: $20 for every lead that completes a call with me.



Growth: I am scaling a national team. Top performers will move into Lead Manager or Team Lead roles.



Requirements:



Perfect English: You must have high-level English fluency with a clear, professional, and empathetic tone.



Experience: Minimum 1 year of Real Estate Cold Calling (Wholesaling or Listing leads).



Tech Savvy: Familiarity with RESimpli, Mojo, or BatchDialer is a huge advantage.



Work Ethic: You don't take "No" personally and you stay consistent with your dials.



How To Apply (Read Carefully):

To be considered, you MUST do the following:



Start your application with the word "REALTY" so I know you read this.



Attach or link a 30–60 second Voice Recording of yourself introducing yourself and explaining why you’re a great closer. (Applications without audio will be ignored).



Briefly mention which Real Estate CRMs or Dialers you have used in the past.

title: $3,000+/Month Part-Time — Only 2 Spots Left
description:
We are hiring part-time remote Customer Success Managers. Only looking for candidates based in the Philippines with an active LinkedIn profile.



We are only accepting 2 more people into this round so apply fast.



Compensation:



$50 per month base salary paid via Wise on the 1st of every month. $150 commission per closed deal. No cap. Top performers are already earning $500 to $3,000+ per month. After 30 days you receive a free LinkedIn Sales Navigator upgrade worth $99 per month.



Referral bonus: Once you are onboarded you get a personal referral link. Every person you refer who joins earns you 10% of their monthly pay as a recurring bonus. Refer 10 people and that is an extra $50+ per month on top of everything else.



What the role involves:



You will represent our company on LinkedIn as part of our remote sales team. During onboarding we set up your profile and connect our internal tools. Our senior team manages all outreach and strategy. You monitor inbound messages from prospects and flag warm leads. Flexible schedule. No fixed hours. No micromanagement.



Requirements:



LinkedIn account with 500 or more connections and a profile photo. Strong English communication skills. Wise account or willingness to create one. Google Chrome on a laptop or PC.



No prior sales experience needed. We provide full training and onboarding support.



This is filling up fast. Apply now before spots close.

title: Performance Creatives Video Editor Role + Paid Trial Task
description:
We're zocialGen, a creative agency that specialises in performance ads for Meta and TikTok. 



We're looking for a video editor who can produce high-performing ad creatives - including Pixar/Dreamworks-style 3D animated ads using AI tools.



You've probably seen these viral animated ads on TikTok and Reels - 3D Pixar-style characters, cinematic lighting, short-form vertical video. We produce these at scale for our DTC clients and need someone who already knows how to make them or can pick it up fast.

This role involves:



Creating Pixar/Dreamworks-style 3D animated short-form ads using AI generation tools

Writing prompts for AI image generators and AI video animation tools

Editing and stitching animated clips into polished 9:16 and 4:5 ad creatives

Adding voiceover, captions, and post-production polish in CapCut, Premiere, or DaVinci

Working from scripts and reference videos to produce scene-by-scene animated content

Traditional video editing work beyond AI animation (UGC cuts, static ads, etc.)



What we're looking for:



Experience with AI image generation tools (we want to hear which ones you use)

Experience with AI video/animation tools (same — tell us your go-to tools)

Strong eye for cinematic composition, lighting, and Pixar-style aesthetics

Ability to prompt effectively — you understand that the prompt is the craft

Post-production skills: stitching scenes, syncing voiceover, adding captions

Fast turnaround and clear communication



Bonus: experience creating ads or content for DTC/ecommerce brands



This is a part-time / project-based role. We'll start with a trial task to see how you work.



To apply: Please fill out the Google Form linked below. The form includes a short trial task so we can see your work in action.







Do NOT apply through OnlineJobs.ph messaging. 



Applications are only accepted through the Google Form.

title: Civil Engineer
description:
JOB ADVERTISEMENT – CIVIL ENGINEER (REMOTE)



FingerHug, a company based in Bosnia and Herzegovina specializing in architectural design, technical development, construction planning, and project support, is expanding its team and is looking for an experienced Civil Engineer for a remote position.



We are looking for a highly skilled, responsible, and self-driven professional with strong practical and technical knowledge of construction, especially from an execution and contractor’s perspective. The ideal candidate should be able to contribute to the technical planning, assessment, and development of projects with a clear understanding of structures, quantities, materials, and real construction requirements.



Requirements and qualifications:

• minimum 10 years of experience in the same or similar roles 

• strong professional background in civil engineering and construction execution 

• solid knowledge of structural systems, construction methods, and building materials

title: B2B Outbound Sales Representative (SDR/BDR)
description:
We're hiring a full-time B2B outbound sales rep to reach out to potential clients and book meetings for our team. This is a high-activity outbound role — you'll be on the phone and sending
s every day.

We provide everything you need: prospect lists with contact info, outreach tools,
 platforms, a dialer, and the strategies to follow. Your job is to take each prospect, do additional research to understand their business, then reach out across multiple channels to start conversations and get meetings booked.

What you'll be doing:



Making a high volume of cold calls to B2B prospects daily

Sending personalized outreach
s and follow-ups

Researching prospects to tailor your messaging to their business and pain points

Managing your pipeline and following structured outreach cadences

Tracking all activity and reporting on results

Booking qualified meetings for our sales team



What we're looking for:



Experience in B2B cold calling, outbound sales, or appointment setting

Confident and professional on the phone — you can handle objections and keep conversations going

Strong English communication skills, both written and spoken

Ability to research a prospect and craft relevant, personalized messaging

Comfortable with CRMs, dialers, and
 outreach tools

Self-disciplined and driven — you can maintain high daily activity without constant oversight

Reliable internet and a quiet space for calls



Compensation:



Competitive base salary

Aggressive bonus structure with uncapped earning potential based on meetings booked and deals closed — this is designed so top performers earn significantly more than base

All tools and resources provided



This is a long-term, full-time position with a growing company. If you love outbound, are motivated by performance-based comp, and want a role where effort directly translates to earnings, we want to hear from you.

 and LinkedIn

Post in

, LinkedIn, etc.)

title: Product Sourcing Specialist (Dropshipping)
description:
BrandFi Inc. is looking for a detail-oriented Product Sourcing Specialist who can identify profitable products and reliable suppliers for our dropshipping operations.



This role requires strong research ability, supplier negotiation skills, and a deep understanding of pricing, shipping logistics, and product quality.



We are not looking for someone who simply searches AliExpress. We need someone who understands how to find high-margin products, negotiate supplier pricing, and manage shipping efficiency.



?



Role Overview



The Product Sourcing Specialist will be responsible for finding products that can be sold profitably while maintaining strong supplier relationships and reliable shipping timelines.



You will identify suppliers, compare pricing across multiple platforms, negotiate costs when possible, and ensure shipping reliability.



The goal is to maintain high margins while ensuring product quality and fulfillment reliability.



?



Key Responsibilities



Product Research & Sourcing



• Identify profitable products based on market demand and competition

• Source products from reliable suppliers

• Compare supplier pricing across multiple platforms

• Ensure product quality and supplier reliability



Supplier & Price Optimization



• Negotiate product pricing where possible

• Identify suppliers offering the best wholesale rates

• Monitor product cost changes and adjust sourcing strategy



Shipping & Fulfillment Management



• Identify suppliers with reliable shipping times

• Evaluate fulfillment options (AliExpress, CJ Dropshipping, private suppliers, etc.)

• Ensure shipping timelines meet customer expectations



Product Validation



• Evaluate product quality and supplier ratings

• Verify supplier reliability and fulfillment capability

• Check order processing times and return policies



Cost & Margin Analysis



• Ensure products maintain healthy profit margins

• Factor in product cost, shipping cost, and platform fees

• Recommend pricing strategies to maintain competitiveness



?



Daily Responsibilities



• Research and identify new product opportunities

• Compare supplier pricing and shipping options

• Build product sourcing lists with cost breakdowns

• Verify supplier reliability and fulfillment speed

• Maintain organized sourcing spreadsheets and supplier databases



?



Required Skills & Experience



• Experience with dropshipping product sourcing

• Strong supplier research skills

• Experience evaluating product margins

• Understanding of shipping logistics and fulfillment timelines

• Ability to identify reliable suppliers and avoid low-quality vendors

• Strong attention to detail



?



Preferred Experience



• Experience with Shopify stores

• Experience sourcing from AliExpress, CJ Dropshipping, or private suppliers

• Experience negotiating supplier pricing

• Understanding of product trend analysis



?



Work Style Expectations



• Highly detail-oriented

• Research-driven and analytical

• Comfortable comparing suppliers and negotiating pricing

• Process-driven and organized



?



Important Notes



• This role requires real research and supplier evaluation

• We prioritize quality suppliers and strong margins

• Candidates must be comfortable performing detailed product analysis

title: AI Video Editor for Ecommerce Ads (Higgsfield, CapCut, ElevenLabs)
description:
We're a fast-growing e-commerce company creating high-converting video ads for DTC brands in supplements, footwear, and more. We're looking for an AI Video Editor who can produce incredibly realistic, AI-generated video ads that look indistinguishable from real footage.



What you'll do:

• Create 20-50 fully AI-generated video ads per week for multiple ecommerce brands

• Produce AI talking heads, UGC-style ads, and b-roll content using advanced AI tools

• Edit and assemble all video content in CapCut with expert-level precision

• Analyze competitor ads on Meta and Google to create high-converting ad variations

• Independently concept and produce creative video ad variations that drive sales

• Assist with scripting when needed (scripts typically provided)



What we're looking for:

• Proven experience creating AI-generated video ads specifically for DTC ecommerce brands

• Strong proficiency with AI video/image generation tools like Higgsfield and ElevenLabs

• Expert-level CapCut editing skills with a portfolio to prove it

• Ability to generate extremely realistic AI visuals of people, products, and environments

• Creative eye for direct-response advertising and what makes ads convert

• Self-starter who can independently produce high-volume ad creatives



Nice to have:

• Experience with Midjourney, Runway, Kling, or Sora

• Familiarity with Meta Ads Library or competitor research tools



This is a part-time position working 32 hours per week with flexible scheduling Monday through Saturday. 



How to Apply:

To make sure you've read this entire post, please start your application with the phrase 'AICreator492'. Then answer the following questions in your application:



1. Walk us through your workflow for creating a fully AI-generated UGC-style video ad from start to finish. From receiving a script to delivering the final edit in CapCut.

2. Which AI tools do you currently use for video generation, image generation, and voice generation? Rate your proficiency with each tool (beginner / intermediate / advanced).

3. How do you ensure that AI-generated talking heads and visuals look realistic enough to be used in paid ads? What techniques or tools do you use to avoid the typical "AI look"?

4. When analyzing competitor ads for inspiration, what specific elements do you look for that indicate high conversion potential?

5. How long does it take you to create a single 25-second short-form video ad that is fully AI-generated, from start to finished edit?

6. Please share your portfolio of extremely realistic AI-generated ecommerce video ads that demonstrate your ability to create converting content.

title: Recruiter – Appointment Setter Recruiting
description:
Recruiter – Appointment Setter Recruiting



Remote | Long-Term Role | Bonuses



We are hiring a recruiter to help us find and screen appointment setters for our team.



You will help us find strong candidates for an outbound calling role. These appointment setters speak with US business owners and either transfer live calls or book appointments for our closer.



We are looking for someone who is organized, detail-oriented, fast, and good at spotting strong phone talent.



Responsibilities



• Post and manage job ads  

• Review applications  

• Follow up with candidates  

• Request and review voice samples  

• Screen for spoken English, confidence, and professionalism  

• Shortlist qualified candidates  

• Help schedule interviews  

• Track candidate status from application to hire  

• Continuously find new candidates as we grow



Team Environment



You will be working alongside another recruiter as part of a small recruiting team. We want people who are collaborative, not territorial. Sharing sourcing ideas, helping each other, and working toward the same hiring goals is encouraged. We believe teamwork creates better results.



Where You May Source Candidates



• OnlineJobs.ph  

•
 groups  

• Referrals  

• Other recruiting channels you already know how to use



Requirements



• Recruiting, sourcing, or hiring experience preferred  

• Strong written English  

• Organized and dependable  

• Able to work independently  

• Fast communicator  

• Good judgment when evaluating people  

• Bonus if you already know how to find candidates through
 groups, OnlineJobs.ph, and other recruiting channels  

• Bonus if you have experience hiring for call center, BPO, appointment setting, or outbound sales roles, or have worked in a BPO or call center environment yourself



Pay



• $4/hour base  

• $20 per new hire who officially starts  

• Additional $5 if that hire remains active for 30 days



Officially starts means the hire completes onboarding and begins working.



To apply, send:



1. A short introduction  

2. Your recruiting or hiring experience  

3. The types of roles you have hired for  

4. Where you usually find candidates  

5. Your internet speed  

6. Your available working hours  

7. A 60–90 second audio introducing yourself, your recruiting experience, and how you would find strong appointment setters



Please put RECRUITER at the top of your application.



Learn more about us at

title: Credit Repair / Credit Building Specialist.
description:
Job Description



We are looking for an experienced Credit Repair Specialist to help improve credit scores by reviewing credit reports, identifying errors, disputing inaccurate items, and creating a credit-building strategy.



The ideal candidate has experience working with U.S. credit bureaus and understands how to build and repair personal credit effectively.



Responsibilities

Review credit reports (Experian, Equifax, TransUnion)

Identify negative or inaccurate items affecting credit score

Submit disputes to credit bureaus and creditors

Track dispute progress and follow up regularly

Create a credit-building plan (secured cards, credit utilization strategy, etc.)

Provide guidance on improving credit score over time

Maintain organized records of all disputes and updates

Communicate progress weekly



Requirements



Proven experience in credit repair and credit building

Strong knowledge of U.S. credit laws (FCRA, FDCPA is a plus)

Experience submitting disputes and handling bureau responses

Organized and detail-oriented

Good communication skills

Ability to work independently and meet deadlines

Preferred Skills (Bonus)

Experience with Credit Repair Cloud or similar software

Experience working with clients in the U.S.

Knowledge of business credit building

Pay



Hourly or fixed-rate (negotiable based on experience)



To Apply



Please send:



Your credit repair experience

Examples of results you’ve achieved (score improvements, dispute removals, etc.)

Tools/software you have used

Your expected hourly rate



Use the link:

title: Virtual Assistant / Video Editor (Strong English Required – Basic Clean Editing)
description:
We're looking for a long-term team member who has very strong, natural English and can handle basic but clean, professional video edits.



Also someone who can take over tasks that require a deep understanding of what works well on youtube, such as making youtube video scripts that actual hook the viewer in and feel natural, putting together clips to make videos, video idea research, and potentially even making thumbnails if qualified.



We're not expecting advanced animation or super high-level editing, although that would be a plus, and we would pay a different rate for that.



However for this role, what matters most is:

1. Your English comprehension

2. Knowing how to keep a viewer engaged with simple edits, and at least able to edit like this: (link removed)

3. Being able to understand more complex topics like options trading and ecommerce

4. Attention to detail, and ability to make videos feel clean, smooth, and natural by cutting out mistakes, and unnecessary parts



About Us:



We are a YouTube content management agency that works with finance-focused creators (topics like options trading, eCommerce, etc.). We help creators produce, edit, and scale their content.



We’re a small, tight-knit team, and I work closely 1-on-1 with everyone.



What You’ll Be Doing:



1. Editing talking-head style and screenshare YouTube videos

2. Using tools like Descript for auto-cutting and whatever video editor software you normally use

3. Watching through full videos and:

  3a. Cutting out mistakes, pauses, and mess-ups

  3b. Keeping what sounds natural and flows well

  3c. Making edits feel clean, simple, and professional

4. Assisting with:

  4a. YouTube script creation (using ChatGPT)

  4b. Basic content structuring for videos

  4c. Occasionally helping with presentations for videos

5. If there are no projects, you will be asked to take clips of old videos to and rearrange them to make a new video (this will be explained during training). Essentially, the content we can make is unlimited so you can get as much work as you want with this method of recycling and making new content.



What we're Looking For:



Very strong English almost like a native (one of the most important things)

You must be able to tell what sounds natural vs. awkward in videos so you know what to cut out and what to keep in



Basic video editing skills:



You don’t need advanced effects or animations

But you must have a good sense of clean editing and pacing



Ability to understand (or quickly learn) topics like:

Options trading

eCommerce

Fast learner who can pick up systems and workflows quickly

Good communication habits:

Respond quickly

Ask questions

Stay in touch consistently



On your application to this post, make the first line "I read the entire job post" so that I know you read the job post fully.



Work Style & Expectations



Willing to work closely with me 1-on-1

Open to training and learning my workflows

Available most days of the week

At first, not constant work every day, but you should be available when projects come in

If you prove you're capable of the job work will become consistent

Able to meet deadlines consistently



Growth Opportunity



This is not just a basic VA role.



If you do well:



Pay will increase as you take on more complex tasks

You can grow into:

Managing multiple clients

Overseeing other editors

Taking on higher-level responsibilities in the agency



If you’re someone who:



Understands content deeply

Can make clean edits

Communicates well

And wants to grow long-term



Then this is a great opportunity.

title: Website Manager (WordPress / SEO / Content) - 16-24h P/W -
description:
About Brightways



We help brands grow on marketplaces like Amazon and 
.



We are not a standard agency. We act as a business partner.

Clear strategy, strong execution, real results.



Our website (brightways dot nl) should reflect that. More than it does now.



--



The role



We are looking for someone who takes ownership of our website.



Not a developer. Not a designer.

Someone who improves, builds and structures pages using our existing CMS (WordPress, custom setup).



You will:

- Build and improve pages using available content blocks

- Improve structure, clarity and navigation

- Optimize pages for SEO and conversion

- Expand the website with new pages

- Help launch and maintain the English version of the site



You work closely with our team and design team, but you are responsible for sprint planning execution.



--



Multilingual content (NL ? EN)



Our website is currently only available in Dutch.

You will help expand and maintain the English version.



This means:

- Translating and rewriting pages from Dutch to English

- Making sure the tone of voice stays consistent

- Improving content instead of translating it literally

- Using AI as a tool, not as the final result

- Aligning with our team to get the content right



--



Growth opportunity (Social)



In a later stage, there is an opportunity to expand your role.



This includes:

- Supporting in setting up and improving our social content

- Repurposing website content into social posts

- Helping structure and scale our content output



This is not the core of the role now, but it can become part of your responsibility if you perform well.



-- 



Requirements:

- Strong experience with WordPress (custom CMS or page builders)

- Solid understanding of SEO (on-page, structure, internal linking)

- Ability to structure content clearly and logically

- Experience improving websites, not just maintaining them

- Comfortable working with AI tools (ChatGPT, etc.)

- Good written English

- Able to work independently and take ownership



--



Important



This is not a developer role.

This is not a basic VA role.



We are looking for someone who thinks in structure, clarity and growth.



--



How we work:

- You are proactive and used to work in clear sprints

- You take ownership of your work

- You communicate clearly and directly

- You focus on output, not activity



--



Application task (required)



We want to understand how you think and work.



Create a short plan (max 1 page) answering:



How would you approach improving and expanding our website (
), including adding an English version?



Your plan should include:

- First steps you would take

- How you prioritize what to improve first

- How you would handle NL ? EN content

- How you would improve SEO and structure

- How you would work in sprints



Keep it practical. No generic answers.



--



What we look for



We don’t care about long resumes.



We look for:

- Clear thinking

- Ownership

- Practical execution

- Attention to detail



If your answers are generic, we won’t move forward.



--



Video requirement (mandatory)



To be considered, you must include a short video (max 2 minutes).



In this video:

- Show that you have reviewed our website (
)

- Share your first impression

- Mention 2–3 concrete things you would improve



No generic introductions. We want to see how you think.



Applications without video will not be reviewed.

title: Short-Form Video + Social Media
description:
Part-Time VA — Short-Form Video + Social Media (2 Projects)



I started two new small websites and need a part-time VA to handle weekly content creation and social media for both. This is an ongoing role, roughly 5 hours/week.



The Projects:




 — tracks public market predictions made by well-known financial commentators.


 — a free online coloring page website.



Weekly Tasks



TASK #1: ForecastCard — Prediction Reel (~2 hrs)

Create ~90 second compliations of a person's predictions and results. 

Format: vertical reel (9:16 for TikTok / Reels / Shorts).



I provide:



All source clips. Example: 



A manifest with each prediction, date made, and outcome. You can also find it in the above link.



You handle:



- Trimming the clips

- Adding captions/subtitles, outcome and score graphics, music and sound, effects.

- Posting to TikTok, Instagram, and YouTube Shorts



TASK #2: ColoringBreak — Coloring Page Video (~2 hrs)

Pick one page from 
 and create a short coloring video. The video should include both formats below, cutting between them or back to back:



Screen recording — color the page directly in the browser on the site

Paper recording — print the page and film yourself coloring it by hand (phone camera is fine, no special equipment needed).

Light edit, add background music, keep it under 60 seconds. Post to socials once per week.



TASK #3: Community Engagement (~1 hrs)

Genuine participation in relevant Reddit and
 groups (coloring, mindfulness, personal finance/investing). Be helpful first — only mention the sites when it's very natural and relevant.



Paid Trial Projects: Before hiring, I'd like to offer a paid test task covering both sites:



ForecastCard reel — Create the reel using the dropbox source clips above. $20.00 USD.



ColoringBreak reel — Pick any page from 
 and record yourself coloring it — either a screen recording directly on the site, or print it out and film yourself coloring it by hand. Light edit, add background music, keep it under 60 seconds. $20.00 USD.



What I'm Looking For:



- Comfortable with basic video editing

- Experience posting to Instagram, TikTok, YouTube Shorts

- Strong written and spoken English



Details



- Rate: $12/hr depending on experience 

- Hours: ~5 hrs/week, ongoing

- Schedule: Flexible — just needs to be posted once per week per task



To apply: Share some creative work. Examples of short-form video content would be great but anything that shows your creativity will be considered.

title: Lead Editor
description:
Company: Orato World Media

Location: Remote (Preference: Philippines / Vietnam)

Type: Contract / Full-Time (flexible)



About the Role

Orato is a global first-person journalism platform focused on real stories told by the people who lived them.

We’re looking for a Lead Editor to help build and manage our editorial pipeline.



Key Responsibilities

- Manage stories from pitch to publication

- Shape first-person angles and narratives

- Edit submissions into publish-ready features

- Maintain editorial quality, tone, and accuracy

- Work closely with contributors and internal team

- Support newsroom workflow and content pipeline



Requirements

- Background in journalism, editing, or digital media

- Strong written English and editing skills

- Experience working with long-form or narrative content

- Ability to manage deadlines remotely

- Strong editorial judgment

s professionally

title: Sales Manager — Outbound B2B Team Lead | US Financial Services
description:
LOCATION: Remote — Work from home anywhere in the Philippines

HOURS: 40 hours/week | Must overlap with US Eastern Time (9AM–6PM EST)

SALARY: $1,400 USD/month + commision

START: Within 3-5 days of hire

GROWTH: Performance bonuses after 90 days + raise review at 6 months + opportunity to build and lead an entire sales department



PLEASE READ THIS ENTIRE POST BEFORE APPLYING. Mass applications without the required items at the bottom will be ignored.



ABOUT US

Commera is a US-based financial services brokerage that connects small business owners with working capital funding. We are NOT a call center — we are a growing company building our founding team. You will not be employee #500. You will be employee #1 in the Philippines.

We work with funding partners across the US and help business owners access $5,000 to $500,000 in revenue-based financing within 24-48 hours. Our merchants are restaurant owners, trucking companies, contractors, retailers, and healthcare providers who need fast capital to grow.

This is a ground-floor opportunity. You will not follow someone else's playbook — you will BUILD the playbook. If you want a job where you clock in and follow a script someone else wrote, this is not for you. If you want to build a sales engine from scratch and eventually lead a team of 5-10 people, keep reading.



THE ROLE

You are the first sales hire in the Philippines. Your job is to:



Build our outbound sales operation from scratch. Create the cold calling scripts, objection handling guides, lead qualification criteria, and daily KPI tracking system. You own this.

Make outbound calls to US small business owners.
dials per day during US business hours. You will speak with restaurant owners in Texas, trucking companies in Florida, retailers in California. You need to be confident, professional, and persuasive on the phone with American business owners.

Qualify merchants and collect applications. When a business owner is interested, you walk them through our simple application: business name, monthly revenue, time in business, funding amount needed. You collect 3 months of bank statements and submit the deal package to our funding partners.

Manage the deal pipeline. Track every lead, call, follow-up, and submission in our CRM. Report daily numbers: calls made, contacts reached, applications collected, deals submitted, deals funded.

Train and manage future tea
mbers. As we grow (target: 3-5 additional SDR agents within 3-6 months), you will recruit, train, and manage the calling team. You will conduct daily huddles, listen to recorded calls, coach agents on objection handling, and hold the team accountable to targets.

Coordinate with the US-based founders. Daily Slack updates. Weekly 30-minute video calls. You flag problems early. You suggest improvements. You think like a business partner, not just an employee.





WHAT YOU WILL NOT DO



You will NOT do data entry, admin work, social media, or general VA tasks

You will NOT read from a robotic script — you will have talking points but need to sound natural

You will NOT work for multiple clients — this is a dedicated, exclusive, full-time role





REQUIREMENTS (Must-Have)



5+ years of outbound B2B cold calling experience — BPO, call center, or direct sales. You have made thousands of calls to business owners, not consumers.

2+ years managing or leading a sales team — You have coached agents, run daily huddles, tracked KPIs, and held people accountable.

Excellent spoken English — Neutral accent preferred. You must be able to have a natural conversation with a US business owner without sounding scripted. You will be asked to do a live cold call test during the interview.

Strong written English — Clear, professional communication over Slack and
. No grammar issues.

Experience with dialers and CRM systems — PhoneBurner, Mojo, HubSpot, Salesforce, GoHighLevel, or similar. You know how to run a dialer campaign.

Reliable internet — Minimum 25 Mbps wired connection. You have a backup internet source (mobile data or secondary ISP).

Quiet home workspace — No background noise. No roosters. No karaoke. Professional environment for US business calls.

Available for US Eastern Time hours — 9AM to 6PM EST (9PM to 6AM Manila time). Night shift is required.





NICE-TO-HAVE (Will Make You Stand Out)



Experience in financial services, lending, merchant cash advance, or business funding

Experience with appointment setting for US-based companies

Knowledge of US small business landscape (what a sole proprietor is, how credit card processing works, what monthly revenue means)

Previous experience hiring and training Filipino cold callers

Experience building outbound sales processes from zero





WHAT WE OFFER



$1,400 USD/month — paid on the 1st and 15th via Wise . That's ?85,000+/month — top-tier compensation for this role.

Performance bonuses — Starting month 4 earn $50-$100 per funded deal your pipeline produces.

Salary review at 6 months — If you hit targets, we raise your base. We want you to grow with us, not look for another job.

Real career growth — You are not joining a 500-person call center. You are building a department. Within 12 months, your title will be Head of Sales Operations, Philippines. You will hire your own team.

Long-term stability — We are building a real business, not a fly-by-night operation. We have a clear business plan. This role is not temporary.





OUR CULTURE

We are small, scrappy, and hungry. We don't do corporate BS. We do:



Radical honesty — if something isn't working, say it

Speed over perfection — launch fast, improve daily

Results over hours — I care about deals funded, not whether you took a 20-minute break





HOW TO APPLY

Do NOT click "Apply" with just your resume. I will not read generic applications.

Instead, include ALL of the following:



Your resume/CV (PDF preferred)

A 60-second voice recording introducing yourself in English. Tell me: your name, your BPO/sales experience, and why you want this specific role. Upload to Google Drive, Loom, or Vocaroo and share the link. This is required — applications without a voice recording will be skipped.

Answer these 3 questions in your application message:



How many outbound B2B calls have you made in a single day? What was the product/service?

Have you ever built a sales process or script from scratch? Describe briefly.

What CRM and dialer tools have you used? Which is your favorite and why?



Your internet speed — run a speed test at 
 and share the screenshot or result.

Your availability to start — can you begin within 5 days?



Applications with all 5 items will be reviewed within 48 hours. If shortlisted, you will be invited to a 15-minute video interview, followed by a live cold call test using our script.

I look forward to hearing from you. Let's build something great.

title: MyClaw + Claude Creator
description:
MyClaw + Claude AI Agent Builder (Trucking Operations Automation)



We’re looking for someone who can build and deploy a custom AI agent using MyClaw + Claude to support and automate parts of our auto transport / trucking business.



This is a hands-on builder role, not theory. You’ll be creating a working system that improves dispatching, load analysis, and daily operations.



---



### What You’ll Be Building



* A Claude-powered AI agent (via MyClaw) tailored to trucking workflows



* Systems that can:



  * Analyze loads (rate, miles, units, RPM, profitability)

  * Recommend optimal routes (minimize deadhead)

  * Assist dispatchers in decision-making

  * Interpret load board data (Central Dispatch,
s, etc.)

  * Help standardize SOPs and responses



* Potential integrations with:



  * Google Sheets (load tracking, P&L, logs)

  * Internal dispatch workflows

  * Messaging tools (WhatsApp,
 summaries, etc.)



---



### What You’ll Be Doing



* Design and build the AI agent architecture

* Create prompts, logic flows, and structured outputs

* Train the agent on our SOPs, pricing models, and decision frameworks

* Continuously refine based on real-world usage

* Work directly with owner/dispatcher to improve outputs



---



### What We’re Looking For



* Strong experience with Claude (prompting, system design, workflows)

* Experience with MyClaw or similar AI agent frameworks

* Ability to think in systems, not just prompts

* Experience building automation tools or internal AI assistants

* Understanding of:



  * Data structuring

  * Logic flows / decision trees

  * API or tool integrations (preferred)



---



### Bonus (Not Required but Valuable)



* Experience in trucking or logistics (dispatching, RPM, load boards)

* Understanding of route optimization

* Familiar with P&L or cost analysis per truck



---



### What Success Looks Like



* AI agent can:



  * Evaluate loads quickly and accurately

  * Suggest best routes based on real constraints

  * Save dispatcher time daily

  * Improve revenue per truck



---



### Compensation



* Pay: DOE (Hourly / Project-Based / Retainer)

* Performance bonuses tied to efficiency gains or revenue improvement



---



### To Apply



Send:



* Examples of AI agents or automations you’ve built

* Your experience with Claude + MyClaw (or similar tools)

* How you would approach building this for a trucking company

* Your rate and availability



---



### Important



We’re not looking for someone to experiment.

We need someone who can build a working system that actually improves operations.

title: Online Math/Science Teacher(Near-Native Accent)
description:
About Pomelo Academy

Pomelo Academy is an innovative online international school dedicated to delivering high-quality education to students worldwide. We provide a dynamic and engaging learning environment, catering to individualized instruction that transcends geographical boundaries.



Job Description

We are seeking passionate and experienced Near-Native English-speaking Online K-12 Math and/or Science Teachers with verifiable teaching certifications. The ideal candidates will have strong academic backgrounds in Mathematics and/or Science, experience teaching young learners (ages 5–18), and a commitment to creating a supportive, inquiry-based, and engaging online learning environment.



Responsibilities



Deliver interactive and engaging Math and/or Science lessons to individuals and small groups of 2–6 students aged 5–18.

Teach using internationally recognized curricula such as A Closer Look, Glencoe Science, Pearson Interactive Science, NGSS-aligned resources, Singapore Math, or IB/AP/A Level Math programs.

Create age-appropriate lesson plans focused on conceptual understanding, inquiry, problem-solving, and real-world applications.

Incorporate visuals, multimedia, and hands-on virtual activities to make abstract concepts accessible and engaging.

Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback to students and parents.

Foster curiosity, discussion, and active learning in a safe and supportive space.



Qualifications



Professional teacher with at least 2 years of teaching experience (Kindergarten–Grade 12).

Must hold a valid teaching license/certification (e.g., Teaching License, State Certification). TESOL/TEFL is a plus.

Near-native English accent with excellent spoken and written communication skills.

Strong academic background in Mathematics and/or Science (Biology, Physics, Chemistry, General Science).

Experience teaching in public/international schools or reputable online platforms.

Familiarity with inquiry-based and/or interdisciplinary approaches (e.g., STEM/STEAM).

Comfortable working between 07:00–22:00 (Weekdays) and 9:00–22:00 (Weekends), GMT+8.

Proficiency with digital platforms such as ClassIn, Microsoft Office, and other educational technologies.

Must have a stable and fast internet connection and a PC/laptop with at least Windows 10 or Mac OS Catalina.



Benefits



Flexible working hours.

Opportunity to teach using globally respected Math and Science curricula.

Be part of an international, passionate team of educators.

Access to training and professional development.

Regular enrollment model (not a booking system), ensuring schedule stability and consistency

title: Guest Experience & Property Operations — Luxury Short-Term Rental Portfolio
description:
Lumina’s five-star guest rating is the foundation of the business.



It drives bookings, owner trust, and premium positioning. Maintaining that standard requires dedicated ownership of guest communications and property operations, especially during high-risk periods like weekends.



Until now, the CEO has managed operations across all properties. This role exists to take full ownership of day-to-day operations so leadership can focus on scaling the portfolio.





WHAT YOU’LL OWN



This is not a task-based role. You are responsible for ensuring nothing falls through the cracks across operations.



?



Guest Communications (Core Responsibility)

 • Manage guest messaging through Conduit (AI + inbox system)

 • AI handles routine messages; you handle anything requiring judgment

 • Respond quickly, clearly, and professionally

 • Resolve all open tasks — nothing sits idle

 • De-escalate issues before they become negative reviews

 • Escalate only when necessary



Your goal is to protect the five-star guest experience at all times. You will need to be proactive ability to identify problems before issues arise. 



?



Cleaning Coordination

 • Manage cleanings via Breezeway

 • Review photo reports and turnover checklists

 • Flag anything below standard immediately

 • Coordinate directly with cleaners (text/Slack)







?



Device Management

 • Monitor locks and thermostats via SweetUp

 • Act on offline devices and low battery alerts

 • Ensure everything is functional prior to guest arrival



If a lock is offline before check-in, this requires immediate escalation.



?



Vendor Coordination

 • Manage maintenance requests

 • Assess urgency and dispatch vendors

 • Confirm resolution

 • Monitor supply orders via Amazon Business

 • Maintain vendor directory in Notion



?



Owner Communications (Month 2+)



Once operational trust is established:

 • Respond to routine owner requests

 • Send weekly performance summaries

 • Provide updates on property status



Escalate anything involving contracts, pricing/fees, or relationship risk.



?



Systems & Reporting



Daily:

 • Review Guesty bookings

 • Clear Conduit inbox and task queue

 • Check SweetUp device status

 • Confirm Breezeway cleaning completions



Weekly:

 • Provide operations summary (issues, resolutions, risks)

 • Confirm calendar accuracy (no double bookings or errors)



Immediate escalation required for:

 • Guest threatening a review

 • Device offline at an active property

 • Cleaner unavailable within 48 hours



?



TOOLS YOU’LL USE

 • Conduit (guest messaging + AI)

 • Breezeway (cleaning operations)

 • Suiteop (locks and thermostats)

 • Guesty (property management system)

 • Notion (SOPs and systems)

 • Slack (internal communication)



?



COVERAGE EXPECTATION



Short-term rentals operate seven days a week, with peak activity on weekends.



Weekend availability is required. If full coverage is not possible from one person, a secondary operator may be added for support. This is a structural requirement of the business.



?



WHO THIS ROLE IS FOR



You are:

 • Extremely detail-oriented

 • Proactive and responsive

 • Calm under pressure

 • Able to manage multiple moving parts

 • A strong communicator

 • Comfortable handling guest issues independently



You think ahead, anticipate problems, and resolve them before they escalate.



?



MUST-HAVES

 • Experience in operations, hospitality, or property management

 • Strong written and verbal communication

 • Ability to manage multiple systems simultaneously

 • High accountability and reliability



?



BONUS

 • Short-term rental experience

 • Experience with Guesty, Breezeway, or similar tools

 • Spanish-speaking (for Puerto Rico coordination)



?



WHAT MAKES THIS ROLE DIFFERENT

 • Direct impact on a premium hospitality brand

 • Ownership over real operations

 • Clear path to growth into senior operations leadership



?



COMPENSATION

 • Based on experience (hourly or monthly)

 • Performance-based growth opportunities



?



HOW TO APPLY



Please include:

 1. A short introduction 

 2. Your experience with operations or hospitality

 3. How you handle urgent guest issues

 4. Your availability, including weekends



?



FINAL NOTE



This role is the backbone of the business.



If you take ownership, solve problems quickly, and maintain standards, you will become a key part of a growing luxury hospitality company.

All social media graphics, promo assets, story templates, and marketing visuals. You must be able to maintain our cinematic, editorial brand aesthetic. No generic templates.


v

The Reckoning Vault is built on this platform. You need to understand the basic structure and be able to communicate updates/issues. Developer (Shohan) handles code-level changes.

Amazon KDP

Book and planner listings, keyword optimization, A+ content, category management. You’ll monitor ad campaigns and sales data.

Amazon Ads

Manage Sponsored Products campaigns. Currently running DF-AUTO-Discovery ($3/day) and HH-MANUAL-ExactMatch ($3/day). Must understand auto vs manual targeting, bid adjustments, and kill/scale criteria.

TikTok (Organic + Ads)

Post 1-2 clips daily. Manage TikTok Ads Manager — Traffic objective campaigns (NEVER Followers/Community Interaction). Understand Spark Ads setup.

Instagram / Reels

Cross-post content, engage in comments/DMs, grow followers through strategic engagement.

MailerLite


 marketing platform. Manage subscriber lists, segments, automated sequences (3
 nurture), and Rouge Reckoning branded templates. Sender: 

Payment processor for Vault subscriptions. Monitor subscriber counts and revenue. Do NOT need access to financial details — dashboard view only.

Etsy (Future)

We may expand product listings to Etsy. Knowledge of Etsy shop management, SEO, and listing optimization is a plus.

BookVault

Print-on-demand service for books and planners. Integration into 
 planned with Buy Direct buttons alongside Amazon links.

ElevenLabs

AI voice platform powering Crystal’s voice in The Reckoning Vault. You don’t need to operate it, but you need to understand what it is and how to talk about it.

CapCut

Video editing for TikTok/Reels/Shorts marketing content. Must be proficient.

YOUR SCOPE OF WORK

1. Content & Social Media Management

Build and maintain a weekly content calendar (approved by D.A. every Sunday night)

Post 1-2 TikTok/Reels clips daily using existing content library and new raw footage from D.A.

Design social graphics in Canva that match the brand aesthetic — cinematic, editorial, never generic

Write captions that sound like the brand: raw, specific, gut-punch energy. No fluff.

Engage in comments and DMs across TikTok, Instagram, and
 — build real community, not fake engagement

Repurpose long-form content (episodes, book excerpts, quotes) into bite-sized social content

Monitor trending audio and hashtags relevant to our niche (faith deconstruction, Black women’s fiction, starting over, glow-up culture)

2. Paid Advertising Support

Monitor and report on Amazon Ads campaigns (DF-AUTO-Discovery, HH-MANUAL-ExactMatch)

Set up and manage TikTok traffic campaigns ($3-5/day, Traffic objective ONLY)

Track ad spend vs. revenue weekly

Recommend kill/scale decisions based on ACOS and conversion data

Coordinate countdown deal campaigns (next window: May 2026) — align ads,
 blasts, and social pushes

3. Website & E-Commerce

Update 
 pages in Elementor Pro (product pages, blog posts, The Vault page)

Manage WooCommerce product listings and inventory

Ensure all links, CTAs, and funnels are working correctly

Help integrate BookVault Buy Direct buttons alongside Amazon links

Monitor site analytics (Jetpack stats — views, visitors, referrers, top content)

Update SEO metadata and page copy as directed

4.
 Marketing

Manage MailerLite subscriber lists and segments

Draft
 campaigns in the Rouge Reckoning voice (raw, electric, never generic — always leave them wanting more)

Monitor automated nurture sequence performance

Build new
 sequences for product launches and countdown deals

A/B test subject lines and send times

5. CRM & Organization

Maintain a task management system (Trello, Notion, or Asana — to be determined)

Track subscriber growth across Vault tiers (Free, Insider, Elite)

Tag and segment contacts in MailerLite based on behavior and purchases

Keep a running log of what’s working vs. what’s not across all channels

File management — keep shared Google Drive organized with assets, content, and reports

Prepare weekly performance summaries (sales, subscribers, engagement, ad performance)

6. Vertical Drama & Vault Promotion

Understand the vertical/short-form drama market and how The Reckoning Vault fits in it

Create promotional content specifically for the Vault — episode teasers, behind-the-scenes, subscriber testimonials

Drive traffic to 
 through organic and paid channels

Track and report on Vault subscriber growth and churn

Research competitor platforms and promotional strategies in the audio drama / vertical drama space

Think globally — this brand is not limited to the US. Marketing should consider international audiences, especially across the African diaspora and UK markets



BRAND VOICE GUIDE

This is the most important section. If you get everything else right but miss the voice, it doesn’t work.

WE ARE

WE ARE NOT

Raw, unfiltered, cinematic

Generic empowerment quotes

Editorial and specific

Church-lady inspiration

Gut-punch openers that stop the scroll

Fluffy, safe, forgettable

Real emotions from real moments

Corny motivational poster energy

Electric — always leave them wanting more

Long-winded, over-explaining

Provocative and unapologetic

Performatively edgy



Voice Examples:

GOOD: "You’ve been functioning. Not living."

GOOD: "She didn’t leave because she was strong. She left because she was tired of pretending weakness was peace."

BAD: "You are enough! Believe in yourself and shine your light!"

BAD: "Empowered women empower women! Rise queen!"

ACCESS & SECURITY RULES

You will be given limited access through shared workspaces and management tools — NOT personal logins

Canva: Team workspace access only. You will not have access to the account owner’s personal files

WordPress: Shop Manager role (not Administrator). You can manage products, pages, and content — not settings or plugins

Social Media: Access through a social management tool (Buffer, Later, or Metricool) — not direct login credentials

MailerLite: Shared login with limited permissions (no billing access)

Passwords shared via LastPass or 1Password — never via text,
, or chat

You will NEVER have access to: Stripe financial details, bank accounts, personal
, tax documents, or legal contracts

All work product created for this brand belongs to DADC SPARKS LLC

HOW WE WORK

Rhythm

Details

Sunday Night

D.A. approves weekly content calendar and drops raw content (voice memos, video clips, story ideas)

Monday–Friday

VA executes: posting, engaging, designing, reporting. D.A. is at her day job 8AM–6PM EST — do not expect real-time responses during these hours.

Daily Check-in

VA sends a 2-3 sentence end-of-day update via task management tool. What got done, what’s pending, anything urgent.

Weekly Report

Friday: VA delivers a performance summary — sales numbers, subscriber growth, engagement metrics, ad performance, and recommendations.

Communication

Task management tool (Trello/Notion/Asana) is the single source of truth. No scattered DMs or texts.

title: VA- Client Support and Operations
description:
I am looking for a thoughtful, detail-oriented Virtual Assistant to support my somatic wellness business.



My work is centered on helping people reconnect with themselves, their well-being, and their inner sense of strength and wholeness. I am also deeply passionate about women reconnecting with their power and supporting one another.



This is a role where both care and precision matter. The work behind the scenes directly shapes how well-supported my clients feel.

I am looking for someone who is kind, steady, and attentive — and who also genuinely enjoys problem-solving and creating well-functioning systems.



Visual creativity or social media experience would be a bonus! 



Main Responsibilities:



Client Support



Respond to client
s with a warm, friendly, and grounded tone

Take care of scheduling and rescheduling clients, and general administrative requests

Help clients feel cared for, while also keeping communication clear and efficient

Hold clear boundaries with a respectful and steady presence



Scheduling + Calendar Management



Manage appointments inside Acuity (multiple calendars, complex scheduling)

Track availability, resolve conflicts, and ensure accuracy across calendars

Bring a calm, organized approach to moving pieces and changing schedules

Class + Program Setup (High Attention to Detail)

Create and manage group classes in Acuity

Update Squarespace web pages with current class information 

Set up and maintain class schedules with precise dates and details

Build and manage complex notification
s within Acuity

Ensure all client-facing information feels clear, consistent, and easy to follow



Systems + SOPs



Create, maintain, and update SOPs for all administrative procedures

Use and refine existing templates for common client questions

Gently improve systems over time so things feel smoother, clearer, and more efficient



Platforms



Primary platforms:

Google Workspace

Squarespace

Acuity Scheduling

Familiarity with these is strongly preferred.

Additional platforms (helpful but not required):

Canva

Instagram


YouTube



Communication + Collaboration



Provide more communication with me, rather than less

Keep me updated when tasks are completed or in progress

Ask questions when something is unclear rather than guessing

Meet with me on Zoom every couple of weeks for check-ins

Help establish a simple, supportive communication system during training

 (Slack,
, shared notes, or similar)



Additional + Future Responsibilities



This role may grow over time, depending on your strengths and interests:

SEO support on website (renaming images, writing alt text, etc)

Organizing and maintaining my testimonials bank

Updating Client Support page and key website links

Managing links to classes and current playlists

Drafting and scheduling newsletter
s

Researching tools and platforms to help build simple, effective workflows

Light bookkeeping (FreshBooks, organizing expenses, flagging deductions)

Organizing Google Drive files and systems

Preparing, uploading, and scheduling social media content (using platforms such as Instagram,
, YouTube, and Canva)

Planning blog content and repurposing existing content



Who This Role Is For



You are someone who:



Communicates with warmth, steadiness, and emotional intelligence

Has a strong attention to detail and takes quiet pride in accuracy

Naturally double-checks your work and notices small inconsistencies

Enjoys bringing order and clarity to systems and information

Follows through reliably and communicates along the way

Is comfortable learning and working across multiple platforms

Prefers thoughtful, well-paced work over rushed output

Feels aligned with the wellness and personal growth space



This is a collaborative role in a values-driven business centered on nervous system health, embodiment, and sustainable well-being.



I am building something intentional and long-term — a space where people can come home to themselves.

Care in communication and integrity in work are key in this role.

Flexible schedule, remote (communication during North America time zone is important)



On this job posting, I listed the desired number of hours to be 15. However, I am not sure of the exact amount of hours. It might be less than 15 to start. My budget is about $
right now. I would love to find a VA to stay with me for many years. They would likely take on a bigger role, and thus have more hours and higher pay as time goes on. 



FYI: It is very helpful to me to see the results of your English language, IQ, and DISC tests. Candidates with these scores will be considered higher priority. 



APPLY HERE:

title: Social Media Manager
description:
This is not a basic social media manager role. I do not want someone whose skill set is just posting graphics, writing captions, scheduling content, and calling it strategy. I need someone who genuinely understands how to create content that gets attention, builds a brand, and drives engagement.



This person should feel much closer to a content creator / strategist than a traditional SMM.



Our entire marketing plan is built around organic content that feels real, differentiated, and memorable. We are not trying to look like a typical apparel or branding company. No generic posts, no safe content. Everything should feel intentional and attention-grabbing.



When reviewing portfolios, I need to see:



Strong short-form video (TikTok / Reels)

Content that feels native to the platform, not corporate or overly polished

Clear hooks in the first 1–3 seconds

Personality, humor, and storytelling — not generic content

Proof of performance (views, engagement, growth, etc.)

Real brand work, not just sample or filler content



If it’s mostly Canva graphics, generic captions, or no performance data, it’s not a fit.



On creativity — I’m looking for someone who knows how to make people stop scrolling. Someone who can take a simple idea and turn it into something entertaining or memorable. They should think in content series, not just one-off posts, and have strong instincts for humor, timing, and pacing.



Now most important — INDUSTRY BACKGROUND:



I do not want corporate or traditional marketing backgrounds.



I want candidates who have worked in or closely with:

- Apparel / streetwear / lifestyle brands

- E-commerce brands (especially DTC)

- Content-heavy brands (TikTok-first or Instagram-first brands)

- Agencies that focused on social-first brands, not corporate clients

- Personal brands / creators with strong followings



Big plus if they’ve worked with:

- Brands targeting younger demographics (18–35)

- Edgy, humorous, or personality-driven brands

- Fast-moving content environments where volume and speed matter



I do NOT want backgrounds in:

- Real estate marketing

- Corporate B2B content

- Medical, law, or overly professional industries

- Anything that feels slow, safe, or overly polished



Those backgrounds almost always produce content that feels boring and outdated.



The right person should understand internet culture, trends, and how modern brands actually win attention. They should already “get it” without needing to be taught from scratch.



I care a lot about taste. I want someone whose work clearly stands out and feels current, sharp, and intentional.



I would rather pass on candidates than lower the standard. 





If you have the required skill set, send me a DM on WhatsApp at 
. Please do not apply if you don’t meet the key requirements.

title: Japanese Bilingual Senior Clinical Quality Specialist / Auditor (Pharmaceutical)
description:
Job Title: Japanese Bilingual Senior Clinical Quality Specialist / Auditor (Pharmaceutical)

 Salary: 150,000-170,000 PHP  

Willingness to travel internationally from time to time.



Role Overview

As a  Japanese Bilingual Senior Clinical Quality Specialist / Auditor  , you will play a critical role in delivering high-impact quality consulting and compliance support to life sciences clients. You will lead quality system assessments, gap analyses, audits, remediation planning, and cross-functional compliance projects. You will work directly with senior leadership and clients to ensure alignment with global regulations, GxP standards, and industry best practices.

Key Responsibilities

Lead assessments of quality systems and operational processes against GxP requirements (GCP, GMP, GLP, GDP) and global regulations



Support development, implementation, and remediation of Quality Management Systems (QMS)



Conduct and lead internal and external quality audits, clinical site audits, vendor audits, and readiness assessments



Interpret and apply regulatory requirements including:



ICH E6(R3) – Good Clinical Practice



ISO 14155 – Clinical Investigation Standard



21 CFR Part 312 (IND Requirements)



21 CFR Part 812 (IDE Requirements)



21 CFR Part 211 (Pharmaceutical GMP)



21 CFR Part 820 (Medical Device QMS)



Collaborate with cross-functional teams to develop corrective and preventive actions (CAPAs), remediation plans, and quality improvement initiatives



Prepare high-quality deliverables including audit reports, gap analysis summaries, compliance strategy documents, and training content



Guide clients in regulatory inspection preparedness and mock inspection scenarios



Provide education and training on quality system requirements, regulatory expectations, and industry standards



Serve as a subject-matter expert (SME) for regulatory interpretation and complex compliance challenges



Required Qualifications

Bachelor’s degree in Life Sciences, Engineering, Quality Assurance, Regulatory Affairs, or related field



Fluent in written and spoken Japanese



Minimum 7–10+ years of quality assurance experience in clinical or pharmaceutical/medical device environments



Proven experience with clinical quality systems and compliance (ICH, GCP, etc.)



Strong working knowledge of:



? ICH E6(R3) and GCP principles



? ISO 14155 clinical investigation standard



? FDA regulations: 21 CFR 312, 812, 211, 820



? Global regulations and quality system standards (e.g., ICH E10, Q9, EMA, China, Korea, Japan, EU MDR, IVDR, ISO 13485)



Experience conducting and leading quality audits and assessments



Quality / Auditor certification such as:



ASQ Certified Quality Auditor (CQA) or equivalent



Certified Quality Engineer (CQE), Certified Manager of Quality/Organizational Excellence (CMQ/OE) preferred



Demonstrated ability to lead cross-functional initiatives and mentor junior staff



Strong communication, presentation, and technical writing skills



Preferred Attributes

Prior consulting experience in life sciences (clinical trials, medical devices, biologics, pharma)



Experience working with regulatory agencies or participating in regulatory inspections



Familiarity with electronic QMS and audit management tools

title: Local SEO Strategist | SEO Manager | Remote
description:
About the Role

This is not an entry-level position and not a generic "SEO specialist" role. You will own the strategy and results for local SEO campaigns targeting competitive metro markets across the US.



You will manage a small team of specialists -- content writers, link builders, and citation builders -- and be directly responsible for the quality of their output. Your job is to make sure every client's local presence grows measurably, month over month.



The agency works exclusively with home services businesses. Multi-location Google Business Profile expansion, local pack dominance, and organic lead generation are the core of what they do. If you have deep experience in local SEO for home services or multi-location businesses, this is built for you.



What You Will Do



Strategy and Execution



Develop and execute local SEO strategies for 8-12 home services clients across competitive US metro markets

Conduct keyword research focused on local intent, service-area targeting, and multi-location expansion

Build and manage Google Business Profile optimization strategies across multiple locations per client

Plan and oversee content strategies that target local search intent and support topical authority

Identify and prioritize quick wins (positions 4-15 keywords, content gaps, technical issues with revenue impact)

Conduct competitive analysis at the local level -- geogrid rankings, local pack composition, citation gaps



Team Management



Manage and QA the work of 3-5 specialists: content writers, link builders, and citation builders

Create detailed content briefs with target keywords, search intent analysis, internal linking plans, and word count targets

Review all deliverables against quality standards before they go to clients

Provide specific, actionable feedback that improves output quality over time

Maintain SOPs for repeatable processes and update them as best practices evolve

Reporting and Communication

Deliver monthly performance reports per client with clear narratives connecting actions to results

Track and report on KPIs: local pack rankings, organic traffic, GBP impressions/actions, citation accuracy, link acquisition

Flag underperforming clients early with diagnosis and corrective action plans

Communicate async via project management tools. Weekly written updates, monthly video check-ins.



Compensation and Terms



Type: Independent contractor, month-to-month engagement

Hours: Part-time, approximately 20-30 hours/week

Location: Remote.

Growth: Performance bonuses tied to client ranking improvements and portfolio growth. Opportunity to take on more clients and increase compensation as the team scales.

No long-term contracts. We start with a paid trial period (3-4 weeks) with defined deliverables and clear success criteria. If it works, we keep going. If it does not, we part ways cleanly.



Requirements



Must Have



3+ years of hands-on local SEO experience -- not general SEO with some local work mixed in. Local SEO must be the core of your practice.

Multi-location GBP management experience -- you have managed and optimized Google Business Profiles across 5+ locations for a single business or agency portfolio

Demonstrated ranking results -- you can show keyword ranking improvements, local pack gains, or organic traffic growth with specific numbers. We will ask for Google Search Console access to verify.

Content strategy skills -- you can write a content brief that a writer can execute without guessing what you want

Link building knowledge -- you understand what makes a quality backlink, can evaluate link prospects, and know the difference between a $50 link and a $500 link

Citation and NAP management -- you have built and cleaned up citation profiles and understand the local search ecosystem (data aggregators, directories, industry-specific platforms)

Team management experience -- you have directed the work of at least 2-3 other people (writers, VAs, link builders) and improved their output quality

Strong written English -- reports, briefs, and client-facing communication must be clear and professional

Available during US business hours for at least 4 hours of overlap (Eastern or Central preferred)



Technical Proficiency



Google Search Console and Google Analytics 4

Google Business Profile management (including multi-location)

Ahrefs or SEMrush (at a working level, not just pulling reports)

Local rank tracking tools (BrightLocal, Local Falcon, or equivalent)

Citation management tools (BrightLocal, Whitespark, or equivalent)

Screaming Frog or similar crawl tools for technical audits

Comfortable working in project management tools (ClickUp, Asana, or similar)



Nice to Have



Experience with home services verticals (HVAC, plumbing, landscaping, etc.)

GBP suspension recovery and reinstatement experience

Knowledge of review generation strategies and reputation management

Experience with Google LSAs (Local Services Ads) and local PPC

Familiarity with schema markup implementation for local business

Experience creating and maintaining SEO SOPs for a team

Spanish language proficiency (useful for some client markets)



About Nexta Talent



Nexta Talent is a specialized recruiting firm that connects top international talent with growing US-based businesses. We are currently hiring on behalf of a digital marketing agency client based in the United States that specializes in local SEO and lead generation for home services businesses.



Our client manages a portfolio of home services companies across competitive US metro markets. They are looking for a senior Local SEO Strategist to join their team as a long-term contractor and take ownership of local SEO execution across their client portfolio.



HOW TO APPLY:



We use a structured screening process to ensure the best fit. To be considered, submit your application with a short cover letter and screening responses at www. applynexta.online

title: Growth & Operations Virtual Assistant (Chiropractic / Wellness)
description:
Who We Are

Sacred Flow Chiropractic & Wellness is a nervous-system-focused practice in Washington, USA. We blend gentle chiropractic, nervous system care, and a calm, grounded environment so patients can regulate, heal, and stay well.



We’re now ready for a VA who loves the mix of marketing, systems, and patient support—and wants to help build something that grows over time.



What This Role Is Really About

This role exists to:

Keep patients and leads moving through the practice (not falling through the cracks)

Make marketing and follow-up consistent instead of “whenever there’s time”

Keep the back end organized so the practice can grow without chaos



If you enjoy organizing information, following through on details, and creating simple, effective marketing, you’ll likely enjoy this work.



Key Responsibilities

1. Patient & Lead Flow

Help keep active patients scheduled out 1–2 months

Follow up with past patients and warm leads by
/text

Support patients with intake forms and payment updates

Keep simple lists of “who needs what next” so no one is missed



2. Marketing & Content Implementation

Create and schedule ~5 social media posts per week (graphics + captions)

Use Canva to design clean, on-brand graphics

Support reels and short-form content (basic edits, posting, ideas)

Use AI tools to draft content, then adjust tone to match Sacred Flow

Over time, assist with simple funnels, nurture sequences, and basic ads



3. Outreach & Events

Maintain a simple list of local businesses and partners

Help with outreach for workshops, community events, and dinners

Support event logistics (reminders, simple graphics, print files, etc.)



4. Organization & Admin Support

Help organize patient data in an EHR (Jane or similar is a plus)

Keep weekly financial/booking notes organized for easier bookkeeping

Coordinate print jobs (sending files for printing/pickup)

Work from a shared task list and update progress consistently



Tools & Skills

You’re a good fit if you:

Are comfortable with Canva and Google Workspace (Docs, Sheets, Drive, Gmail)

Have experience creating social media content (posts, basic reels)

Are comfortable using AI (ChatGPT or similar) to draft and improve copy

Communicate clearly in English, in writing and on video

Like working from a list, staying organized, and closing loops



Bonus points if you have:

Used GoHighLevel or another CRM/funnel platform

Worked with healthcare, wellness, or holistic brands

Experience with podcast repurposing or simple audio/video support

Experience in outreach, partnerships, or nonprofit/community work



What It’s Like to Work Together

You’ll have a clear list of priorities, with room to ask questions and suggest improvements.

Most work is async, as long as tasks are done within agreed timeframes (usually within 24-72 hours for normal tasks).

As you help create more structure and results, there will be room for more hours, higher pay, and more ownership.



How to Apply 

This version is slightly different from the first posting so we can see different strengths. Please follow these steps:

Start your message with: GROWTH

Share 3–6 examples of your work (social media, graphics, funnels,
s, or outreach messages). For each, add 1–2 lines about what you did.



Answer these three questions briefly:

a) In your own words, what do you think is most important when following up with past patients or leads for a wellness practice?

b) What is your process for turning a rough idea (for example: “workshop about stress and the nervous system”) into actual posts and graphics on a calendar?

c) What tools from this list have you used: Canva, Google Workspace, GoHighLevel (or similar CRM), any EHR? Describe your experience level with each.

title: GoHIghLevel CRM Manager Needed
description:
**GoHighLevel (GHL) CRM Setup & Data Migration**



We're a full-service
 and SMS retention marketing agency with 50+ active clients across DTC and e-commerce. We've never had a centralized CRM — all our data lives across Calendly, Stripe, Square, and Slack. We need someone experienced with GoHighLevel to build it out from scratch.



**Scope of Work**



Set up GoHighLevel as our central CRM, import all historical data, and build out pipelines and segments we can run automations against.



**What we have ready:**



- 771 Calendly bookings (dating back to Jan 2022)

- 82 Stripe customers + 354 invoices (USD)

- 184 Square customers + 925 invoices (CAD)

- CSV exports from all platforms, ready to hand off



**What we need built:**



- Full CRM pipeline with proper deal stages

- All historical data imported and backdated accurately

- Calendly integration (live, ongoing)

- Stripe integration (live, ongoing)

- Contact segments for active clients (~50), churned clients (~163), and unconverted leads (~411)

- Automations-ready tagging and structure so we can layer in workflows post-setup



**Ideal candidate:**



- Proven experience setting up GoHighLevel from scratch

- Strong with data migration, deduplication, and CSV imports

- Familiar with Calendly and Stripe integrations inside GHL

- Detail-oriented — backdating and data accuracy matter

- Bonus: experience working with agencies or high-volume service businesses



**To apply, include:**



1. Examples of past GHL setups or migrations you've completed

2. Your estimated timeline for this scope

3. Your rate (fixed project price preferred)



We'll send over all CSV exports as soon as you're selected. This is a project-based engagement with potential for ongoing GHL management.
