title: ???? CUSTOMER SERVICE AGENT — BrickArsenal (Tactical Foam Blaster Brand)
description:
???? Remote | ? Full-Time or Part-Time | ???? $4.00–$4.50/hr | Weekly Pay via Wise/PayPal



WHO WE ARE



BrickArsenal is a US-based e-commerce brand selling tactical foam blasters inspired by Call of Duty and Warzone aesthetics. We build gear that looks and feels like the real thing — minus the danger — so that dads and their kids can actually play together. Think weekend backyard ops, birthday missions, and family game nights with a military edge.



We're a lean, fast-moving brand with real customers who love what we sell. Our team is remote, our systems are tight, and we take customer experience seriously. Every ticket that gets handled well is a family that comes back.



THE ROLE



You'll be our front line. Customers reach out with questions about orders, shipping, returns, product info, and occasional complaints. Your job is to answer clearly, solve what you can, and only escalate when it genuinely requires it.



This is an
-based role handled through Freshdesk. No phone calls. No live chat required.



What you'll handle day-to-day:

- Order status and tracking inquiries

- Return and exchange requests

- Missing or damaged item claims

- General product questions

- Relaying accurate info to customers without overcomplicating things



WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR



We don't need someone who follows scripts robotically. We need someone who actually cares about the customer on the other end — and knows when to solve it themselves vs. when to pass it up.



You're a great fit if you:

- Have at least 1 year of experience in e-commerce customer service (Shopify brands preferred)

- Have used a helpdesk tool like Freshdesk, Gorgias, Zendesk, or similar

- Write in clear, friendly, professional English — no fluff, no robotic tone

- Take ownership of tickets without waiting to be hand-held

- Are reliable, on-time, and communicate proactively if something comes up

- Respect the customer even when they're being difficult

- Align with our values: family-first, honest, solution-oriented, no drama



COMPENSATION & LOGISTICS



- $4.00–$4.50/hr based on experience

- Weekly payouts via Wise or PayPal

- Fully remote, work from home

- SOPs and training materials provided — you won't be thrown in cold

- Major opportunity to be promoted to team lead or manager (we're a growing brand)



?? HOW TO APPLY — READ CAREFULLY



Applications without a video introduction will not be reviewed. No exceptions.



Please submit:

1. A short video (2–3 minutes) introducing yourself, describing your CS experience, and answering this question: "Tell me about a time you resolved a difficult customer situation without escalating it. What did you do?"

2. Your resume or work history

3. Any tools or helpdesks you've used



Upload your video to Google Drive, Loom, or YouTube (unlisted) and include the link in your application.



We're looking for someone who takes this seriously. If you made it this far and you're the right person — we want to hear from you.

title: Cleaning Company Virtual Assistant
description:
Cleaning Company Virtual Assistant (Sales, Dispatch and Operations)

Work From Home | U.S.-Based Cleaning Company



We are hiring immediately and looking to fill this position within the next few days.



Type of Work: Full Time

Salary: $750/month (Base + Bonus)

Hours Per Week: 40



---



Job Overview



We are a growing U.S.-based cleaning company looking for a reliable, organized, and proactive Virtual Assistant from the Philippines to manage daily operations, handle inbound leads, follow up with past customers, and help us grow.



This is not just a basic VA role. You will be responsible for booking jobs, keeping the schedule full, and helping generate new business.



If you are fast, professional, and comfortable with sales and communication, we would love to work with you.



---



What You’ll Do



Inbound Lead Handling



* Answer inbound calls, texts, and messages

* Handle leads from Google Guarantee (LSA), Google Search, Google Maps,
 Ads, and Thumbtack

* Respond quickly during business hours

* Convert leads into booked jobs



Scheduling and Dispatch



* Schedule cleaning appointments and manage the calendar

* Dispatch cleaning crews and confirm job details

* Send confirmations and reminders

* Handle reschedules and customer support



Recurring Customer Growth



* Follow up with past customers to rebook services

* Turn one-time customers into recurring clients (weekly, bi-weekly, monthly)

* Help keep the schedule full



Outbound Sales



* Call local businesses, offices, and property managers to offer cleaning services

* Reach out to potential clients for commercial cleaning

* Track outreach and follow up



Admin and Payments



* Send estimates and job details

* Collect and process payments

* Keep CRM updated and organized



Hiring Support



* Help interview and onboard cleaners

* Assist with hiring additional VAs if needed



---



What You Need



* Experience with cleaning companies or home service businesses

* Experience handling leads from Google,
, or Thumbtack

* Comfortable with phone calls and sales

* Experience with cold calling is a plus

* Strong English communication skills

* Experience with scheduling, dispatching, and CRM systems

* Organized, reliable, and able to multitask



---



Tools and Software (Preferred)



* BookingKoala

* GoHighLevel

* OpenPhone or similar phone system

*
 Meta Business Suite



---



Tech Requirements



* Reliable internet (10 Mbps minimum)

* Noise-canceling headset

* Webcam for Zoo
etings

* Quiet workspace

* Dual screens preferred



---



Compensation and Schedule



* $500/month base pay

* $250/month performance bonus

* Total: $750/month

* Salary increases based on performance and time with the company

* Holiday Time Off, Holiday Bonuses & Quarterly Bonuses 

* Paid Time Off available after probation period



Schedule:

Monday to Friday, 9:00 AM to 6:00 PM CST

Includes a 1-hour lunch break and two 15-minute breaks



---



Performance Bonus Requirements



To earn the $250 bonus, you must:



* Respond to new leads within 2 minutes during your shift

* Maintain at least a 70% booking rate

* Maintain a 90% show rate

* Follow up with all unbooked leads for at least 3 days

* Help convert customers into recurring services

* Collect payment the same day when possible

* Maintain good communication and attendance



---



Probation Period



There is a 30-day probation period. Performance, attendance, and communication will be evaluated. PTO and long-term eligibility begin after successful completion.



---



How to Apply



Send your application to: 



Subject Line: Cleaning VA Application - Your First and Last Name



Include:



1. Your resume

2. A 2-minute Loom video introducing yourself



   * Your experience with cleaning or home service companies

   * Your experience handling inbound and outbound calls

   * How you book jobs and communicate with customers

   * Any hiring or interview experience

3. Any examples of your work (if available)



---



Important



* Applications without a Loom video will not be considered

* You will not be scheduled for an interview without a Loom video

* Use the exact subject line or your application will not be reviewed

* This role requires fast response times

* No call, no show will result in removal



---



Apply today. We are hiring quickly.

title: E-commerce & Content Operations Assistant
description:
# E-commerce & Content Operations Assistant 



## About Us



We are a fast-growing beauty brand based in Sydney, Australia, focused on skincare, education, and curated product recommendations. We create content-driven experiences across Instagram,
, and our website to help customers achieve better skin.



---



## Role Overview



We are looking for a **mid-level Creative Content Assistant (Video Editing & Design Focus)** who can execute high-quality visual content efficiently across digital channels.



This is a **remote, part-time role (15 hours per week)** aligned with Australian Eastern Standard Time (AEST).



This role is **primarily creative-driven**, with a strong focus on short-form video editing and graphic content creation. You should be comfortable producing visually appealing, on-brand content quickly and consistently.



We are looking for someone who already has hands-on experience creating content for e-commerce or beauty brands and can work independently without needing step-by-step guidance.



---



## Key Responsibilities



* Edit high-quality short-form video content for Instagram (Reels) using tools such as CapCut or InShot

* Create visually engaging Instagram Stories, Carousels, and
 Campaign designs using Canva

* Design creative assets aligned with brand guidelines and marketing campaigns

* Upload and format products on the website (images, descriptions, layout)

* Set up and design visually engaging
 campaigns (content will be provided)

* Provide customer service support across Meta (Instagram and
 messages and comments) and

* Maintain strong visual consistency and brand alignment across all outputs



---



## Required Experience



* Minimum 2 years of relevant experience in e-commerce, content creation, or a similar role

* Previous experience creating content for e-commerce or beauty brands

* Strong video editing skills for short-form content (Reels / TikTok style) using tools such as CapCut or InShot

* Strong design skills using Canva (layout, typography, visual balance)

* Experience with Shopify or similar platforms (product uploads, formatting)

* Experience using Meta scheduling tools for content publishing

* Ability to follow and apply brand guidelines consistently

* Good written English for customer communication



---



## What We’re Looking For



* Strong creative eye and ability to produce visually appealing content

* Able to complete creative tasks efficiently without excessive time

* Comfortable working independently and making basic creative decisions

* Reliable, responsive, and consistent

* Able to manage workload and meet deadlines

* High attention to detail

* Strong communication skills and ability to provide daily updates

* Familiarity with tools such as Trello and Slack for task management and communication



---



## Important (Please Read)



This is an **execution-focused role**.



We are looking for someone who has already performed similar tasks multiple times and can work efficiently from the start.



If you are still learning or require extensive guidance for basic tasks, this role may not be the right fit.



---



## Working Hours



* 10–15 hours per week

* Monday to Friday

* Must have overlap with AEST business hours



---



## Application Instructions



To apply, please begin your application with:

**Content Operator**



Then include:



* A link to your portfolio (content, product uploads, or similar work)

* Confirmation you can work during AEST business hours

* Answers to the following:



  1. How long does it typically take you to edit a 20-second video using provided clips?

  2. How long does it take you to upload 1 product to a website (including formatting)?



Applications without complete answers will not be reviewed.



## Typical Weekly Tasks



* Edit 2 short-form videos (Reels)

* Create 5 Instagram Stories

* Design 1 Instagram Carousel

* Design and set up 2
 campaigns

* Upload 5-10 products to the website

* Produce other graphics as needed, e.g. website banner, promotional materials

* Provide customer service support (Meta messages/comments and
)



---



Shortlisted candidates will complete a **paid test task**.



---



## Notes



We value speed, reliability, and clear communication.



The goal of this role is to support execution and reduce workload, not to require ongoing training.

title: Remote Estate Planning Paralegal (International Attorney) – Systems-Driven, Detail-Obsessed A-Player
description:
About Us

We are an established and fast-growing U.S.-based law firm built on a simple principle: A-players + systems = exceptional results



We don’t tolerate mediocrity, hand-holding, or chaos. Our firm runs on clear processes, accountability, and high performance—and we’re looking for someone who thrives in that environment.



The Role

We are hiring a highly detail-oriented foreign attorney to manage the backend of our estate planning process from draft to final execution.



This is NOT a “figure it out as you go” role.



You will:

- Help establish and then execute established SOPs

- Follow structured workflows

- Ensure every client receives a flawless experience



What You’ll Do



Drafting & Case Management

- Draft estate planning documents based on:

  - Intake forms

  - Established templates

  - Defined procedures

- Manage each case from draft to execution to completion



Client Coordination

- Ensure every client is scheduled for their estate plan review

- Coordinate:

  - Signing appointments  

  - Notary  

  - Witnesses  



Execution & Quality Control

You are the final line of defense.



- Confirm documents are executed perfectly

- Ensure:

  - All signatures are correct  

  - Notarization is complete  

  - Witness requirements are met  



Post-Signing Process

- Ensure deeds are properly recorded  

- Ensure a custom client binder is ordered

- Confirm completed plans are returned to clients  

- Trigger review requests from satisfied clients  



Who You Are



Non-Negotiables:

- Completed formal legal education 

- Extreme attention to detail (you catch what others miss)

- Able to follow SOPs exactly without cutting corners

- Highly organized and process-driven

- Strong written and verbal English



You Thrive If You:

- Love checklists, systems, and structure

- Take ownership of outcomes (not just tasks)

- Get satisfaction from doing things right the first time

- Don’t need constant supervision



This Is NOT for You If:

- You “wing it” instead of following systems

- You miss details or make frequent errors

- You need constant direction or reminders

- You’re looking for a low-responsibility role



Compensation

We believe in paying for performance.



This is a well-compensated role based on:

- Experience

- Skill level

- Proven ability to execute at a high level



Top performers will be rewarded and have opportunities to grow within the firm.



Why This Role Matters

In our firm, this role is critical.



You are responsible for:

- Delivering a 5-star client experience

- Ensuring zero errors in execution

- Helping the firm scale through process excellence



How to Apply



To be considered, follow these steps exactly:



1. Submit your resume

2. Include a short video (2–3 minutes) answering:

   - Why you are a good fit for this role  

   - Your experience with document drafting and SOPs  

3. In your application, include the phrase: “Details matter.”



Applications that do not follow these instructions will not be considered.



Final Note

We are not looking for average.



We are looking for someone who takes pride in precision, ownership, and excellence—and wants to be part of a firm that is growing fast and doing things the right way.



If that’s you, apply now!

title: Senior Full-Stack Product Integration Engineer - Trading Platform + Gateway + Chart + Voice
description:
We’re building Wealthy, a modern trading product that combines a frontend app, chart system, backend gateway, and AI voice layer into one customer-ready experience.



This is not a generic CRUD app role.



We need a strong engineer who can work across the integration layer and help turn an already-built foundation into a more stable, customer-ready product.



What you’ll work on



You’ll help stabilize and integrate:



Frontend app built with React/Vite

Chart layer and chart embedding/integration

Backend/gateway built with Node/TypeScript

Realtime / stateful system behavior across auth, session, connection, and data flow

Voice service integration using a prepared Python/FastAPI voice prototype

Current stack

React / Vite / TypeScript

Node.js / Express / TypeScript

WebSocket / realtime data flow

Chart-heavy product UI

Python / FastAPI

Redis

Docker

What we need from this hire



The first contract is focused on making the first customer-ready product slice feel cohesive and reliable.



In scope

Stabilize frontend + chart integration

Improve app state truth across auth / connection / feed status

Harden the canonical backend/gateway

Improve diagnostics, reliability, and maintainability

Wrap the working voice prototype into a production-ready service

Help make frontend, charts, gateway, and voice work together cleanly

Out of scope for the first engagement

Full integration of 31 expert/agent modules

OMS / live order routing / execution stack

Major repo restructuring or renaming

Big visual redesign

You are a strong fit if you have

Must-have

Strong TypeScript experience

Strong Node.js / Express backend experience

Solid React / Vite frontend experience

Experience with stateful systems and debugging auth/session/data-flow issues

Experience with WebSockets or realtime systems

Ability to productionize Python / FastAPI services

Ability to work inside an existing codebase without trying to rewrite everything

Nice-to-have

Trading platform or market-data experience

Chart-heavy UI experience

Redis + Docker experience

FastAPI inference/TTS service experience

Experience with gateway/backend systems that sit between UI and external providers

Rithmic or exchange/API integration exposure

Voice scope



We already have a working voice prototype.

We are not looking for a voice-model researcher.



We are looking for someone who can:



wrap the voice system into a production-ready FastAPI service

add Docker, health checks, logging, and Redis caching

support endpoints like:

/tts/generate

/tts/stream

/health

/voices

/tts/batch

integrate the voice service cleanly into the existing product stack

What success looks like



A strong first engagement would result in:



cleaner frontend/chart/gateway integration

more reliable backend/gateway behavior

clearer state truth and diagnostics

production-ready voice service wrapping

a tighter, more customer-ready product experience

How we work



We care about:



clean thinking

practical debugging

stable implementation

low-ego communication

working with the current architecture instead of blowing it up



We do not want someone who immediately wants to rewrite the whole stack.



To apply, send:

A short intro about your background

Your most relevant experience for this role

Examples of similar work:

frontend/backend integration

realtime systems

chart-heavy apps

FastAPI services

TTS or inference-service integration

Your hourly rate or preferred pricing

Your weekly availability

How you would approach a first contract like this

Any questions you’d want answered before starting

Bonus points



Include a short note on:



how you debug confusing state issues across frontend and backend

how you would approach integrating a prepared voice service into an existing product.  Tell me about a product where you had to stabilize both frontend and backend integration, not just build one side.

Have you worked with WebSockets, realtime feeds, or stateful session systems?

Have you worked on chart-heavy products or trading/financial apps?

Have you productionized a Python/FastAPI service before?

How do you handle joining an existing codebase with mixed legacy and active modules?

What would be your first step when debugging a system where the frontend says one thing and the backend/data source says another?

Are you comfortable working on a product that includes React/Vite, Node/TypeScript, charts, and voice-service integration?

title: QA Tester (Mobile App) — CAIT Connect (Remote)
description:
About CAIT Connect

CAIT Connect is a next-generation GenAI platform built for families — designed to help parents manage daily life, caregiving, medical needs, and everything in between. Think: ChatGPT, but built specifically for family life — with memory, shared caregiving, tracking, and real-time support. We are preparing for launch and looking for a detail-oriented QA Tester to help ensure a seamless, high-quality experience for thousands of families.



Role Overview

You’ll be responsible for identifying bugs, validating features, and ensuring the CAIT app works reliably across different real-life use cases. This is not just technical QA — we are looking for someone who can think like a parent/user and catch issues that impact real-world experience.



Responsibilities

Test new features across iOS (and future Android) builds

Identify, document, and track bugs using Jira

Reproduce issues and clearly describe steps, expected vs. actual behavior

Perform regression testing before releases

Validate key flows:

- onboarding

- shared caregiving

- daily logs / summaries

- calendar sync

- photo & video uploads

Test edge cases (time zones, delays, sync issues, etc.)

Collaborate with product and engineering teams for quick bug resolution

Provide feedback on UX issues, not just technical bugs



Requirements

Experience as a QA Tester for mobile apps (iOS required)

Strong familiarity with Jira (bug tracking, tickets, workflows)

Ability to write clear, structured bug reports

High attention to detail — nothing slips past you

Comfortable testing real-world scenarios (not just scripts)

Strong communication skills



Nice to Have

Experience testing AI or chat-based applications

Background in healthcare, caregiving, or family-focused apps

Experience with TestFlight

Familiarity with API testing tools (Postman, etc.)



What We’re Looking For

Someone who:

- Notices the small things others miss

- Thinks in real-life scenarios (not just features)

- Moves fast but stays extremely precise

- Cares about building something meaningful for families



Why Join CAIT

Work on a mission-driven product helping real families

Be part of a high-growth pre-launch team

Direct impact on product quality and user experience

Opportunity to grow into a long-term role



To Apply

Please include:

Brief intro + relevant QA experience

Resume

Examples of bugs you’ve reported (if available)

Tools you’ve used (Jira, TestFlight, etc.)

title: B2B Partnership Sales — Recruiting Call Centers & Media Buyers (Remote)
description:
I run a US-based call buying operation. Companies and individuals send me qualified phone calls. I pay them per call. Simple.

My system is built. My buyers are ready. The only thing missing is someone who goes out every day and finds the people who produce the calls — then convinces them to send those calls to me.

This is a sales job. You are not calling consumers. You are not generating leads. You are selling a business partnership to call center owners, media buyers, and telemarketers.

Your pitch is simple: "You already produce debt settlement calls. I'll pay you more than you're getting now. Here's a tracking number. Send your calls here. You get paid weekly."

What you do every day: Find call producers on industry forums,
 groups, freelance platforms, and LinkedIn. Message them. Pitch the offer. Handle objections. Close the deal. Onboard them. Then find the next one. Repeat.

This is not a VA role. This is not admin work. This is not data entry. If you are a closer who has pitched business deals, recruited vendors, or built partnerships — this is your job.

What makes you a fit:

— You have pitched businesses on working WITH you, not buying FROM you

— You can send 20+ cold messages a day without burning out

— You can handle rejection and keep going

— You have experience in outbound B2B sales, recruitment, vendor sourcing, or affiliate/performance marketing

— You can write a message that makes a busy person respond

What you get:

— $2,500/month base for 20 hours/week

— $50 bonus for every new partner you bring on who produces approved calls

— A long-term role that scales as the business grows into new verticals

— Simple, clear work with one goal: fill the pipeline with call partners

To apply, do this one thing: Go to 
 or 
 right now. Search for someone who is advertising that they produce debt settlement calls or warm transfers. Send me their profile link and the exact message you would send them to pitch my offer. If you can't find one or won't try, this isn't the right role for you.

Wage/Salary: $2,500/month + $50 bonus per partner onboarded

Desired No. of Hours Per Week: 20

Business or Contact Name: Ben Horch

Skills: Outbound Sales, Telemarketing, Lead Generation

description:
We are a growing Australian business in the home fragrance category operating across retail and e-commerce channels. Our products include home fragrance and personal care items sold to customers in Australia and internationally.



We are looking for a mid-level Graphic Designer & Video Editor with a solid foundation in design principles and experience creating high-quality creative across digital and retail environments.



Role Overview: This is a full-time contract role (40 hours per week), fully remote and aligned with Australian Eastern Standard Time (AEST). You will be responsible for producing high-quality visual and video content for paid media, website, marketplaces, and retail use. This role is suited to someone who understands design systems, hierarchy, layout, typography, and brand consistency.



Key Responsibilities

• Edit short-form video content for paid social (Meta, TikTok and other platforms)

• Design high-performing static creatives for digital advertising and EDMs.

• Create multiple variations of ads for testing and optimisation

• Develop PDP (product detail page) assets for Shopify and other e-commerce platforms

• Create and optimise product listings for Amazon and other marketplaces

• Design POS and retail assets including packaging, in-store displays and collateral

• Apply brand guidelines consistently across all outputs

• Work closely with the marketing team to execute campaigns and creative briefs

• Deliver high-quality work with fast turnaround times



Required Experience

• 2+ years experience in graphic design and video editing (agency or e-commerce ideal)

• Strong understanding of design fundamentals (layout, hierarchy, typography, spacing, visual balance)

• Proven ability to follow and apply brand guidelines across multiple formats

• Proficiency in tools such as Adobe Photoshop, Illustrator, Premiere Pro, Canva, Figma and CapCut

• Experience using AI creative tools (e.g. Kive, Nanobanana, Midjourney or similar) to enhance creative output, generate concepts, and improve workflow efficiency

• Experience creating content for e-commerce brands

• Experience designing for paid social media (Meta, TikTok etc.)

• Experience creating PDP assets and marketplace listings (Shopify, Amazon or similar)

• High attention to detail and strong quality control

• Ability to manage workload and meet deadlines in a fast-paced environment

• Strong English communication skills



Contract Structure

This contract will commence with an initial three-month engagement. This allows both parties to ensure a strong fit. For the right candidate, there is strong potential for the contract to continue beyond this period.



Application Instructions

To apply, please begin your application with:

Creative Specialist

Then include:

• A link to your portfolio and resume (applications without this will not be reviewed)

• Confirmation you can work during AEST business hours

Shortlisted candidates will complete a short practical design task.

title: WordPress Developer (Fullstack): $7 to $9 per hour
description:
We are a web design and digital marketing company in the US. We are looking for Full-Stack WordPress Developers with over 5+ years of experience to join our growing team of freelancers and help us build, customize, and integrate features that enhance our websites, platform performance, and capabilities. This position may lead to a full-time role.



IMPORTANT: Please provide a list of at least 10 WordPress websites that you have built on your own.



Job Responsibilities:

+ Develop and create custom WordPress plugins from scratch based on specific project needs.

+ Customize existing plugins to extend functionality and tailor solutions.

+ Work with WordPress themes to modify and customize design and layout elements, ensuring responsiveness and user-friendliness.

+ Manage other freelance developers to complete website development projects.

+ Oxygen page builder customization and integration to streamline page designs and user experiences.

+ Integration and management of APIs to connect with third-party services and platforms.

+ ChatGPT integration to create AI-powered features and enhance user interaction across the platform.

+ Collaborate with the design, marketing, and backend teams to ensure seamless integration of new features and updates.

+ Ensure website performance, scalability, security, and overall user experience are optimized.



Key Qualifications:

+ Proven experience in full stack WordPress development.

+ Proficient in PHP, JavaScript, HTML, CSS, and other relevant web technologies.

+ Expertise in plugin and theme development and customization.

+ Experience with Oxygen Builder is a Plus

+ Experience with Elementor Builder is a Plus

+ Strong understanding of APIs and RESTful services.

+ Experience with ChatGPT API integration and other AI tools is a plus.

+ Familiarity with database management (MySQL) and performance optimization.

+ Strong problem-solving skills and the ability to work independently or as part of a team.

+ Attention to detail, ensuring high-quality code and user experience.

+ Basic Knowledge of SEO best practices is a plus.



PLEASE READ THIS CAREFULLY:

Please Do Not submit your application unless and until you read and follow all of these instructions. This is Your First Test to see if you can understand and follow directions. You will Not be considered for this position if you do not follow all of these instructions.



When you respond, please be sure to include the subject headline "I HAVE READ YOUR Full Stack WP Post" Do not put anything else in the subject line.



Also, when you first send us your message, you MUST state at the beginning, such as "My favorite site is WordPress Native" Do not put this in the subject line. Please put it at the beginning of your message to us.



IMPORTANT: In your message, please provide a short paragraph explaining why you're the best candidate for this position. And provide your company website for review.



Do NOT contact us directly. Until we permit you, all communications will go through OnlineJobs.ph



YOU MUST FOLLOW ALL OF THESE INSTRUCTIONS PRECISELY. WE ARE LOOKING TO SEE IF YOU CAN FOLLOW INSTRUCTIONS.



We will Not consider you if you can Not follow ALL of these instructions. Why? You may ask.



We figure that if you can't follow instructions before you start working with us, how will you be able to follow them after you start working for us?



Thank you for reading our ad, and we wish you all the best!





Regards,





Phong (Peter) Nguyen.

title: Accountant
description:
We are an Australian financial advisory company seeking a highly capable Offshore Accountant to support our accounting operations. We are looking for someone with solid Australian company experience, strong attention to detail, and advanced hands-on experience using Xero platform. 



This role is ideal for an accountant who is confident working independently, understand Australian business and tax processes, and can deliver accurate, timely, and insightful financial support. 



Key Responsibilities: 

- Structure, manage, and track client or business rebates. 

- Process employee payments, including monthly and fortnightly payroll support. 

- Manage cash flow monitoring and reporting. 

- Perform bank reconciliations and general account reconciliation. 

- Support and coordinate audit requirements and documentation. 

- Manage Accounts Payable and Accounts Receivable processes. 

- Assist with budgeting and forecasting activities. 

- Prepare management reports and provide financial insights. 

- Liaise with internal stakeholders and external parties on tax-related matters. 

- Maintain accurate financial records and ensure timely processing of transactions. 

- Identify process improvements to enhance finance efficiency and accuracy. 



Required Experience and Skills: 

- Proven experience working with Australian companies or within an Australian accounting/finance environment. 

- Strong practical experience using Xero, including reconciliations, AP/AR, reporting, and general ledger management. 

- Experience in payroll processing, including monthly and fortnightly payment cycles. 

- Solid understanding of core accounting processes, including reconciliations, cash flow, payables, and receivables. 

- Experience supporting audits and preparing finance-related documentation. 

- Good understanding of Australian business and finance practices. 

- Strong analytical skills and attention to detail. 

- Excellent written and verbal English communication skills. 

- Ability to work remotely, manage deadlines, and maintain confidentiality. 



Preferred Qualifications: 

- Experience in a professional services, financial advisory, accounting, or similar Australian business environment. 

- Exposure to Australian tax or compliance-related processes. 

- Accounting qualification, bookkeeping certification, or equivalent relevant experience. 

- Ability to provide financial insights beyond transactional processing. 



What We Are Looking For: 

- Reliable, proactive, and organised. 

- Comfortable working with an Australian team and Australian business standards. 

- Able to take ownership of finance tasks with minimal supervision. 

- Process-driven, accurate, and committed to meeting deadlines.

title: Account Manager & Growth Coordinator
description:
About Concierge Drop



Concierge Drop is a fast-growing premium, on-demand home services company based in New York City. We partner with luxury residential buildings to offer residents door-to-door dry cleaning, laundry, home cleaning and more, all booked online and fulfilled by our vetted local vendor network.



We currently operate across 130+ buildings in NYC and are scaling toward city-wide coverage. We’re a small, fast-moving team - if you like ownership, variety and working directly with a founder, this is the right role.



The Role:



We’re looking for an exceptionally organized Account Manager & Growth Coordinator to own the health and growth of our building portfolio. You’ll be the day-to-day point of contact for our property managers across NYC, track account performance, coordinate resident events and marketing campaigns and make sure nothing falls through the cracks.



You’ll work from a structured Google Sheets workspace with a clear daily task queue and use HubSpot for all outreach. No technical or coding skills required, but extreme organization, excellent written English, and genuine follow-through are non-negotiable.



As Concierge Drop grows, this role grows with it. If you have a background in marketing, PPC, or social media, there’s additional scope to take on resident-facing campaigns and growth initiatives beyond account management.



What You’ll Do:



Account Health: Your #1 priority:

- Monitor a portfolio of 130+ NYC residential buildings using our tracking dashboard

- Flag buildings with declining order rates, missed follow-ups or overdue invoices before they become problems

- Ensure no building goes more than 30 days without meaningful contact



Property Manager Relationships:

- Own the contact log for every property manager - calls,
s, follow-up dates, relationship status

- Send warm check-in
s, schedule calls and keep relationships active and healthy

- Log every interaction in Google Sheets and HubSpot with clear notes and next steps



Resident Events & Engagement:

- Coordinate lobby pop-ups, door drops and resident events with property managers

- Track event history across all buildings and flag accounts overdue for activation (target: every 5–6 months)

- Draft resident-facing
s and SMS campaigns in HubSpot to drive bookings



Campaign & Promotion Tracking:

- Log all outreach campaigns, promo codes, and activations in our Campaign Log

- Track order volume before and after each campaign to measure what’s working

- Suggest simple, cost-effective promotions based on building performance data



Day-to-Day Operations:

- Maintain bag stock levels across buildings and flag restock needs

- Manage the staff referral program (track progress and coordinate gift card payouts)

- Update the Building Health Dashboard weekly so the team always has a live picture



Marketing & Growth (bonus scope):

- If you have marketing experience: assist with Google/Meta PPC campaigns targeting NYC residential buildings

- Help build and manage social media content that supports resident awareness and brand growth

- Identify and execute low-cost marketing plays to drive new resident signups at existing buildings





You’re the Right Person If You…



- Are obsessively organized - you live by your task list, nothing slips, and you follow up without being reminded

- Write excellent, professional English - your
s go directly to NYC property managers and need to reflect well on our brand

- Have experience managing client or account relationships in any industry

- Are comfortable with HubSpot or a similar CRM for contact management and
 outreach

- Know your way around Google Sheets — not a developer, but confident and capable

- Are proactive by default — you see what needs to be done and do it

- Can work independently with minimal hand-holding

- Have some availability overlap with US Eastern Time



Bonus Points If You Have: 

- Experience running Google Ads, Meta Ads, or any PPC campaigns

- Social media management background (content creation, scheduling, engagement)

-
 marketing experience beyond basic sending — sequences, segmentation, A/B testing

- Background in property management, real estate, or hospitality

- Experience coordinating in-person events or activations



What We Offer:

- Remote, part-time role (~20 hours/week to start)

- Compensation discussed with shortlisted candidates based on experience and scope

- Direct working relationship with the founder of a growing NYC startup

- Clear daily workflows; you’ll always know what to focus on

- Real ownership over a key part of the business. Your work directly drives revenue

- Opportunity to grow into a broader marketing and growth role as the company scales



To Apply:

We read every application personally. To be considered, please include all four of the following - applications missing any item will not be reviewed:



1. A short intro (3–5 sentences): who you are, where you’re based and why this role is a good fit for you right now

2. A specific example of a time you managed client relationships or kept a complex, multi-track project organized - what was the situation, what did you do, what was the outcome

3. Your availability: approximate hours per week and your timezone / overlap with US Eastern Time

4. Your tool experience: Briefly describe your experience with HubSpot (or similar CRM) and Google Sheets. If you have any PPC, social media, or
 marketing experience, mention that here too



Concierge Drop is an equal opportunity employer. We hire based on skill, follow-through, and fit.

title: Community Engagement Specialist – Real Estate Forums (Reddit & BiggerPockets)
description:
About Us

DealScore is a real estate deal analysis tool that helps house flippers and investors calculate ARV (After Repair Value) and construction costs by zip code. We have a freemium model with a growing user base and we need help getting the word out in the communities where our users spend their time.



The Role

You'll be our voice in online real estate investing communities — primarily Reddit and BiggerPockets. Your job is to monitor relevant threads, provide genuinely helpful answers to investor questions, and naturally introduce DealScore when it's relevant. This is NOT spamming links or copy-pasting sales pitches. Think of it as being the most helpful person in the room who happens to know about a great tool.



What You'll Do Every Day (1–2 hours/day, 5 days/week)

Monitor 3–5 subreddits and BiggerPockets forums for relevant threads using keyword alerts

Draft and post 3–5 thoughtful, authentic replies per day

Post 1 original thread per week (deal analysis, tip, or discussion question)

Track all activity in a shared Google Sheet

Send a weekly summary report every Friday



You'll Create Your Own Accounts

You will create fresh Reddit and BiggerPockets accounts for this role (not your personal accounts). You'll need to build karma and credibility naturally in the first week before engaging on behalf of DealScore. We'll provide a full onboarding playbook with tone guidelines, example replies, and a list of keywords to monitor.



Must-Haves

Strong English writing skills — conversational, not corporate

Familiarity with Reddit (you understand karma, subreddit rules, and community culture)

Ability to write responses that sound like a real person, not a marketer

Self-directed and consistent — you'll work independently with weekly check-ins

Reliable internet and available during US business hours (at least partial overlap with EST)



Nice-to-Haves (Not Required)

Familiarity with real estate investing concepts (ARV, rehab costs, flipping)

Experience with BiggerPockets forums

Previous community management or forum engagement experience

Experience using keyword monitoring tools (F5Bot, etc.)



First Two Weeks

Week 1 is an approval period — you'll draft replies and I'll review before you post. Week 2 shifts to independent posting with spot-checks. Full onboarding playbook provided on Day 1.

Compensation

$300–400/month depending on experience, paid monthly. Bonus opportunity: per-referral bonus for tracked paid signups from your engagement.



To Apply

Please include in your application:

A short paragraph about any experience you have with Reddit or online forums

A sample reply to this thread: "First time flipper — how do I figure out what a house will be worth after I renovate it?"

Your Reddit username if you have one (not required, but helpful)



Note: If you don't know much about real estate investing yet, that's okay — we'll train you. What matters most is your writing quality and understanding of how online communities work.

title: Kickstart Your Career: Outreach Specialist  — Full-Time — 20+ Benefits
description:
We are looking for an Outreach Specialist who can help us enhance our online presence and boost organic search visibility. In this role, you will build and nurture relationships with web admins through strategic and creative outreach activities. This position requires a keen eye for detail, strong practical judgment, problem-solving abilities, excellent communication skills, and a methodical approach to our link-building efforts.

 

Key Responsibilities:

-Qualify websites and identify backlink opportunities from high-ranking, authoritative websites.

-Reach out to bloggers and website owners, acquire guest post placements, and perform necessary outreach.

-Develop and execute creative strategies to acquire backlinks to positively impact organic search visibility.

-Analyze and ensure a healthy backlink profile.

-Generate new content ideas based on the competitive landscape.

-Assign article topics and work with our content team to create engaging content.

-Analyze competitor backlinks.

-Stay current on the latest updates on link building and SEO trends.



Qualifications And Skills:

-Prior experience in the same role

-In-depth knowledge of guest posting and resource link-building strategies

-Proficiency with industry-standard tools such as Majestic, Semrush, Ahrefs, Moz, and Buzzstream

-Working knowledge of Google Suite (Gmail, Docs, Sheets)

-Strong ability to analyze datasets, identify key trends, and derive actionable insights to improve outreach strategies

-Exceptional attention to detail

-Self-starter who can work independently and manage time effectively

-Excellent written and verbal communication skills

-Genuine passion for digital marketing

-Willingness to share new ideas and contribute to the continuous improvement of outreach strategies

-Hard-working team player with a collaborative mindset



Basic Requirements:

-Device Specifications: Intel i5 processor or higher with a minimum of 8GB RAM

-Equipment: Webcam, speakers, and a microphone or headphones

-Internet Speed: Minimum of 100Mbps with a backup connection for outages



Work Details:

Working Hours: Monday to Friday, 9 AM to 5:30 PM Pacific Standard Time | Tuesday to Saturday, 12 AM to 8:30 AM Manila Time

Location: Anywhere in the Philippines



Why Join Us?

-Stable employment

-Competitive salary

-Bi-monthly salary

-A-Z benefits, including bonuses and annual raises

-Work-life balance 

-Work-from-home opportunity



*** The company uses a time tracker and maintains a virtual office setup via Google Meet.





For interested applicants kindly send your CV to 



(Note: DO NOT SEND YOUR APPLICATION through our websites or social media platforms. FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THIS INSTRUCTION may result in DISQUALIFICATION)

title: Expert SEO Specialist •  High-Impact Campaigns •  20+ Benefits & Bonuses
description:
Our prominent injury law firm in California is looking for an SEO Specialist. Would you be interested?



We’re seeking an SEO Coordinator to join our dynamic team in the legal industry. The ideal candidate will be passionate about utilizing search engine optimization techniques to improve conversions, traffic, and brand revenue. You will work closely with our content marketing and development teams to implement the organic strategy and play a key role in identifying new opportunities to improve organic performance. This position requires excellent organizational and problem-solving skills, a curiosity to learn, and solid communication, interpersonal, and collaboration skills.



-Develop optimization strategies that increase the company’s website search engine results from rankings.

-Execute tests, collect and analyze data and results, and identify trends and insights to achieve maximum ROI.

-Closely collaborate with the web development team to ensure SEO best practices are followed adequately throughout the website content.

-Work with editorial and marketing teams to drive SEO in content creation and marketing.

-Take responsibility for page optimization for search engine marketing.

-Perform ongoing keyword research, discovery, and optimization for new relevant keywords to use throughout the company website and marketing materials.

-Research and implement search engine optimization recommendations

-Create and execute a link-building strategy.

-Change website architecture, content, linking, and other factors to improve SEO positions for target keywords

-Determine measurable goals that demonstrate improvement in marketing efforts.

-Monitor daily performance metrics with SEO tools like Google Analytics to understand SEO strategy performance.

-Collaborate with others within the marketing department to manage SEO strategy.

-Write compelling and high-quality website content, including blog posts and page descriptions, to improve website search results.



*** The company uses a time tracker and maintains a virtual office setup via Google Meet.



We offer:

-Graveyard shift (From Tuesday to Saturday | 12:00 AM-8:30 AM Manila Time)

-Competitive and bi-weekly salary

-15+ company benefits, including annual raises and bonuses.



For interested applicants kindly send your CV to 



(Note: DO NOT SEND YOUR APPLICATION through our websites or social media platforms. FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THIS INSTRUCTION may result in DISQUALIFICATION)

title: Customer Support

title: WFH WordPress Developer
description:
Job description:

This is a 100% work from home remote position.

This is an independent contractor position working for a US company.

It is expected that you have your own computer and internet connection.

There is no guarantee of hours, this is at an as-needed basis.



Job Summary:

We’re seeking a WordPress PHP Developer to assist with troubleshooting complex site issues and building or maintaining custom plugins. In this role, you’ll work directly with the owner to understand project requirements and translate them into reliable, well-documented code that aligns with WordPress best practices.



You should be comfortable diving into both frontend and backend issues, debugging plugin conflicts, customizing themes, and extending WordPress functionality through custom development. Tasks may include plugin development from scratch, modifying existing plugins, resolving performance issues, and implementing third-party integrations as needed.



Strong attention to detail is a must.



Responsibilities:

Develop, customize, and maintain WordPress plugins and themes using PHP, HTML, CSS, and JavaScript.

Collaborate with project managers and end-users to gather and understand functional requirements for site features and plugin behavior.

Troubleshoot and resolve technical issues related to WordPress performance, plugin conflicts, and frontend/backend errors.

Stay up-to-date with the latest WordPress core updates, plugin standards, and development best practices, suggesting improvements where needed.

Integrate WordPress with third-party APIs and external services.

Work closely with other developers and tea
mbers on broader site architecture and performance improvements.

Create and maintain documentation for custom code, plugin configurations, and development workflows.

title: Founding Sales Executive (US Market, Remote)
description:
Schedule: Full-time contractor, with working hours overlapping US time zones (Pacific to Eastern)

Pay: Weekly

Compensation: Performance-based with scaling base pay, commissions, and bonuses



About

We provide premium managed WordPress services for US-based businesses. Our core services include managed WordPress hosting, maintenance, performance optimization, and managed local SEO. We also offer WordPress support, development, and design services.



We are a small but growing company focused on delivering a polished, premium client experience. Our approach is rooted in empathy. We take the time to understand the problems clients are facing and provide practical, high-quality solutions that genuinely help.



We are now hiring a Founding Sales Executive to build our outbound sales motion from the ground up.



The Role

This is not a plug-and-play sales job. We do not have an existing outbound sales machine for you to step into. We are looking for someone who wants to take ownership of sales like an entrepreneur would. You will be responsible for building and executing your own outreach strategy, identifying target markets, starting conversations, qualifying leads, following up, and closing new business.



You will have the freedom to do what you do best. We will provide the core tools you need, including an
 address, outbound
 system, phone system, and reasonable tool support as needed. Early on, you will work closely with the owner to get aligned and supported. Over time, the expectation is that you will operate independently and own the sales process. This role is ideal for someone who is self-directed, resourceful, highly motivated by performance-based earnings, and excited by the idea of building something from scratch.



Responsibilities

Creating and executing your own outbound sales strategy

Identifying industries, niches, and ideal customer profiles to target

Prospecting and generating leads through cold
, cold calling, and other outbound methods

Starting conversations with US-based business owners and decision-makers

Qualifying opportunities and moving them through the sales process

Collaborating with the owner on quotes and proposals until you are comfortable scoping accurately

Closing new recurring service clients and one-time project work

Maintaining a professional, respectful sales approach with no pushy tactics



What You Will Not Be Responsible For

Account management after the sale

Ongoing client delivery

Internal CRM/reporting setup and system administration



What We’re Looking For

B2B sales experience

Strong experience or confidence in outbound sales

Excellent spoken and written English

Comfortable speaking with US-based prospects by phone and
 in a professional, polished way

Able to work during hours that overlap with US time zones, especially Pacific through Eastern

Self-starter who does not need constant direction

Organized, disciplined, and results-focused

Comfortable helping shape target market strategy instead of waiting for a script

Experience selling digital services such as SEO, web development, hosting, maintenance, or similar services is strongly preferred



Compensation

This role is designed to reward new business creation clearly and aggressively, while keeping compensation simple, transparent, and tied to performance



Currency and Conversion

Our client revenue is primarily billed in USD, so sales goals are measured in USD. Compensation is paid in PHP as much as possible.



For commission payouts tied to USD revenue:

payout amounts are calculated from the USD value of the business closed

then converted and paid in PHP

all PHP commission examples below are approximate and subject to exchange-rate changes at the time of payout



For planning examples below, a simple reference rate of 55 PHP = 1 USD is used.



Base Pay

Ramp base: 15,000 PHP per month for the first full quarter

Once the rep meets the standard first-quarter goal of $2,500 USD in new MRR, base pay increases to 30,000 PHP per month starting the following quarter

If the rep does not yet meet the first-quarter goal, ramp base remains in place until that quarterly goal is achieved



Managed Service Commission

For new recurring service clients you personally source and close:



25% of the first month’s MRR after the client’s first payment clears

25% of the first month’s MRR after the client remains active for 60 days



This means total commission on recurring services is equal to 50% of the first month’s MRR, paid in two parts.



Example:

If you close $2,000 USD in MRR, total commission would be approximately 55,000 PHP, paid as:



27,500 PHP after first payment clears

27,500 PHP after 60 days active



Actual PHP amounts remain subject to exchange-rate conversion at payout.



Project Commission

For one-time or hourly work such as design, development, or support:



10% of collected revenue, converted and paid in PHP



Monthly MRR Sales Goals and Bonuses

Bonuses are tied to new recurring revenue closed during the month.



Standard monthly goal: $1,500 USD in new MRR

Bonus: 10,000 PHP

Performance target: $2,000 USD in new MRR

Additional bonus: 15,000 PHP

Total bonus at $2,000 = 25,000 PHP

High-performance tier: $2,500 USD in new MRR

Additional bonus: 10,000 PHP

Total bonus at $2,500 = 35,000 PHP

Top-performance tier: $3,000 USD in new MRR

Additional bonus: 10,000 PHP

Total bonus at $3,000 = 45,000 PHP

Above $3,000 USD in new MRR:

Additional 7,500 PHP for every extra $500 USD in new MRR during that month



Monthly bonus examples

$1,500 new MRR = 10,000 PHP

$2,000 new MRR = 25,000 PHP

$2,500 new MRR = 35,000 PHP

$3,000 new MRR = 45,000 PHP

$3,500 new MRR = 52,500 PHP

$4,000 new MRR = 60,000 PHP

Quarterly MRR Sales Goals and Bonuses



Quarterly bonuses are tied to total new recurring revenue closed during the quarter.



Standard quarterly goal: $4,500 USD in new MRR

Bonus: 25,000 PHP

Performance quarterly target: $6,000 USD in new MRR

Additional bonus: 20,000 PHP

Total bonus at $6,000 = 45,000 PHP

High-performance quarterly target: $7,500 USD in new MRR

Additional bonus: 20,000 PHP

Total bonus at $7,500 = 65,000 PHP

Top-performance quarterly target: $9,000 USD in new MRR

Additional bonus: 20,000 PHP

Total bonus at $9,000 = 85,000 PHP

Above $9,000 USD in new MRR for the quarter:

Additional 15,000 PHP for every extra $1,500 USD in new MRR



Quarterly bonus examples

$4,500 quarterly new MRR = 25,000 PHP

$6,000 quarterly new MRR = 45,000 PHP

$7,500 quarterly new MRR = 65,000 PHP

$9,000 quarterly new MRR = 85,000 PHP

$10,500 quarterly new MRR = 100,000 PHP



Example Earnings: Rep Closes $2,000 USD in New MRR Per Month

Here is a simple example of what earnings could look like for a rep who consistently closes $2,000 USD in new MRR each month.



Assumptions:

reference conversion rate is 55 PHP = 1 USD

all clients remain active long enough for the 60-day commission release

this example does not include one-time project commissions



First Quarter

The rep closes:



Month 1: $2,000 new MRR

Month 2: $2,000 new MRR

Month 3: $2,000 new MRR



Total for the quarter:

$6,000 USD in new MRR

This exceeds the standard first-quarter goal and qualifies the rep for the higher ongoing base pay starting the next quarter



Month 1

Base pay: 15,000 PHP

Monthly bonus for hitting $2,000 new MRR: 25,000 PHP

First commission payment on $2,000 MRR: 27,500 PHP



Total Month 1 earnings: approximately 67,500 PHP



Month 2

Base pay: 15,000 PHP

Monthly bonus for hitting $2,000 new MRR: 25,000 PHP

First commission payment on $2,000 MRR: 27,500 PHP



Total Month 2 earnings: approximately 67,500 PHP



Month 3

Base pay: 15,000 PHP

Monthly bonus for hitting $2,000 new MRR: 25,000 PHP

First commission payment on Month 3’s $2,000 MRR: 27,500 PHP

60-day retained commission from Month 1’s deal: 27,500 PHP



Total Month 3 earnings: approximately 95,000 PHP



Quarterly Bonus

Because the rep closed $6,000 USD in new MRR for the quarter, they earn:



25,000 PHP for hitting the quarterly goal of $4,500

20,000 PHP additional for hitting the quarterly target of $6,000



Total quarterly bonus: 45,000 PHP



First-Quarter Earnings Summary

For a rep who closes $2,000 USD in new MRR each month in the first quarter:



Month 1 earnings: 67,500 PHP

Month 2 earnings: 67,500 PHP

Month 3 earnings: 95,000 PHP

Quarterly bonus: 45,000 PHP



Total paid during the quarter: approximately 275,000 PHP



In addition, there would still be future retained commission releases from:



Month 2 deal: 27,500 PHP

Month 3 deal: 27,500 PHP



Additional commission scheduled after quarter-end: approximately 55,000 PHP, assuming those clients remain active through the 60-day mark.



Ongoing Earnings After Ramp



Because the rep met the first-quarter goal, base pay increases to 30,000 PHP per month starting in the next quarter.



If the rep continues closing $2,000 USD in new MRR per month, a normal month after ramp would look like:



Base pay: 30,000 PHP

Monthly bonus: 25,000 PHP

First commission payment on current month’s deal: 27,500 PHP

Retained commission from deals closed 60 days earlier: 27,500 PHP



Typical ongoing monthly earnings after ramp: approximately 110,000 PHP, plus quarterly bonuses when earned.



Note: All USD-based commission amounts are converted and paid in PHP using the company’s standard exchange rate at the time of payout.



Tools and Support

We will provide:

Company
 address

Outbound
 system

Phone system

Reasonable support for additional tools, subject to discussion and feasibility



Work Environment Requirements

Reliable computer

Quality headset

Stable internet connection

Quiet, professional work environment



How We Sell

Our approach is simple: be helpful, be clear, and do not be pushy. We are not interested in aggressive or high-pressure sales tactics. There are more than enough businesses in the US to target. If someone is not interested, we move on professionally. We want someone who can sell with confidence and empathy, without becoming transactional or forceful.



Why This Role Is Different

This is a founding sales role. You will not be one of many people on a large sales team. You will be one of the first people shaping how sales works inside the business. If you want autonomy, ownership, performance-based upside, and the chance to help build a real growth engine from the ground up, this role is for you.

title: Graphic Designer
description:
Freelance Graphic Designer Wanted — Multi-Brand, Ongoing Work



Hi! I'm looking for a talented, experienced graphic designer who's excited to work across multiple brands in a variety of industries. If you love creative variety and want a steady stream of interesting projects, keep reading — this might be perfect for you.





ABOUT THE WORK



I work with clients across different industries, helping them build and maintain a strong digital presence. Projects vary, but typically include:



• Social media graphics & templates

• Flyers and marketing collateral

• Website layout designs (not required, but nice to have this experience)

• Trade show booth graphics

• Business cards &
 signatures

• Sales deck updates



Consistency across each client's brand is everything — so an eye for detail and the ability to work within existing brand guidelines is a must. I have a consistent flow of work now, with more clients coming on regularly, so there's real opportunity for an ongoing working relationship.



About Visionary Advantages:

We're a brand studio and marketing agency working with entrepreneurs and growing businesses across multiple industries globally. From brand identity and web design to social media and packaging, we help our clients build distinctive, lasting brands. As our client roster grows, so does our team — and we're looking for creative collaborators who want to grow with us.





WHAT I'M LOOKING FOR



• Proficiency in Adobe Suite (Photoshop, Illustrator, etc.) — required

• A strong, varied portfolio showing real client work

• Ability to manage multiple projects and brands at once

• Clear communicator who meets deadlines

• Flexible availability (bonus points if you can hop on a call during US EST hours when needed every once in a while)



This is a freelance position with flexible hours. Work volume will vary by week, but we do have a reliable, ongoing flow of projects.



HOW TO APPLY



Please send the following to 



1. Write exactly 2 paragraphs about yourself — your experience and why you're the right fit (no more, no less)

2. Links to your portfolio or past work samples — applications without examples will not be considered

3. Make the Subject line of your
 say: Design Expert



Looking forward to seeing your work!

title: Social Media & GoHighLevel Marketing Virtual Assistant

You will research and build itineraries in Travel CRM.



This is not a basic posting job. We are looking for someone who understands structure, systems, and data.



Core Responsibilities:

Social Media Management 
, Instagram, TikTok)

GoHighLevel (GHL) Support:

 campaigns

Must be comfortable navigating GHL independently.



Canva Design:

title: Sales & Growth Representative (Airbnb Management)
description:
We are looking for a high-energy, persuasive Sales Representative to help scale our Airbnb management portfolio. Your primary goal is to identify property owners, pitch our management services, and convert them into long-term partners. You won't just be answering phones; you will be the "engine" of our company’s growth.



Key Responsibilities



Lead Generation: Cold call list of leads to find property owners who may be interested listing their property on Airbnb and other rental platforms to improve their ROI on rental properties.



    Outbound Prospecting: Cold calling,
ing, and messaging potential clients to set up discovery calls.



    Follow-up: Managing a CRM pipeline to ensure no lead goes cold.



    Onboarding Support: Assisting the owner through the initial contract phase before handing them off to operations.



### What We Are Looking For



    Experience: At least 1–2 years in Sales, Real Estate, or SaaS (Cold calling experience is a huge plus).



    Communication: Exceptional verbal and written English. You should be able to build rapport instantly.



    Tech Savvy: Familiarity with CRM tools like Lofty/Chime and WhatsApp/Slack.



    Knowledge: A basic understanding of how Airbnb/Short-Term Rentals work.



    The "Hustle": You are motivated by targets and don't get discouraged by the word "No."



### Compensation & Benefits



    Base Salary: $100/month



    Commission: $100 - $1000 per signed property contract depending on size of the property



    Growth: Opportunity to move into a Sales Manager role as we expand.





***IN ORDER TO RECEIVE A FOLLOW UP PLEASE INCLUDE AUDIO RECORDING OF YOUR VOICE WITH INTRODUCTION***

title: Reservations Specialist
description:
MUST HAVE EXPERIENCE WITH AIRBNB AND SHORT TERM RENTALS - DO NOT APPLY IF YOU DON'T HAVE EXPERIENCE



Answering Messages from Guests: This involves promptly responding to inquiries, requests, and concerns from guests via various communication channels like airbnb, vrbo, booking.com and hospitable



Ensuring Daily Operations Run Smoothly: This includes overseeing tasks such as check-ins and check-outs, managing reservations, coordinating with housekeeping and maintenance staff, and addressing any issues that arise during the day.



Monitoring Security Cameras: Keeping an eye on security cameras helps ensure the safety and security of guests and the property. This duty may involve identifying and addressing any security concerns or incidents that occur.



Following Up with Inquiries: After initial guest inquiries, following up to provide additional information, answer questions, or assist with booking arrangements can help convert inquiries into reservations.



Maximizing Revenue: This involves implementing strategies to increase occupancy rates, upsell services or amenities, adjust pricing based on demand, and optimize revenue streams.



Creating New Listings: Developing appealing listings for properties on various booking platforms, including writing compelling descriptions, selecting attractive photos, and setting accurate pricing and availability.



Updating Listing Information: Keeping property listings up-to-date with accurate information regarding amenities, policies, availability, and pricing to ensure potential guests have the most current and relevant details.



Coordinating with Ground Team: Collaborating with cleaning and maintenance staff to ensure properties are well-maintained, cleaned, and prepared for guests' arrivals.



This role requires strong communication, organizational, and problem-solving skills, as well as the ability to multitask and prioritize effectively to meet the needs of both guests and the property.

title: Experienced Shopify Expert Needed for Store Build, Optimization, and Ongoing Support
description:
Experienced Shopify Expert Needed for Store Build, Optimization, and Ongoing Support



We are an e-commerce business looking for a highly experienced Shopify expert to help build, optimize, troubleshoot, and maintain our Shopify store.



We already have general development support in place, but we are looking for a dedicated Shopify specialist with deeper platform expertise. We want someone who truly knows Shopify inside and out and can help us build things correctly, solve problems quickly, and improve overall store performance and functionality.



This role will begin on a project/gig basis, but for the right person it can turn into steady, long-term work.



What we need help with:



Shopify store setup, rebuilds, and structural improvements

Theme edits and customization

Liquid, HTML, CSS, and JavaScript changes as needed

App setup, integration, and troubleshooting

Resolving bugs, conflicts, and broken functionality

Cart, checkout, shipping, tax, payment, and discount setup

Speed and performance optimization

QA testing to ensure everything works properly across the store

Connecting and configuring tools such as
, SMS, reviews, upsells, analytics, and tracking pixels

Ongoing Shopify maintenance and support as needed



You are a strong fit if you:



Have significant hands-on Shopify experience

Can troubleshoot issues efficiently and recommend the right solution

Understand both technical execution and the practical needs of an e-commerce business

Communicate clearly and professionally

Are dependable, organized, and detail-oriented

Can work carefully inside an existing store without creating new problems

Can explain what you changed, why you changed it, and what results to expect



Important: Please apply honestly.



We have hired for Shopify work before, and we can usually tell very quickly who truly has expert-level experience and who does not. If your background is overstated, or if you are still at a beginner or intermediate level, it will become clear early in the process.



We are specifically looking for someone with real, proven Shopify expertise — someone who understands how to build, manage, troubleshoot, and improve Shopify stores at a high level. This is not the right fit for someone who has only worked on a few simple stores or assisted in a limited role.



If you are a genuine Shopify expert, we would be glad to speak with you. If not, please do not apply.



To apply, please send the following:



Your resume

Links to Shopify stores or projects you have worked on

A brief explanation of exactly what you did on each project

Examples of projects you are currently working on, if applicable

Which areas of Shopify you are strongest in

themes

custom coding

troubleshooting

app integrations

speed optimization

store setup

other relevant specialties

Your current availability and typical turnaround time

Your usual hourly rate based on your experience and profile

A short note explaining why you believe you are a strong fit for this role



We are looking for someone reliable we can continue working with as needs come up. For the right person, this can become an ongoing long-term opportunity.



To show that you read this post carefully, please put SHOPIFY PRO at the top of your application.



Best regards,

Eric

 and/or SMS follow-up automation

International travelers from visa-friendly countries such as Australia and Singapore.

To apply:

Project Type:

One-time project (with potential for ongoing work)

Budget:

$300–$600 depending on experience and quality

We are looking for someone who understands SALES and CONVERSION, not just design.

description:

We're a wedding photography and videography studio based in New York (RF Studios) looking for a talented video editor to join our remote team on a per-project basis.

You'll be responsible for editing wedding footage into polished, emotional highlight videos (typically 3–6 minutes), full documentary-style films (15 minutes - 2 hours), and short social media cuts for Instagram Reels and TikTok. Raw footage will be organized and delivered to you via shared drive. You'll deliver finished files according to our templates and style guide.

Wedding highlight reels (cinematic, music-driven, emotionally paced)

Full documentary-style wedding films (ceremony, speeches, reception)

Social media content from wedding footage (30–90 second vertical cuts)

Proficient in Premiere Pro or DaVinci Resolve (Mainly Premiere Pro)

Strong color grading and audio sync skills

Able to work within a provided style guide and deliver clean, organized project files

Good communication and ability to meet deadlines

Experience with lower thirds, titles, and transitions preferred



Delivery format: H.264 exports + raw project file backups

Wage/Salary: Negotiable based on experience

Hours per week: 5–15 hours (varies by season; busy season May–October)

title: Full Stack Developer
description:
Full Stack Developer Job Description



Job Title: Full Stack Developer

Location: Remote

Employment Type: Part-time

Hours Available: 20 Hours

Timezone: Irish Time (GMT) 10am-2pm or 11am-3pm





About the Role

We are looking for a Full Stack Developer to build, improve, and maintain modern web applications from frontend to backend. You will work closely with product, design, and operations teams to ship features quickly, reliably, and securely.





Key Responsibilities

· Build and maintain frontend applications with responsive, accessible UI.



· Develop backend APIs, business logic, and database integrations.



· Design clean, scalable architecture and reusable components.



· Write secure, tested, and maintainable code.



· Optimize application performance, reliability, and developer workflows.



· Collaborate with cross-functional teams to plan and deliver features.



· Review code, mentor teammates, and improve engineering standards.





Required Skills & Experience

· 3+ years experience in full stack development.



· Strong JavaScript/TypeScript skills.



· Experience with a frontend framework (React/Next.js preferred).



· Experience with backend frameworks (Node.js, Python/Django).



· Solid understanding of REST APIs and authentication/authorization.



· Practical knowledge of SQL/relational databases.



· Experience with Git, CI/CD, and modern development workflows.



· Experience working in Agile development environments (sprint planning, task tracking, and iterative delivery).



· Solid understanding of SSDLC standards and secure development practices aligned with ISO 27001.



· Strong debugging, communication, and ownership mindset.



· Experience with AWS cloud platforms.



· Experience with Docker and containerized deployments.





Nice to Have

· Experience integrating payment systems (e.g., Stripe, PayPal) and supporting subscription/billing workflows.



· Familiarity with monitoring/logging tools.



· Experience with unit/integration/e2e testing.



· Experience building SaaS or project management platforms.





Tech Stack (Example)

· Frontend: React, Next.js, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, TanStack Query, shadcn/ui



· Backend: Python (Django) or Node.js



· Database: PostgreSQL



· Infrastructure: Docker, CI/CD pipelines, cloud hosting





What Success Looks Like

· Features are delivered on time with high quality.



· Bugs and regressions decrease through better test coverage.



· Performance and reliability improve release over release.



· Team velocity improves through clearer architecture and reusable systems.





How to Apply

Please send:

· Updated CV/Resume



· Short cover note



· Portfolio & GitHub links (if available)
