title: Zoho CRM & Automation Specialist
description:
Job Title: Zoho CRM & Automation Specialist

Location: Remote

Job Type: Full-time or Project-Based

Salary: Competitive, based on experience



About Wandering Lion



Wandering Lion is a strategy-led growth studio helping founder-led businesses build premium brands, install scalable growth systems, and generate measurable commercial outcomes — without chaos. We do not sell disconnected marketing activity. We build structured systems across brand, performance, reporting, and operations so businesses can scale with more clarity, accountability, and control.



Our work sits at the intersection of strategy, execution, and systems. That means CRM setup, sales flow design, automation, and operational visibility are not back-end admin tasks. They are a core part of how growth becomes more predictable, measurable, and scalable.



About the Role



We are looking for a highly capable Zoho CRM & Automation Specialist to join Wandering Lion on either a project basis or in a longer-term role, depending on fit and capability.



This role is for someone with strong hands-on experience across the Zoho ecosystem, especially Zoho CRM, automations, integrations, and workflow design. We want someone who can help build and improve the systems behind lead flow, sales process management, reporting visibility, operational efficiency, and customer journey support.



This is not just a setup role. We want someone who can think commercially, understand how a sales funnel works, and design Zoho systems that support better lead handling, cleaner pipeline management, stronger automation, and more efficient internal processes.



Candidates should be able to demonstrate real experience through previous projects, relevant qualifications, and ideally Zoho certifications.



Key Responsibilities



Zoho CRM setup and optimisation

Build, customise, and improve Zoho CRM environments to support sales processes, lead management, reporting, and operational clarity.



Automation design and implementation

Develop and implement automations across Zoho applications to reduce manual work, improve speed, and create more reliable workflows.



Sales funnel and flow support

Design systems and automations that support lead capture, follow-up, deal stage movement, handover points, and sales visibility.



Integration and connected systems

Connect Zoho with forms, websites,
 tools, reporting systems, scheduling tools, and other relevant business platforms to create smoother data flow and more connected operations.



Zoho application configuration

Configure and customise Zoho tools based on business needs, including platforms such as Zoho CRM, Zoho Creator, Zoho Desk, Zoho Books, and other relevant Zoho products.



Testing and troubleshooting

Test workflows, identify system issues, and troubleshoot automation or integration problems to ensure reliability and performance.



Documentation and process support

Document automations, logic, workflows, and system structure clearly so internal teams can understand and use them effectively.



Training and guidance

Provide support, guidance, and practical training to tea
mbers on how to use Zoho systems and automations more effectively.



What We’re Looking For

Proven experience as a Zoho CRM / Zoho Automation specialist

Strong hands-on capability across Zoho CRM and related Zoho applications

Deep experience building complex automations, workflows, and integrations

Ability to design systems around sales funnels, lead flow, pipeline management, and operational processes

Strong understanding of business process improvement and workflow efficiency

Ability to configure Zoho tools based on specific commercial and operational requirements

Strong problem-solving skills and attention to detail

Excellent communication and interpersonal skills

Ability to work independently, manage deadlines, and deliver clean, reliable implementation

Experience with other CRM, automation, or project management tools is an advantage

Preferred

Experience with Zoho Creator, Zoho Desk, Zoho Books, and broader Zoho suite tools

Relevant Zoho qualifications or certifications

Experience building systems for sales, service, reporting, or multi-step customer journeys

Familiarity with API connections, third-party integrations, and automation platforms

Experience supporting founder-led businesses, agencies, or service-based organisations

What Success Looks Like in This Role

Zoho systems are structured clearly and aligned to how the business actually works

Automations reduce manual work and improve consistency across lead and sales workflows

Pipeline visibility, reporting, and follow-up processes become clearer and more reliable

Tea
mbers are better supported by connected systems and cleaner process flow

CRM and automation setup contributes to smoother delivery, stronger accountability, and improved operational efficiency

Why Join Wandering Lion



You will be joining a business built around calm authority, commercial clarity, and human confidence. We are not trying to become a high-volume agency. We are building a quality-protected growth studio that integrates brand, performance, systems, and delivery under one roof.



That means:



You will help build systems that support real commercial outcomes

You will work inside a strategy-led environment, not a chaotic task-driven setup

You will contribute to clearer sales flow, stronger reporting, and more scalable operations

You will be part of a team that values honesty, accountability, and high standards

How to Apply



Please send:



your updated CV / resume

a short introduction about yourself

details of your Zoho experience, including the products you have worked in

examples of Zoho automations, integrations, or CRM systems you have built or improved

any relevant certifications, qualifications, or training

a 1-minute video introduction using this link: 
/wM6hDHzAkubBhs0zUq2p



Please note that only shortlisted candidates will be contacted for interview.



Before We Proceed



Before we potentially proceed to the interview stage, we’d like to gather a few details to make sure the role is a good fit and that you’ll be set up for success working remotely with our team.



1) PC / Laptop specifications + internet speed

Please share your device specs, including CPU, RAM, and storage, along with a recent internet speed test result. We need reliable performance and strong internet to support day-to-day work.



2) Current employment or side work (transparency request)

Are you currently employed or doing any side jobs or freelance work? We’re open to offshore tea
mbers having multiple jobs — what matters most to us is transparency, so we understand your typical schedule and can support you properly.



3) Hubstaff tracker

Are you comfortable using Hubstaff time tracking? Our whole team operates remotely, including our field and admin staff in Australia. Hubstaff helps us understand time allocation across projects, improve internal reporting, and provide clearer updates to clients.



4) Working hours / availability

Can you commit to the required hours? Our standard workdays are Monday to Friday, generally within 9:00am–5:00pm (Philippines time). We offer reasonable flexibility — family and life come first — but we do need consistency and clear communication.



5) Expected salary (PHP)

If this differs from what was listed in the advert, please confirm your expected salary in PHP.



6) CV / Resume

Please attach your CV if you haven’t already.



7) Relevant training / courses

Please include any relevant training certificates or courses you’ve completed.



8) English level

Please confirm your English level (C2) and your confidence in both written and spoken English.



Team Context



For context, we currently have a team of 10 people in the Philippines, all working from home, and we’re continuing to grow. We value honesty, transparency, and teamwork. We’re looking for people who are humble, reliable, and easy to work with — because every role matters, and the most important thing is a happy team doing work they enjoy, surrounded by like-minded people.



Thanks, and we look forward to your reply.

title: Junior Media Buyer
description:
We are looking for an analytical, fast-learning Junior Media Buyer to help manage and scale our advertising campaigns across Meta 
/Instagram) and TikTok. If you understand the basics of social media ads, love looking at data to see what’s working, and are ready to grow into a full-scale digital marketer, we want to hear from you.



This is a part-time role (20 hours per week) with the potential to grow to full-time based on performance.



Responsibilities

Campaign Management: Assist in setting up, launching, and monitoring ad campaigns on Meta Ads Manager and TikTok Ads Manager.



Performance Tracking: Monitor daily spend and key metrics (ROAS, CPA, CTR) to ensure budgets are on track.



Creative Analysis: Work with our creative team to identify which videos/images are performing best and suggest new "hooks" or angles.



Reporting: Prepare weekly performance reports to show what’s working and where we can improve.



Optimization: Perform basic audience testing, A/B testing, and budget adjustments under the guidance of the Senior Media Buyer.



Organization: Keep tracking links, naming conventions, and project files neatly organized.



Requirements

Platform Knowledge: Basic experience navigating Meta Ads Manager (TikTok Ads experience is a huge plus).



Analytical Mindset: You should be comfortable with numbers and basic Excel/Google Sheets.



Speed & Diligence: Ability to move fast and double-check settings to ensure no budget is wasted.



English Proficiency: Excellent English comprehension to follow complex creative briefs and platform policies.



Growth Potential: A massive desire to learn the "science" of digital advertising.



Nice-to-Have

Experience with UGC-style content or understanding what makes a video go viral.



Familiarity with Google Analytics or third-party tracking tools.



Previous experience in E-commerce or Lead Gen niches.



Knowledge of AI tools (ChatGPT, Claude) to help with ad copywriting.



Compensation & Schedule

Role: Part-time (20 hours per week)



Rate: $5 USD per hour



Schedule: You must be available to overlap with AU Time Zone (AEST/AEDT) for team syncs and quick task turnarounds.

title: Sales , Meta Ads Gen , Admin
description:
Remote Growth, Sales & Patient Care Coordinator

(Meta Ads, Lead Generation, Lead Conversion, Admin & ADHD Screening Support)



Updated Job Overview



iNeuron ADHD Clinic is looking for a proactive remote team member who can support clinic growth through a combination of:



Meta ads management and lead generation

sales and lead conversion

patient administration

screening calls using ADHD questionnaires

appointment booking and scheduling



This is a hybrid marketing + sales + admin + patient coordination role. The person will be responsible not only for following up leads, but also for helping create, manage, and optimise
 and Instagram ad campaigns to generate high-quality enquiries for ADHD assessments and related clinic services.



Updated Key Responsibilities

1. Meta Ads Management and Lead Generation

Create, launch, and manage Meta ads campaigns on
 and Instagram

Set up lead generation campaigns, conversion campaigns, retargeting campaigns, and awareness campaigns where needed

Write ad copy, headlines, and calls to action suitable for ADHD clinic services

Coordinate or create basic ad creatives such as images, carousels, simple videos, and promotional graphics

Monitor ad performance including:

cost per lead

click-through rate

conversion rate

quality of leads

Test different audiences, ad creatives, hooks, and messaging

Optimise campaigns based on results to improve booking conversion and reduce cost per lead

Install or manage Meta Pixel, events, and lead tracking where relevant

Report weekly on ad performance and recommendations

Work closely with the clinic owner to align ads with services, target audience, and business goals

2. Sales and Lead Conversion

Contact new leads generated from Meta ads, website forms, WhatsApp, or other campaigns

Call leads promptly and convert them into booked screening calls or assessment appointments

Explain the clinic’s ADHD assessment process, pricing, and next steps clearly and professionally

Use phone, WhatsApp, SMS, and
 to follow up potential clients

Manage lead pipelines and ensure no warm lead is missed

Follow up unconverted leads consistently and professionally

Handle common objections and encourage appropriate leads to proceed to booking

3. ADHD Screening Calls and Pre-Booking Support

Conduct structured screening calls with potential patients or parents before booking

Use clinic questionnaires, scripts, and ADHD screening tools to gather relevant background information

Ask screening questions clearly, sensitively, and professionally

Identify whether the enquiry appears suitable for the clinic’s ADHD assessment pathway

Ensure screening data is documented accurately for clinician review

Flag any complex, urgent, or clinical concerns to the clinician

Support collection of questionnaires and pre-assessment documentation

4. Administration and Appointment Scheduling

Book consultations, screening calls, and assessment appointments

Coordinate calendar scheduling and appointment confirmations

Send forms, questionnaires, invoices, payment links, and reminders

Follow up incomplete forms and missing documents

Keep lead trackers, booking records, and patient admin systems updated

Reschedule appointments where needed

Help maintain a smooth patient journey from first enquiry to confirmed booking

Ideal Candidate



We are looking for someone who:



has hands-on experience running Meta ads

understands lead generation and sales conversion

is confident making phone calls and following up leads

can handle clinic admin and scheduling

is organised, responsive, and good with detail

communicates warmly and professionally with patients

can use structured screening forms and scripts

is comfortable working independently in a remote role

Preferred Skills and Experience

Experience running
 and Instagram ads

Experience in lead generation for clinics, healthcare, coaching, education, or service businesses

Experience in telesales, appointment setting, or patient coordination

Familiarity with ADHD or mental health services

Experience using CRM systems, spreadsheets, booking software, and WhatsApp Business

Ability to write basic marketing copy and improve follow-up scripts

Strong admin and organisational ability

Important Boundaries



This role includes marketing and non-clinical patient support, but does not include:



diagnosing ADHD

giving medical advice

making clinical decisions

providing therapy or treatment recommendations



Any clinical concerns must be referred to the clinician.



KPIs

Number of leads generated from Meta ads

Cost per lead

Speed of lead response

Number of calls made

Number of screening calls completed

Booking conversion rate

Show-up rate for appointments

Admin accuracy and follow-up completion

title: Case Manager
description:

This role is ideal for someone who is professional, a strong communicator, and confident managing clients throughout the application process. The candidate must have excellent attention to detail, strong communication skills, and good time management. They must also be comfortable speaking with clients on video calls and keeping cases organised and progressing smoothly.



Previous experience is not required, as full on-the-job training will be provided. However, any previous experience in case management, visa support, client coordination, or document handling will be considered a bonus.



Key Responsibilities:

 • Manage client cases throughout the UK Global Talent Visa process

 • Communicate with clients clearly and professionally by
, chat, and video calls

 • Conduct video calls with clients to guide them through the process and answer general questions

 • Collect, organise, and review client documents

 • Follow up with clients for missing information, updates, and deadlines

 • Keep case files accurate, complete, and well organised

 • Track each client’s progress and ensure tasks are completed on time

 • Input and update client information in the CRM and case management system at all times

 • Support clients in a professional and friendly manner throughout their case journey



Requirements:

 • Excellent attention to detail

 • Strong communication skills

 • Comfortable speaking with clients on video calls

, CRM systems, and online tools



Preferred but Not Required:

 • Previous case management or admin experience

 • Experience in client support, coordination, document review, or CRM updates



Short Version for Posting Box:

We are hiring a full-time UK Global Talent Visa Case Manager to support clients through the application process. The ideal candidate must have excellent attention to detail, strong communication skills, and good time management, and be comfortable speaking with clients on video calls. No previous experience is required, as full training will be provided, but any background in case management, client support, admin, document handling, or CRM management is a bonus. This role involves managing client cases, following up on documents, keeping records organised, updating client information in the CRM and case management system, tracking deadlines, and supporting clients professionally throughout their journey.

title: TikTok Media Buyer/VA
description:
TikTok Media Buyers Needed – Digital Products / Sweeps / Rewards (Hiring 3)

Looking for 3 experienced TikTok media buyers to join my team and run campaigns at volume for digital product offers (sweeps, rewards, similar verticals). This is a churn-and-burn operation at high volume and scale.



What you'll be doing:



Launching and managing high-volume TikTok ad campaigns for digital product offers

Working within TikTok Business Centers — managing accounts, assets, and permissions across multiple ad accounts

Whitelisting creatives and understanding the process for getting ads approved and running in restricted verticals

Monitoring performance and making daily optimizations — turning adgroups on/off based on key metrics

Handling ad account suspensions, disapprovals, and replacements as part of normal workflow

Coordinating with the rest of the media buying team (2 other buyers) to share learnings, flag issues, and solve problems fast

Reporting on campaign performance (spend, ROAS, CPA, etc.)



What we're looking for:



Direct experience buying media for digital product offers — sweeps, rewards, and similar verticals. If your background is ecommerce, dropshipping, or brand advertising, this is not the role for you.

Comfortable operating in a churn-and-burn environment — you understand that account suspensions and ad disapprovals are part of the game, not a crisis.

Strong understanding of TikTok Business Center structure, whitelisting processes, and how to keep campaigns live

Solid grasp of core metrics: ROAS, CPA, CPM, CTR, and how to use them to make real-time optimization decisions

A team player — you'll be one of three buyers running separate campaigns in parallel, so communication and coordination are essential

Available to start within the next few days



Details:



Part-time position

$3.50–$4.00/hr USD

Some overlap with US hours required (we'll work out a schedule)

Training and SOPs will be provided, but you need to come in with a working understanding of TikTok media buying in this space

Long-term role with room to grow into more responsibility and higher pay as you prove yourself



How to apply:

Tell me about your experience buying media specifically for digital product offers (sweeps, rewards, etc.) on TikTok. Include what kinds of daily budgets you've managed, how you've handled account suspensions and whitelisting, and how comfortable you are navigating TikTok Business Center.

title: SOP & Operations Systems Specialist
description:
Job Title: SOP & Operations Systems Specialist



Location: Remote

 Job Type: Full-time

 Salary: Competitive, based on experience

About Wandering Lion

Wandering Lion is a strategy-led growth studio helping founder-led businesses build premium brands, install scalable growth systems, and generate measurable commercial outcomes — without chaos. We believe strong growth requires strong systems. That includes clear documentation, operational discipline, and processes that can be followed, improved, and scaled over time.

This role will support operational clarity across multiple businesses and business functions, helping turn knowledge, workflows, and recurring tasks into documented systems that improve consistency, accountability, and performance.

About the Role

We are looking for a highly capable SOP & Operations Systems Specialist to review, improve, and help structure the way processes are documented and managed across the business.

This is not just a writing role. We want someone who can look at how a business actually operates, identify how SOPs connect across teams and functions, assess where information is stored and how it is accessed, and help create a clearer operating structure that is easier to use, train, maintain, and improve.

You will play a key role in reviewing current systems, documenting operational workflows, improving the structure of our SOP library, and helping create stronger links between process creation, training, usage, testing, and team capability.

The right person will be methodical, highly organised, commercially aware, and able to turn messy or inconsistent workflows into practical documentation that supports better execution.

Key Responsibilities

SOP development

 Work with business owners, department leads, and key stakeholders to identify where SOPs are required and create clear, usable documentation for recurring processes.

Process review and analysis

 Review current workflows, operational structures, and documentation systems to identify gaps, duplication, inefficiencies, and opportunities for improvement.

SOP system architecture

 Assess how SOPs are stored, accessed, linked, and maintained across the business, and help design a more logical and scalable structure.

Operations manual development

 Support the development of a connected operations manual that improves visibility across departments and clarifies how different business functions work together.

Implementation and rollout

 Help introduce and embed new SOPs, ensuring documentation is practical, easy to follow, and usable by the teams responsible for execution.

Training and knowledge transfer

 Develop supporting materials, checklists, guides, and documentation that help tea
mbers learn, apply, and retain process knowledge.

Testing and process validation

 Help review whether SOPs are being followed, understood, and applied correctly, and support the testing of team capability across documented workflows.

Continuous improvement

 Regularly review and refine SOPs as processes evolve, and identify opportunities to improve consistency, reduce friction, and increase operational efficiency.

Compliance and quality support

 Ensure documentation is accurate, clear, and aligned with quality expectations, while supporting stronger process discipline across the business.

What We’re Looking For

Proven experience developing, implementing, and improving SOPs, process documentation, or operations manuals

Strong ability to review business workflows and translate them into clear, structured documentation

Experience organising documentation systems so processes are easy to find, follow, maintain, and improve

Preferred

, Miro, or similar workflow and documentation platforms

Teams have stronger clarity around process, accountability, and handover points

Operational knowledge is captured rather than held informally by individuals

Documentation supports better onboarding, training, consistency, and execution

The business becomes more scalable, more organised, and less dependent on verbal knowledge transfer

Why This Role Matters

Wandering Lion is building a business around structured growth, clearer reporting, and SOP-driven delivery. This role directly supports that vision by helping turn operational complexity into clarity and documentation into practical business infrastructure.

How to Apply

Please send:

your CV / resume

a short introduction about yourself

examples of SOPs, operations manuals, workflow maps, or process documents you have created

details of any documentation or process tools you use

a short explanation of how you approach reviewing and improving messy or inconsistent systems

Before We Proceed

mbers having multiple jobs — what matters most to us is transparency, so we understand your typical schedule and can support you properly.

Team Context

Design presentation-style slides that explain marketing concepts visually. Source and edit images for content. Take design briefs and turn them into polished visuals.



What we're looking for:

Strong Canva skills (required). Experience designing presentations, infographics, or social media graphics. Good eye for clean, minimal, modern design. Comfortable learning new tools quickly (Miro, Figma, AI chart tools). Detail-oriented with spacing, alignment, fonts, and consistency. Available during US business hours (minimum 4 to 6 hours overlap with EST). Strong written English.



Bonus:

Experience with Figma or Miro. Experience with AI image generation tools (Midjourney, DALL-E). Familiarity with YouTube content or marketing. Video thumbnail design experience.



Our style: Dark backgrounds, white text, minimal color, clean sans-serif fonts. Modern and professional but not corporate. Think educational YouTube content, not PowerPoint presentations.

title: Visual Content Builder for YouTube Channel - DTC Marketing (Remote, Full-Time)
description:
We're building a YouTube channel focused on creative strategy for DTC and e-commerce brands. The channel is growing fast and we need someone to take video outlines and build them into polished visual whiteboards that the founder films against.



This is not a video editing role. You are building the visuals that appear on screen during filming. Think charts, diagrams, frameworks, comparisons, and images arranged on a digital whiteboard (Miro) that the founder scrolls through while talking.



What You'll Do



Take a video outline with visual descriptions and build each visual on a Miro board. Create charts and graphs using AI tools like Graphy, Miro AI, or similar platforms. Build diagrams, flowcharts, frameworks, and comparison graphics that explain concepts visually. Generate or source images using AI image generators (Midjourney, DALL-E, or similar) when the outline calls for visual metaphors or reference images. Add text blocks with key phrases, definitions, or labels onto the board. Arrange everything in the correct order with clean spacing so the founder can scroll through it naturally during filming. Create LinkedIn carousel slides in Canva based on outlines provided (black background, white text, 1080x1080 format). Deliver 1 to 2 finished boards per week plus 1 to 2 carousel designs.



What You Won't Do



You won't be editing video. You won't be on camera. You won't be writing scripts or outlines. You won't be managing social media accounts. You receive a clear brief for every board and you build it. The creative direction comes from us. You execute it.



Who You Are



Strong design sense. Not a professional graphic designer, but you know what looks clean, readable, and well-organized versus what looks cluttered and messy. Comfortable with Miro, Canva, or Figma. You'll be building in these tools daily. You don't need to be an expert in all three. Proficiency in at least one and willingness to learn the others. Comfortable with AI tools. You should be able to use AI chart generators, AI image generators, and Miro AI to speed up your work. Building everything from scratch manually is too slow. AI does the heavy lifting, you refine and arrange. Detail-oriented. Spacing, alignment, font consistency, color consistency. The small things matter. Every board should look like it came from the same brand. Reliable and communicative. You deliver on time. If something is unclear or you're running behind, you say so early. No surprises. Available during US business hours. Minimum 4 to 6 hours of overlap with EST.



Required Experience



Experience with at least one design or whiteboard tool (Miro, Figma, Canva, or similar). Experience creating charts, diagrams, or visual presentations. Experience with AI image generation tools (Midjourney, DALL-E, or similar). Strong written English for communication.



Bonus (Not Required)



Familiarity with the DTC, e-commerce, or digital marketing space. Experience building YouTube content or presentation visuals. Experience with Graphy or similar AI chart tools. Understanding of what makes educational content visually engaging.



Our Visual Style



Black and white with grey accents. Clean. Minimal. Professional. No bright colors unless they serve a specific purpose in a chart. No decorative elements. No gradients. Think high-end consulting firm, not colorful infographic. Every visual should be easy to read at a glance on a screen recording.



Tools We Use



Miro (primary whiteboard). Canva (carousels and social graphics). Graphy (charts and data visualization). Midjourney or similar (AI image generation). Google Workspace (communication and file sharing).



How to Apply



Send a short message introducing yourself. Include 2 to 3 examples of visual work you've done (charts, diagrams, presentations, whiteboard designs, or anything that shows your design sense). Tell me which tools you're most comfortable with. Mention any experience with AI image generation or AI chart tools.



We'll send a test task to qualified applicants before making a final decision.

title: Job Title: Survey Drafting Technician
description:
Job Title: Survey Drafting Technician

Location: Remote

About the Role



We are looking for a highly organised and detail-driven Survey Drafting Technician to join our remote drafting team and support a fast-moving Australian surveying business.



This is a fully remote role, so we need someone who is not only technically capable, but also highly reliable, proactive, and comfortable working independently. Strong communication, self-management, and consistency are essential. This role is ideal for someone who takes pride in accurate work, strong file organisation, and clear communication. You should be open to feedback, willing to keep learning, and capable of contributing positively to a team that values quality, accountability, and dependable delivery.



What You’ll Be Doing

Preparation of strata plans

General survey drafting and drawing updates

Supporting the wider team with accurate, timely, and well-structured drafting outputs

What We’re Looking For

Strong attention to detail and a high standard of accuracy

Excellent English communication skills, both written and verbal

Open-minded attitude, willingness to learn, and ability to take feedback well

A reliable, consistent, and quality-focused approach to work

Essential Software Skills

CAD software such as AutoCAD and Magnet

Other relevant survey drafting or technical drawing software

Preferred

What Success Looks Like in This Role

Drawings are prepared accurately and delivered on time

Files and project information are well organised and easy to access

Communication is clear, professional, and reliable

Drafting standards are followed consistently

The wider team can depend on you for quality support and strong follow-through

You work effectively in a remote environment without compromising quality or responsiveness

Why Join Us



We have a highly driven team of dedicated and passionate people working remotely around the world, and we are building businesses with strong long-term ambition. We are looking for someone who wants to be part of that growth and contribute meaningfully to a team that values quality, communication, and accountability.



This role suits someone who enjoys remote work, takes ownership of their output, and wants to be part of a professional team where detail and consistency matter.



How to Apply



Please submit:



your CV / resume

a cover letter including:

your current employment status

your availability to start

why you want to join the team

why you believe you are a strong fit for this role

your experience with Australian surveying workflows or companies, if applicable

Before We Proceed



Before we potentially proceed to the interview stage, we’d like to gather a few details to make sure the role is a good fit and that you’ll be set up for success working remotely with our team.



1) PC / Laptop specifications + internet speed

Please share your device specs, including CPU, RAM, and storage, along with a recent internet speed test result. We need reliable performance and strong internet to support day-to-day work.



2) Current employment or side work (transparency request)

Are you currently employed or doing any side jobs or freelance work? We’re open to offshore tea
mbers having multiple jobs — what matters most to us is transparency, so we understand your typical schedule and can support you properly.



3) Hubstaff tracker

Are you comfortable using Hubstaff time tracking? Our whole team operates remotely, including our field and admin staff in Australia. Hubstaff helps us understand time allocation across projects, improve internal reporting, and provide clearer updates to clients.



4) Working hours / availability

Can you commit to the required hours? Our standard workdays are Monday to Friday, generally within 9:00am–5:00pm (Philippines time). We offer reasonable flexibility — family and life come first — but we do need consistency and clear communication.



5) Expected salary (PHP)

If this differs from what was listed in the advert, please confirm your expected salary in PHP.



6) CV / Resume

Please attach your CV if you haven’t already.



7) Relevant training / courses

Please include any relevant training certificates or courses you’ve completed.



8) English level

Please confirm your English level (C1/C2) and your confidence in both written and spoken English.



Team Context



For context, we currently have a team of 10 people in the Philippines, all working from home, and we’re continuing to grow. We value honesty, transparency, and teamwork. We’re looking for people who are humble, reliable, and easy to work with — because every role matters, and the most important thing is a happy team doing work they enjoy, surrounded by like-minded people.



Thanks, and we look forward to your reply.

title: Virtual Assistant
description:
Job Title: Virtual Assistant (Payments, Contracts & Coordination) – Remote 



Location: Remote 

Job Type: Part-Time (with Full-Time Potential





About the Role

We are looking for a highly reliable and detail-oriented Virtual Assistant to support our internal operations. This role focuses on payment coordination, contractor communication, document handling, and appointment management.



This is a critical position where trust, confidentiality, and strong communication are essential. You will work closely with an international team and help ensure that administrative processes run smoothly and efficiently.



The role will start part-time, with the opportunity to transition into a full-time position based on performance and business needs.



Key Responsibilities



- Prepare payments to contractors (e.g., creating payment batches in Wise or similar tools)

- Prepare and organize contractor payment lists and schedules

- Track payment status and maintain accurate internal records

- Coordinate with contractors to ensure timely completion and signing of agreements and documents

- Manage and organize contracts using tools like Google Drive, DocuSign, or similar

- Follow up with contractors regarding missing information or unsigned documents

- Schedule and manage appointments, meetings, and reminders

- Maintain clear documentation of communication, payments, and contract status

- Provide regular updates and proactively flag delays, inconsistencies, or issues



Requirements



* Previous experience as a Virtual Assistant, Administrative Assistant, or similar role

* Excellent written and spoken English (clear, professional communication is essential)

* Strong organizational skills and attention to detail

* High level of reliability and accountability — you follow through on tasks and meet deadlines

* Ability to handle confidential financial and contractual information with discretion

* Comfortable working independently with minimal supervision

* Experience with tools such as Google Workspace and task management systems

* Stable internet connection and professional remote work setup



Nice to Have

Experience with payment tools (e.g., Wise, QuickBooks)

Experience with e-signature platforms

Experience coordinating with international contractors



What We Value

1. Reliability – you consistently deliver and communicate early if something is delayed

2. Clear Communication – you keep everyone informed and ask questions when needed

3. Ownership Mindset – you take responsibility for your tasks and outcomes

4. Confidentiality – you treat sensitive information with the highest level of care



Why Join Us

* Start part-time with a clear path to a full-time role

* Long-term, stable remote opportunity

* Work with an international, professional team

* Clear processes and structured workflows

* Opportunity to grow into a key operational role



If you are a dependable and highly organized Virtual Assistant who takes pride in communication, confidentiality, and operational excellence, we would love to hear from you.



Please apply via OnlineJobs.ph and include:

- A short introduction about your experience

title: Brand Creative Designer (Video & Motion)
description:
Job Title: Brand Creative Designer (Video & Motion)



About the Role



We are looking for a versatile Brand Creative Designer who can produce high-quality work across graphic design, video editing, motion graphics, and digital design.



This role is for someone who can do more than make content look good. You should understand how creative work shapes trust, strengthens brand perception, and supports commercial outcomes. You will help create polished, on-brand assets across digital, social, web, and marketing channels, while maintaining a high standard of quality, consistency, and execution.



You should be confident working across static design, short-form and long-form video, motion graphics, and website-related creative, with strong attention to detail and a clear understanding of how visual work performs in-market. That fits Wandering Lion’s brand-led approach: premium creative execution tied to measurable outcomes, not just output for output’s sake.



Key Responsibilities



Brand and graphic design

Create high-quality graphics, marketing assets, social media content, presentations, and digital materials that align with brand guidelines and campaign objectives.



Video editing

Edit short-form and long-form video content for social media, marketing campaigns, websites, and brand storytelling.



Motion graphics and animation

Produce motion graphics, animated assets, and simple visual effects that enhance creative output and improve content engagement.



Image retouching and preparation

Retouch, resize, and prepare images for digital platforms, campaigns, and web use.



Website and landing page design support

Design assets for websites, landing pages, and digital campaigns, ensuring visual consistency and user clarity.



UX/UI support

Assist with UX/UI design across websites and digital user journeys, with a focus on clean layouts, visual hierarchy, and ease of use.



Brand consistency

Apply brand guidelines consistently across all creative work to maintain a polished and premium brand presence.



Project and deadline management

Manage multiple projects efficiently, prioritise tasks well, and deliver work on time without compromising quality.



What We’re Looking For

Strong portfolio across graphic design, video editing, and motion graphics

Experience producing creative assets for digital, social, and marketing campaigns

Website graphic design experience

UX/UI design experience

Strong understanding of layout, typography, colour, composition, and visual storytelling

High attention to detail and the ability to work efficiently

Ability to follow direction while also bringing thoughtful creative input

Good communication and collaboration skills

A reliable, organised, and quality-focused approach to work

Preferred

Experience working with premium or brand-led businesses

Strong understanding of how creative supports trust, conversion, and commercial growth

Experience creating content across multiple platforms and formats

Confidence adapting creative for both brand-building and campaign use

Software



Please list the software and tools you use, along with your level of proficiency.



Examples may include: Adobe Photoshop, Illustrator, InDesign, Premiere Pro, After Effects, Figma, Canva, Webflow, or similar tools.



How to Apply



Please send:



Your CV / resume

Your portfolio

Examples of video editing and motion graphics work

A short introduction about yourself

A list of the software and tools you use, including your level of proficiency

Before We Proceed



Before we potentially proceed to the interview stage, we’d like to gather a few details to make sure the role is a good fit and that you’ll be set up for success working remotely with our team.



1) PC / Laptop specifications + internet speed

Please share your device specs, including CPU, RAM, and storage, along with a recent internet speed test result. We need reliable performance and strong internet to support day-to-day work.



2) Current employment or side work (transparency request)

Are you currently employed or doing any side jobs or freelance work? We’re open to offshore tea
mbers having freelance gigs. What matters most to us is transparency, so we understand your typical schedule and can support you properly.



3) Hubstaff tracker

Are you comfortable using Hubstaff time tracking? Our whole team operates remotely, including our field and admin staff in Australia(even the owner). Hubstaff helps us understand time allocation across projects, improve internal reporting, and provide clearer updates to clients.



4) Working hours / availability

Can you commit to the required hours? Our standard workdays are Monday to Friday, generally within 9:00am–5:00pm (Philippines time). We offer reasonable flexibility — family and life come first — but we do need consistency and clear communication.



5) Expected salary (PHP)

If this differs from what was listed in the advert, please confirm your desired salary in PHP.



6) CV / Resume

Please attach your CV if you haven’t already.



7) Relevant training / courses / Degree

Please include any relevant training certificates or courses you’ve completed.



8) English level

Please confirm your English level (C2) and your confidence in both written and spoken English.



Team Context



For context, we currently have a team of 10 people in the Philippines, all working from home, and we’re continuing to grow. We value honesty, transparency, and teamwork. We’re looking for people who are humble, reliable, and easy to work with — because every role matters, and the most important thing is a happy team doing work they enjoy, surrounded by like-minded people.



Thanks, and we look forward to your reply.

title: Founding Engineer - React / Node
description:
Founding Engineer (Part-Time ? Full-Time)



Full Stack / DevOps / “Vibe Coder”

Cannabis Tech | POS + Marketplace Platform



We’re not building a concept.

We’re building real infrastructure for licensed dispensaries.



A system that combines point-of-sale, marketplace, and operational intelligence into one clean platform.



We’re an Austin-based company, and we operate fast, focused, and during real working hours.

We’re hiring our first engineer to help bring this to life.



What This Role Actually Is



This isn’t a “join a team” role.

You are the beginning of the team.



You’ll be:



Our first DevOps + engineering hire

Helping define how everything is built, deployed, and scaled

Working directly with founders—fast decisions, zero bureaucracy



Starting at ~20 hours/week, with a clear path to full-time as we launch and grow.



Being early here matters. The people who build the foundation naturally earn more opportunity as things scale.



What You’ll Be Doing



Build and ship across our POS + marketplace platform

Own work across frontend, backend, and infrastructure

Set up and manage AWS environments (end-to-end)

Design and integrate REST APIs and third-party services

Work with AI integrations and model orchestration

Write and manage cloud-based code and services

Take ideas from rough concept ? production-ready features

Help us move fast without breaking what matters



Tech Stack (Must Have Real Experience)

Frontend: React + Tailwind

Backend: Node.js

Mobile: React Native (iOS only)

Cloud & DevOps: AWS (full stack)

Fargate

RDS

Infrastructure + security best practices

Database: PostgreSQL

APIs: REST + third-party integrations

AI / LLMs:

AWS Bedrock

Experience working with models like Claude, Haiku, or similar

Cloud Code:

Experience building and managing cloud-based services (serverless, microservices, or similar architectures)



If you’ve actually built and deployed systems with this stack—not just experimented—we want to talk.



Working Style (Important)

Austin-based company (Central Time)

You must be available Monday through Friday, 8am–5pm CST

This starts part-time (~20 hrs/week), but those hours need to overlap within that window



We move quickly and collaborate in real time—this isn’t an async-only role.



What We’re Looking For

You’ve shipped real products end-to-end

You’re comfortable owning infrastructure, backend, and frontend

You have real experience writing and managing cloud-based code

You’ve worked in a team environment or can clearly operate like a strong independent builder

You understand AWS deeply, especially security and scaling

You can move fast and think clearly

You communicate well and take ownership

You enjoy early-stage environments where things aren’t perfectly defined yet



Bonus if:



You’ve worked with POS systems, marketplaces, or fintech

You’ve built in regulated environments

You’ve integrated AI into real production workflows

What This Is NOT

Not a ticket-taking role

Not a slow-moving team

Not a place where everything is already figured out



If you need heavy structure before you can build, this won’t be a fit.



Compensation:

Hourly to start (part-time)

Scales with responsibility and hours as we grow

Clear path to full-time

Early builders gain meaningful upside as the company expands



How to Apply

Send:

A short intro (keep it real)

Links to things you’ve built or shipped

GitHub or portfolio

Your hourly rate expectation

Anything else that shows you can execute

?

title: TikTok KOL Supervisor
description:
Job Overview:

We are seeking a dynamic and highly motivated KOL Manager to oversee and grow our TikTok influencer marketing efforts in Philippines. The ideal candidate will be responsible for identifying, engaging, and managing relationships with TikTok influencers to drive brand awareness, engagement, and ultimately sales in the local market.

Key Responsibilities:

1. KOL Strategy Development:

  - Develop and implement a comprehensive TikTok KOL influencer strategy aligned with brand objectives, market trends, and consumer insights in Vietnam.

  - Create campaigns that drive engagement, brand awareness, and conversion, with clear KPIs and measurable outcomes.

2. KOL Research and Identification:

  - Identify and establish relationships with top-tier and micro-influencers in Vietnam who align with the brand’s values, target audience, and goals.

  - Stay up-to-date with TikTok trends and emerging influencers to ensure the brand is always at the forefront of the platform.

3. Campaign Execution & Management:

  - Oversee end-to-end influencer campaign execution, from briefing and content creation to final delivery and performance analysis.

  - Ensure influencers’ content aligns with brand guidelines, voice, and overall marketing strategy.

4. Collaboration and Negotiation:

  - Negotiate contracts, terms, and compensation with influencers and influencer agencies to ensure mutually beneficial partnerships.

  - Collaborate with internal teams (creative, PR, and marketing) to ensure influencer content is integrated seamlessly into the overall marketing strategy.

5. Performance Tracking and Reporting:

  - Monitor the performance of KOL campaigns on TikTok, track key metrics (engagement, reach, conversions), and optimize strategies accordingly.

  - Provide regular reports and insights to management on campaign effectiveness, ROI, and influencer impact.

6. Community Building:

  - Build and nurture long-term relationships with influencers to foster loyalty and repeat collaborations.

  - Engage in community management by interacting with influencers’ audiences and ensuring positive brand sentiment.

7. Market and Competitor Insights:

  - Monitor competitors' influencer strategies on TikTok and analyze trends in influencer marketing within Philippine’s digital landscape.

  - Use data and insights to continuously improve and adapt the influencer strategy.

Qualifications:

- Proven experience in influencer marketing or KOL management, ideally in the TikTok ecosystem, preferably within Philippines.

- Strong understanding of TikTok trends, features, and best practices.

- Excellent negotiation and communication skills.

- Creative mindset with an ability to think outside the box to create viral content.

- Fluent in English (both written and spoken).

- Highly organized, detail-oriented, and able to manage multiple projects simultaneously.

Preferred:

- Experience working with a brand in the lifestyle, fashion, or e-commerce industry.

- Existing network of TikTok influencers in Philippines.

title: Brand Messaging and Copywriter
description:
Anyone who applies you must read the following 3 statements.

If they dont apply then Please DO NOT APPLY

We will not repond to applicaitons that dont meet these criteria



NOT SOCIAL MEDIA MANAGER

MUST HAVE C2 LEVEL ENGLISH

MUST HAVE A MARKETING / WRITING DEGREE



Job Title: Brand Messaging & Copywriter



Position: Full-time, Remote



About the Role



We are looking for a commercially sharp Brand Messaging & Copywriter who can write with both strategic discipline and persuasive force.



This is not a generic content role. We want someone who can help shape clear brand messaging, strengthen brand perception, and write copy that drives real commercial outcomes. You should be able to move between brand clarity and conversion performance — from landing pages and ads to
 sequences, scripts, offers, and sales messaging.



At Wandering Lion, we do not believe in marketing activity without substance. We believe strong copy should help the right audience understand the brand, trust it faster, and take action with confidence. That means your writing needs to do more than sound good. It needs to perform.



Key Responsibilities



Brand voice and messaging

Help define, refine, and apply a consistent brand voice across all written materials.



Audience and offer clarity

Identify the most relevant audience for each campaign or content type, and write messaging that speaks directly to their pain points, goals, and buying triggers.



Brand and conversion copywriting

Write compelling, commercially effective copy across:



landing pages

sales pages

 campaigns

ad copy

product or service pages

blogs

video scripts

nurture sequences

cold outreach
s



Direct-response writing

Develop persuasive copy that creates interest, builds trust, and drives the next step — whether that is a click, enquiry, booking, or sale.



Research and angle development

Research industries, offers, customer behaviour, and market context to develop stronger hooks, angles, and campaign messages.



Cold
 and outbound messaging

Write high-converting cold
 scripts and outbound messaging designed to start relevant conversations and generate booked calls.



Copy optimisation

Review performance, learn from results, and improve copy based on what actually converts — not personal attachment to wording.



Project management and collaboration

Manage multiple projects at once and work effectively across tools such as Asana and Google Docs, while collaborating with strategy, design, and performance teams.



What We’re Looking For

Proven experience in direct-response copywriting

Strong ability to write both long-form and short-form copy

Experience writing for ads,
, landing pages, sales pages, blogs, and campaign assets

Ability to write persuasive copy with clarity, urgency, intrigue, and strong calls to action

Excellent written and spoken English, with a C2-level standard preferred

Strong storytelling ability combined with commercial thinking

Ability to simplify complex or technical ideas into clear, compelling language

Experience writing B2B copy

Strong understanding of buyer psychology and how to write in a way that drives response

Willingness to look at results objectively and improve copy based on performance

Good organisation and multitasking skills across multiple projects

Preferred

Experience working with founder-led businesses, service businesses, or growth-focused brands

Familiarity with AI tools that improve research, workflow, or copy production quality

Strong understanding of brand positioning as well as conversion principles

Experience developing messaging frameworks, campaign angles, or offer positioning

What Success Looks Like in This Role

Copy is clear, persuasive, and commercially aligned

Messaging strengthens brand perception while improving conversion

Campaigns produce better engagement, better lead quality, and better sales outcomes

Writing reflects strategic thinking, not just output volume

The team can rely on you to produce strong work across multiple formats and projects

Requirements

You genuinely enjoy writing and care about the business outcomes it creates

You have experience writing B2B copy

Your written English is extremely strong

You understand psychology, buyer motivation, and how to create curiosity and response

You are not overly attached to your own copy and are willing to refine it based on results

You are available full-time and able to maintain communication during the required working window, Monday to Friday

Benefits

Results-driven culture

Unlimited leave policy

Flexible working hours based on KPIs

Autonomy over your work schedule and location

The opportunity to see how your copy directly impacts client growth

Exposure to a wide range of industries and business models

The chance to do meaningful work inside a commercially focused, strategy-led team

Why This Role Matters



Wandering Lion exists to help founder-led businesses build premium brands, install growth systems, and scale without chaos. That means copy is a critical function inside the business. Founders do not need more noise. They need sharper positioning, stronger trust, clearer offers, and messaging that converts. This role directly supports that mission.



How to Apply



Please send:



your CV / resume

a short introduction about yourself

examples of relevant copywriting work

examples of sales,
, landing page, ad, or outbound copy you have written

any relevant training, certifications, or copywriting programs you have completed



If shortlisted, we may also ask you to complete a short writing task.



Before We Proceed



Before we potentially proceed to the interview stage, we’d like to gather a few details to make sure the role is a good fit and that you’ll be set up for success working remotely with our team.



1) PC / Laptop specifications + internet speed

Please share your device specs, including CPU, RAM, and storage, along with a recent internet speed test result. We need reliable performance and strong internet to support day-to-day work.



2) Current employment or side work (transparency request)

Are you currently employed or doing any side jobs or freelance work? We’re open to offshore tea
mbers having multiple jobs — what matters most to us is transparency, so we understand your typical schedule and can support you properly.



3) Hubstaff tracker

Are you comfortable using Hubstaff time tracking? Our whole team operates remotely, including our field and admin staff in Australia. Hubstaff helps us understand time allocation across projects, improve internal reporting, and provide clearer updates to clients.



4) Working hours / availability

Can you commit to the required hours? Our standard workdays are Monday to Friday, generally within 9:00am–5:00pm (Philippines time). We offer reasonable flexibility — family and life come first — but we do need consistency and clear communication.



5) Expected salary (PHP)

If this differs from what was listed in the advert, please confirm your expected salary in PHP.



6) CV / Resume

Please attach your CV if you haven’t already.



7) Relevant training / courses

Please include any relevant training certificates or courses you’ve completed.



8) English level

Please confirm your English level (C2) and your confidence in both written and spoken English.



Team Context



For context, we currently have a team of 10 people in the Philippines, all working from home, and we’re continuing to grow. We value honesty, transparency, and teamwork. We’re looking for people who are humble, reliable, and easy to work with — because every role matters, and the most important thing is a happy team doing work they enjoy, surrounded by like-minded people.



Thanks, and we look forward to your reply.

Discoloration

Roof type



Damage



Notes



Meet daily targets
homes per day depending on complexity.

title: Operations Manager (Scheduling & Systems)
description:
We’re hiring an Operations Manager to help us build, organize, and scale how our company runs.



Whetstone Creative Agency is a real estate media and marketing company based in Southern Oregon. We handle a high volume of photo and video projects, along with larger production work, and we’re growing quickly.



We need someone who can take ownership of our operations and turn them into a system that runs smoothly without constant oversight.



This role will start hands-on, but is designed to grow into full ownership of operations.



The Role



You will be responsible for building and improving how our business operates day to day.



That includes scheduling systems, workflows, team coordination, and overall project flow from order to delivery.



At the beginning, you will be directly involved in scheduling shoots, submitting orders, and managing projects. Over time, your goal is to improve and systemize these processes so they run efficiently at scale.



What You’ll Do



Build and document SOPs for core workflows

Create and improve scheduling systems and processes

Manage project flow from order ? delivery

Help organize and align the team around clear systems

Identify bottlenecks and fix them

Start hands-on with scheduling and order management, then optimize and scale



What We’re Looking For



Experience building workflows and operational systems

Strong understanding of scheduling systems and coordination

Ability to organize teams and create clarity

High ownership and problem-solving mindset

Comfortable being hands-on before delegating or optimizing

Strong communication and leadership skills



What Success Looks Like



Clear, repeatable systems for scheduling and project flow

SOPs that make the team more efficient

Fewer mistakes and less confusion across projects

Operations that can scale as the company grows

Less reliance on the founder for day-to-day decisions



This is not a passive role.



We are looking for someone who wants to take ownership, build systems, and improve how things work.



To Apply



Please apply and answer the following three questions in this exact order. If you do not follow these instructions, you will not be considered for this role. This is a detail-oriented role, and this step matters. (Keep answers to 1 paragraph.)



1. Tell us about your experience that would make you a great fit for this role?

2. How are you setup to handle issues like storms, power outages, and natural disasters that can effect your work?

3. You get one free round-trip flight anywhere in the world. Where are you going and why?

s + internal summaries)

title: Senior Xactimate Estimator & Insurance Claims Executive VA (Remote)
description:

We are a growing U.S.-based Public Adjusting firm that represents homeowners on property insurance claims (roof, storm, water, and property damage). Our job is to help homeowners receive fair settlements from insurance companies.



We are looking for an experienced Xactimate Estimator and Claims Executive VA who can help manage estimates, documentation, and communications with insurance carriers.



This role is for someone who already understands insurance estimating and claims workflows and can work independently.



Key Responsibilities



• Prepare complete Xactimate estimates (ESX + PDF) based on photos, measurements, and inspection notes

• Draft
s, supplements, and communications to insurance carriers for PA review and approval

• Review insurance carrier estimates and identify missing or underpaid line items

• Upload documents and estimates to insurance carrier portals

• Track claim progress and maintain organized claim files

• Manage claim documentation and follow up with carriers when needed



Requirements



• Proven experience using Xactimate for insurance or restoration estimates

• Strong understanding of property insurance claims (roof, storm, water damage preferred)

• Ability to work independently and accurately with minimal supervision

• Excellent written English and professional communication

• Highly organized and detail-oriented

• Reliable internet connection and computer



Compensation



• $10 – $20 USD per hour, depending on experience

• Part-time or full-time opportunities available

• Long-term opportunity for the right candidate



Work Environment



This is a remote position working directly with a U.S. licensed Public Adjuster. You will help manage the operational side of claims while the adjuster oversees approvals and negotiations.



How to Apply

Your availability per week



To confirm you read the entire job post, include the word “SUPPLEMENT” at the top of your application.

title: Google Reviews & Business Profile VA (Reputation + SEO)
description:
We are looking for a reliable and detail-oriented Virtual Assistant to manage Google Business Profiles for 10 restaurant locations in the UK.



RESPONSIBILITIES:



Monitor all Google Business Profiles daily

Reply to ALL new reviews within 24 hours

Prioritise negative reviews (1–3 stars)

Keep replies professional, polite, and solution-focused

Never argue or blame the customer

Write replies using simple SEO (include restaurant name, location, and food items naturally)

Keep replies human and natural (no spammy wording)

Post updates on each profile every 1–2 days (offers, food highlights, simple updates)

Use images provided or simple Canva designs

Flag serious complaints immediately

Report repeated issues (e.g. cold food, missing items)



REQUIREMENTS:



Strong written English

Good attention to detail

Able to follow instructions and templates

Reliable and consistent (daily work required)



WORKLOAD:



4 hours per day

Long-term role



IMPORTANT:



This role is about consistency, speed, and accuracy — not creativity.



TO APPLY:



Reply to this review:

“Food arrived cold and late. Not happy.”

Reply to this review:

“Food was nice but missing one item.”

Confirm your availability (hours per day)



Applications without both replies will not be considered. A.I Replies for reviews are acceptable.

title: COO/Management Residential Appraisal Report Writer
description:
We are a successful residential appraisal firm located in the Bay Area, California. We employ over 10 on the team and are looking for a very senior level experienced residential appraisal report writer to lead our team.



The team includes 3 Bay Area appraisers and 8 employees in the Philippines. We are rapidly growing and are looking for someone with experience completing the entire report, including commentary, who ideally has experience with managing and leading other appraisal report writers. Your role will effectively be acting as chief operating officer of our company while also being directly involved in reports.



Your role and responsibilities include the following:

1. Ensuring every report is completed to our standards. Either directly or through the processes and procedures you develop, it will be your responsibility to ensure that each and every report created by our report writers is free from errors and submission-ready. While this will start by having you directly review each report written by our team before submission, we are in the process of also hiring quality assurance reviewers, who you will lead and manage.

2. Training and managing residential report writers. It will be your responsibility to ensure that all report writers on our tea
et the criteria and standards in place to ensure high quality reports. 

3. Acting as the liaison between leadership and the report writing staff. If there is too much work for the team, you will be in charge of letting leadership know so that additional tea
mbers can be hired. Or if there are any other issues, you will be in charge of resolving them or bringing it to leadership's attention.

4. Acting as the closer. Ultimately, everything on the report writing side will fall under your responsiblity. We are looking for someone who is proactive at solving problems without getting the leadership team involved, however we are of course readily available to help out when needed. In line with this, if the report writing team doesn't have capacity to complete a residential report, you are expected to directly help out and complete these reports while at the same time working towards a solution to address this issue (hiring more, building better processes for writing reports, involving AI, etc).



To be considered for this role, you must meet the following criteria:

1. You have extensive work history writing reports for a US residential appraiser. Ideally you have done this for California properties. You must have extensive experience completing the entire report, everything from data entry to sketch to adjustments, 1004MC, selecting comparables, and commentary.

2. Ideally you have existing management experience, managing other appraisal report writers.



We are flexible with your work hours and offer Philippine daytime shift hours for your convenience. We would like to start part time but then transition to full time, so ideally you are open to working full time exclusively with us if its a mutual fit.



To be considered for this position, you must do the following in your application message (failure to do all of the following will result in your application being ignored):

1. How many years have you worked for a US residential appraiser? What tasks did you perform for them?

2. How many hours does it take you to complete one report? What parts of the report do you complete?

3. Do you have experience writing commentary for the addendum, drawing the sketch, labeling photos, and creating the 1004MC? Please indicate which ones you have experience with, and how many years for each.

4. Please provide a sample of at least one appraisal report you have fully completed. You can redact any private information from the report. Please let me know what parts exactly you completed on this report(s).

5. Provide a publicly accessible link to your resume.

6. Are you open to starting part time and then transitioning to full time? Once working full time with us, will you be working exclusively with us without any other jobs? When is the earliest you can begin working with us?

7. What are your preferred working hours?

8. Do you have experience managing other residential appraisal report writers? If so, please discuss in detail your job responsibilities.

9. Do you have experience in reviewing other residential reports? If so, please discuss in detail your responsibilities. 



Thank you, and I look forward to the opportunity to work together.
