title: Web ai & Automation Developer
description:
Job Title: Web Ai & Automation Developer

Location: Remote

Job Type: Full-time

Salary: Competitive, based on experience



About Wandering Lion



Wandering Lion is a strategy-led growth studio helping founder-led businesses build premium brands, install scalable growth systems, and generate measurable commercial outcomes — without chaos. We do not believe in disconnected marketing activity or bloated delivery. We build structured brand, web, marketing, reporting, and operational systems that support clearer positioning, stronger trust, and better commercial performance.



Our work sits at the intersection of brand, performance, and systems. That means websites, landing pages, automations, and digital infrastructure are not treated as isolated tasks. They are built as commercial assets designed to improve credibility, user experience, conversion, efficiency, and scale.



About the Role



We are looking for a highly capable Web & Automation Developer who can build, improve, and maintain digital systems across a range of modern platforms, tools, and workflows.



This is not a narrow WordPress or platform-only role. We want someone who is confident working across websites, landing pages, integrations, automations, AI tools, and digital infrastructure that supports both internal operations and client delivery.



You should be able to work across different website environments such as Shopify, Webflow, WordPress, Relume, landing page builders, and other modern web platforms, while also bringing strong capability in AI tools, automation systems, process improvement, and connected workflow design.



The right person will understand that a website is only one part of the growth system. What matters is how the website, user journey, data flow, automations, and supporting tools work together to improve trust, efficiency, and conversion.



Key Responsibilities



Website development across multiple platforms

Build, customise, maintain, and improve websites and landing pages across a range of modern platforms and environments, depending on project needs.



Flexible platform capability

Work confidently across different website ecosystems such as Shopify, Webflow, WordPress, Relume-supported builds, page builders, CMS tools, and similar digital platforms without being limited to a single system.



Landing pages and conversion builds

Develop landing pages, campaign pages, and user journey components that support lead generation, offer clarity, conversion, and stronger customer experience.



AI and automation implementation

Set up and improve automations, AI-enabled workflows, and connected systems that reduce manual work, improve reporting, increase delivery efficiency, and strengthen operational scalability.



Tool and system integrations

Connect websites and digital assets with forms, CRM systems, analytics, tracking tools, scheduling tools,
 platforms, automation software, internal workflow tools, and other core business systems.



Performance and optimisation

Improve website speed, technical performance, responsiveness, usability, and front-end quality across devices and browsers.



Troubleshooting and technical support

Identify and resolve bugs, integration issues, layout problems, platform conflicts, broken workflows, and performance issues in a reliable and timely way.



SEO and technical readiness

Support strong technical setup across metadata, structure, indexing readiness, page performance, and clean implementation practices.



Build workflow improvement

Use modern tools, systems, templates, AI support, and automation processes to improve how websites and digital assets are planned, built, handed over, and maintained.



Cross-functional collaboration

Work closely with strategy, design, content, paid media, and operations teams to ensure builds align with broader brand and commercial goals.



What We’re Looking For

Proven experience building and maintaining websites across a range of platforms, not just one CMS

Strong capability in web development, landing page builds, technical implementation, and front-end execution

Strong experience with AI tools, automation systems, workflow software, and digital integrations

Ability to work across tools such as Shopify, Webflow, WordPress, Relume, page builders, and other modern website platforms

Experience connecting websites with CRM systems, forms, analytics, tracking, scheduling tools, and automation platforms

Strong understanding of responsive design, user experience, technical performance, and front-end quality

Strong problem-solving ability and attention to detail

Ability to build systems that are not only visually polished, but also commercially useful and operationally efficient

Strong communication skills and the ability to work well with cross-functional teams

A reliable, structured, quality-focused approach to delivery

Preferred

Experience with Zapier, Make, n8n, or similar automation platforms

Experience using AI tools to support development, QA, content workflows, reporting, process improvement, or internal efficiency

Experience with Shopify theme edits, Webflow builds, custom WordPress work, Relume workflows, and landing page builders

Experience with conversion-focused development and high-performing landing page structures

Familiarity with technical SEO, tracking setup, and analytics implementation

Experience supporting service-based, eCommerce, or founder-led brands

What Success Looks Like in This Role

Websites and landing pages are polished, responsive, technically strong, and commercially aligned

Automations reduce manual work and improve internal efficiency

Systems are better connected across web, CRM, forms, reporting, and delivery workflows

Technical issues are solved quickly and thoroughly

The team can rely on you to build and maintain high-quality digital infrastructure

Your work contributes to stronger trust, better conversion, smoother delivery, and more scalable operations

Why Join Wandering Lion



You will be joining a business built around calm authority, commercial clarity, and human confidence. We are not trying to become a high-volume agency. We are building a quality-protected growth studio that integrates brand, performance, systems, and delivery under one roof.



That means:



You will work on thoughtful, strategy-led projects

You will build digital systems that support real commercial outcomes

You will have room to improve both execution quality and operational efficiency

You will be part of a team that values honesty, clarity, accountability, and high standards

How to Apply



Please send:



your CV / resume

your portfolio

examples of websites, landing pages, systems, or automations you have built or improved

a short introduction about yourself

details of the platforms, AI tools, automation tools, and workflow systems you use



Tell us why you are a strong fit for the role and include examples of how your work has improved website performance, automation, efficiency, or commercial outcomes.



Before We Proceed



Before we potentially proceed to the interview stage, we’d like to gather a few details to make sure the role is a good fit and that you’ll be set up for success working remotely with our team.



1) PC / Laptop specifications + internet speed

Please share your device specs, including CPU, RAM, and storage, along with a recent internet speed test result. We need reliable performance and strong internet to support day-to-day work.



2) Current employment or side work (transparency request)

Are you currently employed or doing any side jobs or freelance work? We’re open to offshore tea
mbers having multiple jobs — what matters most to us is transparency, so we understand your typical schedule and can support you properly.



3) Hubstaff tracker

Are you comfortable using Hubstaff time tracking? Our whole team operates remotely, including our field and admin staff in Australia. Hubstaff helps us understand time allocation across projects, improve internal reporting, and provide clearer updates to clients.



4) Working hours / availability

Can you commit to the required hours? Our standard workdays are Monday to Friday, generally within 9:00am–5:00pm (Philippines time). We offer reasonable flexibility — family and life come first — but we do need consistency and clear communication.



5) Expected salary (PHP)

If this differs from what was listed in the advert, please confirm your expected salary in PHP.



6) CV / Resume

Please attach your CV if you haven’t already.



7) Relevant training / courses

Please include any relevant training certificates or courses you’ve completed.



8) English level

Please confirm your English level (C2) and your confidence in both written and spoken English.



Team Context



For context, we currently have a team of 10 people in the Philippines, all working from home, and we’re continuing to grow. We value honesty, transparency, and teamwork. We’re looking for people who are humble, reliable, and easy to work with — because every role matters, and the most important thing is a happy team doing work they enjoy, surrounded by like-minded people.



Thanks, and we look forward to your reply.

title: Senior Residential Appraisal Report Writer
description:
I run a residential appraisal firm located in the Bay Area, California, and am looking for an experienced residential appraisal writer to join the team. The team includes 3 Bay Area appraisers and 8 employees in the Philippines. We are rapidly growing and are looking for an experienced and senior level residential report writer to join our team.



Your role will be to do the following:

1. Complete the entire residential appraisal report after the appraiser has provided you with the inspection information and comparables. This includes all the commentary, adjustments, and all other parts of the report. We will provide training on how we specifically expect the commentary and adjustments based on our own personal preferences, however you are expected to already have this type of experience working for other appraisers.

2. Review the work of other report writers on our team, provide feedback, and help train newer report writers on our team. You are expected to act as the "last line of defense" of the report before it is sent to the appraiser for their final review before submission. As such, we expect you to be able to review the report, find any issues, correct these issues, and then send to the appraiser a near perfect report.



To be considered for this role, you must meet the following criteria:

1. You have worked for a US residential appraiser

2. You have experience performing data entry for residential properties in the US

3. You have experience creating the 1004MC, selecting comparables, drawing the sketch, labeling photos, making adjustments to the sales grid, and making commentary for the addendum.

4. Ideally, you have experience managing other appraisal report writers.



If you don't have experience in writing commentary or the addendum, or do not have experience with making adjustments on the sales grid, we would still like to hear from you as we have a different job that would fit your experience better.



We are flexible with your work hours and offer Philippine daytime shift hours for your convenience. We would like to start part time but then transition to full time, so ideally you are open to working full time exclusively with us if its a mutual fit.



To be considered for this position, you must do the following in your application message (failure to do all of the following will result in your application being ignored):

1. How many years have you worked for a US residential appraiser? What tasks did you perform for them?

2. How many hours does it take you to complete one report? What parts of the report do you complete?

3. Do you have experience writing commentary for the addendum, drawing the sketch, labeling photos, and creating the 1004MC? Please indicate which ones you have experience with, and how many years for each.

4. Please provide a sample of at least one appraisal report you have fully completed. You can redact any private information from the report. Please let me know what parts exactly you completed on this report(s).

5. Provide a publicly accessible link to your resume.

6. Are you open to starting part time and then transitioning to full time? Once working full time with us, will you be working exclusively with us without any other jobs? When is the earliest you can begin working with us?

7. What are your preferred working hours?

8. Do you have experience managing other residential appraisal report writers? If so, please discuss in detail your job responsibilities.



Thank you, and I look forward to the opportunity to work together.

title: Full-Time Customer Service Manager (Remote) $1300 per month
description:

We are looking for a high-performance Customer Service Manager who takes full ownership of our entire customer service operation — from team management to systems, automation, and AI.



This is a hands-on operator role with full responsibility.

We are now actively restructuring and upgrading our customer service operation, which is why this role exists.

* Experience working with fulfillment centers

* Experience handling customer service in local languages

* Highly structured, proactive, and results-driven



---



What We Offer



* Full-time (remote)

---

title: Marketplace Content & Creative Strategist
description:
We are seeking a versatile, detail-oriented Marketplace Content & Creative Strategist to lead the development and optimization of product listings across Amazon and other e-commerce marketplaces. This role brings together keyword research, AI-assisted content writing, graphic design, and project management to produce high-performing listing assets and brand experiences.



This is an ideal role for someone who thrives at the intersection of SEO, creative development, and cross-functional coordination, and who enjoys using modern AI tools to work efficiently and creatively.



==KEY RESPONSIBILITIES==

SEO & CONTENT DEVELOPMENT

Conduct advanced keyword and market research using tools such as Helium 10, Data Dive, or similar platforms.



Write and refine product listing content (titles, bullets, descriptions) using a combination of research, brand guidelines, and AI tools (e.g., ChatGPT, Jasper).



Develop structured prompts, briefs, and templates to support high-quality AI-generated content at scale.



Ensure content accuracy, brand consistency, and marketplace compliance across all listings.



GRAPHIC DESIGN & CREATIVE PRODUCTION

Create, refine, and optimize graphics for Amazon and marketplace listings, including lifestyle graphics, feature callouts, infographics, and A+ content modules.



Use a suite of AI-enhanced design tools including:

ChatGPT Premium for creative ideation, prompt writing, visual concepting

Freepik Premium for assets, templates, and illustration resources

Adobe Photoshop Generative Fill for product cleanup, scene enhancements, and creative editing

Canva AI Upscaler for resolution improvements and design composition

Google AI Studio for advanced generative image and asset creation

Nano Banana AI for enhanced mockups, image variations, and visual refinements



Translate keyword and SEO insights into effective visual storytelling and conversion-oriented design.



Collaborate with internal teams to iterate on creative assets and ensure compliance with marketplace image standards.



Maintain high production quality across all visual assets.



PROJECT MANAGEMENT & CROSS-FUNCTIONAL WORKFLOW

Manage end-to-end listing optimization projects, from kickoff through final delivery.



Coordinate with SEO, design, account management, and brand teams to keep projects on schedule.



Use project management tools and Google Workspace and Asana to organize workflows, gather inputs, and track deliverables.



Oversee quality assurance for both content and design before listings go live.



==REQUIRED EXPERIENCE & SKILLS==

3+ years of experience in e-commerce content strategy, listing optimization, creative production, or project management.

Strong SEO research skills with Amazon-focused tools (e.g., Helium 10, Data Dive).

Proven ability to manage multiple content and creative projects simultaneously.

Experience with generative AI platforms and developing effective prompts.

Demonstrated graphic design abilities using Photoshop, Canva, or equivalent tools.

Excellent organization, communication, and self-editing skills.

Comfortable with Google Workspace tools and project management systems.



==NICE TO HAVE==

Experience working with multiple brands or in an agency environment.

Familiarity with Amazon’s image, copy, and compliance guidelines.

Ability to review performance metrics (CTR, conversion rate, rank) to inform content and creative decisions.

Understanding of UX/UI-driven marketplace design principles.



==WHY JOIN US==

A collaborative, innovative, and fast-paced environment focused on leveraging AI to maximize performance.

Opportunities to work across a wide range of brands and product categories.

Creative freedom to explore new tools, design approaches, and SEO strategies.

Room for growth within a rapidly expanding organization.

title: Google Ads Specialist
description:
Now Hiring: Experienced Google Ads Specialist

Work-from-Home | U.S.-Based Google Advertising Agency 



We’re a digital marketing agency helping home service businesses (remodelers, roofers, painters, flooring etc.) across the U.S. drive leads and phone calls through highly effective Google Ads campaigns. We’re looking for an experienced Google Ads Specialist from the Philippines to join our team on a full-time basis.



What You’ll Do:  

- Set up Google Ads campaigns from scratch, including structuring ad groups, writing compelling ad copy, and selecting relevant keywords  

- Implement call tracking and Google tracking to measure conversions and optimize campaigns  

- Optimize existing campaigns by analyzing performance data and making adjustments to improve ROI  

- Write high-converting ad copy tailored to contractor clients  

- Create and optimize landing pages for better ad conversion  

- Handle up to 20 Google Ads accounts simultaneously, ensuring each is optimized for performance  

- Monitor, test, and refine campaigns for maximum effectiveness  

- Provide detailed performance reports and recommendations to clients  

- Collaborate with the U.S.-based team to update campaign strategies and ensure client satisfaction



What You Need:  

- 5+ years of experience managing Google Ads campaigns, preferably for home services businesses

- Proficiency in Google Ads setup, campaign management, and optimization  

- Strong understanding of keyword research, ad copywriting, call tracking, Google Analytics, and landing page optimization  

- Experience with landing page creation and conversion optimization  

- Ability to handle 20 accounts at once with attention to detail  

- Excellent English communication skills (both written and spoken)  

- Ability to work independently, stay organized, and manage multiple accounts



Tech Requirements:  

- Reliable internet (10 Mbps minimum)  

- Noise-canceling headset  

- Webcam for Zoo
etings  

- Familiarity with Google Ads, Google Analytics, Google Tag Manager, Google Sheets, landing page builders, and other relevant tools



Compensation & Schedule:  

- $1,000/month base pay, plus quarterly performance bonuses 

- Full time: Up to 40 hours per week only  

- Flexibility with hours, but availability during U.S. business hours (CST preferred) is required



How to Apply:  

Please send the following to 
  

1. Your updated resume  

2. A 60 second Loom video introducing yourself, detailing your experience with Google Ads and landing pages, and explaining why you’re a great fit for the role  

3. Any relevant Google Ads campaign results, ad copy, landing pages or case studies you’ve worked on. 





Apply Today, We  Hire Fast!

title: Shopify + Google Merchant Center Specialist (Technical Audit / GMC Fix / Compliance / Feed & Website Review)
description:
We are looking for a serious, detail-focused, technically strong specialist who has real experience with Shopify and Google Merchant Center, especially with:



* GMC misrepresentation / suspension / website needs improvement issues

* Shopify store reviews for policy, trust, compliance, and technical consistency

* Feed errors, product disapprovals, attribute issues, sync issues

* checking and fixing issues between Shopify, feed apps, landing pages, and Merchant Center

* going through detailed GMC checklists and actually improving the store properly



This is not a simple VA role and not just a product upload role.



We need someone who can think deeply, work carefully, and get real quality out of their hours.



Our store is already live and we are actively trying to get the cleanest possible Google Merchant Center setup and approval path. We need someone who can help us review, fix, and improve everything properly so the store is as safe, compliant, and stable as possible for Google.



What you will work on

Your role will include work such as:



* reviewing our Shopify store for GMC-related risk points

* checking our Google Merchant Center thoroughly

* reviewing a detailed GMC checklist point by point

* identifying anything that is:



  * incomplete

  * inconsistent

  * risky

  * misleading

  * weak for Google trust/compliance

* fixing issues in:



  * product data

  * attributes

  * feed setup

  * sync issues

  * policy pages

  * trust signals

  * business information consistency

  * landing page consistency

  * Shopify settings / theme output where relevant

* reviewing how products, attributes, and website pages align between:



  * Shopify

  * feed app(s)

  * Google Merchant Center

* helping us make the store as GMC-safe and approval-ready as possible



Important

We are not looking for someone who only writes reports, gives generic advice, or repeats policy help pages.



We want someone who can:



* review deeply

* find real issues

* explain clearly

* implement fixes

* work with urgency and quality



If you are someone who only checks things superficially, this is not the right role.



What we are specifically looking for

You should ideally have strong experience with:



Shopify



* product setup

* collections

* navigation

* policy pages

* theme settings

* product pages

* app interactions

* store trust / UX review

* fixing inconsistencies



Google Merchant Center



* product disapprovals

* feed errors

* missing attributes

* policy-related restrictions

* website quality issues

* misrepresentation-related reviews

* diagnostics and issue checking

* preparing a store/feed for approval



Feed / product data / sync



* attribute mapping

* apparel requirements

* availability / inventory sync

* pricing consistency

* feed-to-landing-page consistency

* issues caused by product pushes / imports / updates



GMC checklist / compliance mindset

You must be comfortable going through a detailed checklist and checking everything carefully and one by one, not loosely.



The type of person we want

We are looking for someone who is:



* highly detail-oriented

* careful and precise

* honest and direct

* technically capable

* proactive

* strong in communication

* responsive

* able to work independently

* able to explain what is wrong, what was fixed, and what still needs work



We value quality per hour very highly.

That means we care much more about real useful output than empty activity.



Daily work expectations

We want someone who can work seriously and with focus.



You must be willing to:



* track hours clearly

* send clean updates

* communicate blockers quickly

* stay structured

* move with urgency when needed



What to include in your application

Please do not send a generic application.



When you apply, include:



1. your experience with Shopify

2. your experience with Google Merchant Center

3. whether you have worked on:



   * misrepresentation issues

   * website needs improvement issues

   * suspensions

   * product disapprovals

4. examples of what types of GMC / Shopify issues you have personally fixed

5. whether you are comfortable reviewing a full GMC checklist point by point

6. whether you can also implement fixes, not only audit/report

7. your hourly rate

8. your availability per day / week

9. how fast you can start



Important screening question

Please answer this clearly in your application:



If a Shopify store was previously approved in Google Merchant Center, but after adding more products it started getting misrepresentation / approval problems, what are the first areas you would investigate and why?



We ask this because we want to see how you think.



Final note

We are looking for someone who can become genuinely valuable to the team, but right now the first priority is simple:



help us review and improve the store and GMC setup properly, thoroughly, and with real quality.



If that sounds like you, apply with a serious and specific response.

title: Project Manager
description:
Operations Manager / Execution Lead (Real Estate Platform)

We’re a fast-growing, modern real estate platform looking for someone who can run execution and make sure things actually get done.

This role is simple to understand but hard to do well:

???? I tell you what needs to get done

???? You organize it, assign it, and follow up

???? You stay on people until it’s finished

???? You report back when it’s done

That’s the job.

What matters most

We need someone who:

Writes everything down and stays organized

Turns ideas into clear task lists

Follows up relentlessly (you’re not afraid to bug people)

Holds the team accountable without killing morale

Makes sure nothing falls through the cracks

If you’re passive, avoid confrontation, or “hope people get things done”… this is not for you.

What you’ll do

Take direction from leadership and break it into tasks

Assign tasks to team members

Follow up daily until completion

Keep track of what’s done / not done

Report back clearly and consistently

Help with simple marketing tasks:

Posting in
 groups

Engaging in Reddit communities

Who you are

Organized and detail-oriented

Persistent (you don’t let things slide)

Good with people but not soft on accountability

Hands-on and responsive

A real team player

About us

We run a strong, loyal team and a fun culture — but we take execution seriously.

We take care of our people, and we expect the same energy back.

If you’re the type of person who gets things done no matter what, you’ll do very well here.

How We Work

Important Notes

· Candidates may be asked to complete a short task test (2-4 hours) to demonstrate drafting ability, understanding of         permitting and building/zoning codes,  and attention to detail.

title: Media Buyer (Facebook/Meta, YouTube/Google Ads)
description:
We are Singapore’s fastest growing performance real estate business seeking



Media Buyer (Direct Response | Performance-Focused)

Part-Time | Remote



About Singapore Real Estate Insider



We are a Singapore-based property agent agency working with 1st time homeowner, HDB owners, Private property owners, Landed owners and investors across Singapore. We specialise in property related services — consulting, advisory, selling, buying, renting, investment, portfolio management and legacy planning — where real money is spent daily and performance matters.



We’re also part of a broader group that operates:

Millionaire Agent (our education & mentoring brand for fellow agents)

Family Legacy Launch (our education & mentoring brand for home owners)



All brands are owned and operated by the same team. This role sits fully within the Singapore Real Estate Insider performance team.





Why This Role Is Different



This is not a branding or “boost post” role.



You’ll be working on:

- Real conversion campaigns

- Meaningful daily ad spend

- Funnels where decisions have real impact



You’ll follow proven SOPs — and you’ll also be trusted to make judgment calls when performance requires it.



If you want to grow fast by working close to real data, real money, and real decisions, this role will stretch you in the right way.





What You’ll Do



- Run and optimise conversion-focused paid ad campaigns (Meta primarily & YouTube next)

- Monitor campaign performance and flag issues early

- Own campaign health, not just execution

- Follow SOPs by default and make informed adjustments when needed

- Escalate performance issues and opportunities with regular updates and reporting

- Participate in scheduled weekend monitoring for selected high-spend campaigns

- Join structured ad setup / implementation sessions to keep up with latest execuation direction



You’ll mainly receive all priorities and inputs from a single Ops Manager — no creative or stakeholder chaos.





What You Will NOT Be Responsible For 

- Writing ad copy or designing creatives 

- Redesigning funnels, offers, or pricing

- Handling client communication or account management

- Juggling multiple stakeholders or unclear priorities



Your focus is campaign performance and health, with clear boundaries and structure.





Who This Role Is For

This role is a good fit if you:

- Have hands-on experience running conversion ads (leads or sales)

- Are comfortable in performance-driven environments

- Stay calm, analytical, and accountable when things move fast

- Respect structure but don’t freeze when conditions change

- Communicate clearly and take ownership seriously



Who This Role Is NOT For

- “Set-and-forget” ad managers

- Freelancers juggling multiple clients

- People looking for a low-pressure, purely 9–5 role

- Anyone uncomfortable with responsibility tied to real spend





Compensation & Growth



At Singapore Real Estate Insider, compensation is more than a monthly paycheck.



You’ll be operating in an ecosystem where:

- 6-figures are spent on paid ads monthly

- Multiple six figures are invested yearly into business, operations, education, health, and performance

- Decisions are made using real data, real risk, and real outcomes



What This Means for You

- Exposure to high-spend, direct-response campaigns

- Learn world-class media buying and direct response practices

- Grow beyond ads — into business thinking, systems, and personal performance

- Performance bonuses for strong execution and decision-making

- Opportunities to join yearly team retreats and overseas events held a few times a year



If you’re looking for comfort, this isn’t it.



If you’re looking to level up fast and grow properly, you’ll thrive here.



The questions are designed to understand how you think, not just what tools you’ve used.

Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.



Final Note

We’re not looking for button-pushers.

We’re looking for media buyers who:

Respect structure

Protect campaign performance

Take ownership seriously

If that sounds like you, we’d love to hear from you.



How to Apply

Please complete the application form carefully.



Apply here:

title: Marketing & Operations Virtual Assistant (Chiropractic / Wellness)
description:
About the Practice

Sacred Flow Chiropractic & Wellness is a nervous-system-focused chiropractic and wellness practice in Washington, USA. We help individuals and families regulate, heal, and feel more at home in their bodies.



I’m looking for a long-term Filipino VA who can support both marketing and operations: keeping patients on track, systems organized, and our message consistently reaching the right people.



This role is for someone who is proactive, organized, communicative, and comfortable working independently.



Main Responsibilities

Patient support & scheduling

Help keep patients scheduled out 1–2 months when possible

Follow up with past patients and leads in a kind, professional way

Assist with intake forms and keeping payment methods up to date

Coordinate with billing employee so accounts stay current

Marketing & content

Create and schedule 5 social media posts per week (graphics + captions)

Design simple, clean graphics in Canva (and Perplexity, Claude, etc)

Support reels/short-form video (ideas, basic edits, posting)

Use AI tools (e.g., Perplexity) to write and refine copy in the Sacred Flow voice

Gradually help with funnels, newsletters, and basic ads (training/oversight at first)

Leads, outreach, and events

Follow up with warm and cold leads at least twice

Keep lead lists organized and updated

Research local businesses/partners for workshops and community events

Help with logistics for workshops, dinners, and patient events

Operations & organization

Help organize patient data in an EHR (Jane experience is a plus, but any EHR helps)

Keep basic weekly bookkeeping tasks organized for easier taxes

Coordinate print jobs (e.g., sending files to FedEx for pickup)

Complete assigned tasks within about 24-72 hours unless we agree otherwise



Required Skills & Tools

Canva (comfortable creating professional-looking graphics)

Google Workspace (Docs, Sheets, Drive, Gmail)

Social media content creation (posts; some experience with reels/short-form video)

Comfortable using AI tools for writing/editing (ChatGPT or similar)

Clear written and spoken English

Strong organization and follow-through



Nice to have (not required but a plus):

GoHighLevel or similar CRM/funnel platform

Experience with any EHR (Jane or similar)

Experience in wellness, healthcare, or holistic brands

Podcast or content repurposing

Outreach, partnership, or nonprofit/community work



Hours, Pay, and Growth

15–20 hours per week to start

Mostly flexible, as long as tasks are completed within agreed timelines

$5–6/hour (USD), with room for increases based on performance and responsibility

Potential to move toward full-time as the practice and systems grow



How to Apply (Please Read Carefully)

To be considered, please follow these steps. Applications that skip steps will not be reviewed (this is how I filter for attention to detail).



Subject line / first line:

Start your message with the word: FLOW



Portfolio:

Share 3–6 examples of your work (social media posts, reels, graphics, simple funnels, or
s). Links or a short PDF are fine. For each, write 1–2 lines about what you did.



Short written answers (you can keep each answer to a short paragraph):



a) If you started this role this week, what would you focus on in your first two weeks to support both patient retention and new patient growth?

b) If you received a list of 20 past patients who haven’t been in for 3+ months, what would your follow-up process look like (tone, frequency, and tools you’d use)?

c) What tools from this list have you used: Canva, AI, Google Workspace, GoHighLevel (or similar), any EHR (Jane or similar)? Briefly describe your experience level with each.



I’m looking for someone who values clear communication, takes pride in their work, and is excited to grow with a practice that’s growing with intention. If that feels like you, I’d love to see your application.

title: YouTube Video Editor (Educational + Cinematic Hybrid / Chalkboard Teaching Style)
description:
Hi,



I’m looking for a video editor for a ~15-minute educational YouTube video.



This is a Pokémon biology analysis where the goal is to explain how a Pokémon could realistically function using real-world biology.



???? Direction



This is an education-first video with cinematic and AI-supported visuals.



The structure is:

???? clear teaching + strong visual support



This is NOT just a cinematic montage — but cinematic elements are an important part of the final product.



???? Core Style



This should feel like:

???? a teacher explaining concepts clearly

+

???? high-quality visuals reinforcing those ideas



????????? Chalkboard Teaching (MOST IMPORTANT)



• Text appears cleanly (NOT handwritten animation)

• Builds step-by-step as concepts are explained

• Use bullet points and short phrases (NOT full sentences)

• Highlight key terms

• Keep everything structured and easy to read



???? This is the foundation of the video



???? Cinematic + AI Visuals



• Cinematic editing and AI visuals are encouraged

• These should enhance the explanation



BUT:



• They must SUPPORT the teaching

• They should NOT replace the teaching



???? Diagrams



• Must directly match what is being explained

• Use simple arrows, labels, cause ? effect

• Keep clean and easy to follow



????????? Professor Dex



• Appears to explain key ideas, then fades out

• Not always on screen

• Used intentionally like a teacher



???? Reference image:





???? Chalkboard Background



• Use this exact chalkboard style

• Keep it consistent across the video

• Do NOT redesign or replace it



???? Chalkboard asset:





???? Hiring Process



To apply:



???? Review the following materials:



Audio (sample):





Short script:





Then:



• Submit a 45–60 second sample edit

OR

• Indicate you are willing to complete a short test



Applications without a sample or willingness to test may not be considered.



???? Goal



I am looking for a long-term editor for this style of content.



???? When applying, include:



• Your sample (if available)

• Your rate for a 15-minute video

• Estimated turnaround time



Thanks,

David

title: YouTube Content Operations Assistant

stock footage, and voiceover software. The channel owner provides topic direction, initial script and final

approval — you handle voiceover, video production, optimization, scheduling, and

distribution.



What You'll Do

Research & Planning

Validate keyword opportunities and compile a weekly content ideas report

Track competitor channels and note high-performing video topics



Script Writing

Write engaging, well-researched scripts based on approved topics (800–1,500 words per

main video)

Scripts must be educational, accurate, and match the Africa Builds brand voice —

empowering, respectful, and insightful

Video Production (Faceless — Cinematic 3D AI Style)

and authoritative

visuals

finishing.

Write YouTube descriptions following our template (hook, summary, timestamps, links,

hashtags)

title: Growth & Sales Specialist — Financial Intelligence Platform (Commission-Heavy)
description:
I run The Capitol Dossier — a financial intelligence platform that tracks smart money movements (congressional trades, insider filings, hedge fund positions, lobbying, federal contracts). It's a $97/month subscription product with a $1,497/year premium tier. The product is live and functional. I need someone who can generate paying subscribers.

This is NOT a VA role. This is NOT content creation. This is NOT customer support. This is a sales and partnership development role.



YOUR JOB:



Identify and reach out to paid trading community owners on Whop and 
 to set up revenue-share integrations where our intelligence feed plugs into their existing community. Whop handles the payment splitting automatically.

Identify and pitch finance newsletter operators (on Beehiiv, Substack, Ghost) to insert our intelligence content into their existing paid newsletters as a premium section or cross-recommendation.

List our product on affiliate networks (JVZoo, WarriorPlus, Stakecut, ClickBank) and manage incoming affiliate relationships.

Recruit micro-influencers on X 
) and StockTwits in the finance/trading space to promote as affiliates with recurring commission.

Run outreach campaigns via
 to trading community owners pitching partnership deals.

Track all outreach, conversions, and partner relationships in a shared spreadsheet.



YOU ARE A GOOD FIT IF:



You have experience selling digital subscriptions, SaaS products, info products, or online courses

You understand affiliate marketing, revenue sharing, and partnership structures

You've used platforms like Whop, Gumroad, ClickBank, JVZoo, or similar

You can write professional outreach messages in fluent English

You are comfortable being judged on results, not hours worked

You've generated paying customers for someone else's product before



SHOW ME IN YOUR APPLICATION:



Specific examples of products you've sold or partnerships you've closed

How many customers/subscribers/sales you generated and over what timeframe

What channels you used 
 outreach, social media, affiliate networks, community partnerships)

Why you think you can sell a $97/month financial intelligence product



Do NOT apply if you are a general VA looking for task work. I need someone who knows how to generate revenue.



COMPENSATION:



$500/month base salary + 20% recurring commission on every subscriber you bring in. Commission is tracked via unique referral links and paid monthly.



Example math: If you bring in 50 subscribers in your first month, that's $970/month in recurring commission + $500 base = $1,470/month. Those subscribers keep paying, so your commission grows every month even if you do nothing new.



30-day trial period. If you haven't generated at least 5 paying subscribers in 30 days, we part ways. If you're producing, this becomes a long-term role with uncapped earning potential.



WAGE/SALARY:



$500/month + commission

DESIRED NO. OF HOURS PER WEEK: 20

BUSINESS OR CONTACT NAME: The Capitol Dossier

title: Amazon Account Specialist - Remote, Dayshift, Fulltime
description:
IMPORTANT: We only review applications here: 



About RocketAMS



RocketAMS is a thriving, fully remote Amazon eCommerce agency based in Australia, founded by ex-Amazon Australia employees with over $100 million in collective sales experience. We're a startup on the rise, aiming to redefine success on Amazon for our clients. Join a dynamic team that values expertise, collaboration, and growth.



About the Role



We are seeking a detail-oriented and proactive Amazon Account Specialist to join our team in a fully remote, dayshift role. This position is ideal for someone with a strong understanding of Amazon account strategy and performance, who can confidently manage multiple accounts while ensuring excellence in listing and catalog troubleshooting, deal and promotion execution, platform knowledge, process and SOP development, and documentation and reporting.



The ideal candidate will drive client success through strategic execution, attention to detail, and effective collaboration.



What You'll Do



- Plan and execute promotional calendars, including Black Friday, Prime Day, and other major sales events.

- Optimize product listings for visibility and conversion, ensuring high Item Data Quality (IDQ).

- Maintain and update product catalogs while supporting inventory management and catalog optimization tasks.

- Develop 12-month sales and inventory forecasts to support client growth strategies.

- Build and maintain advanced Google Sheets templates and dashboards for client reporting.

- Analyze key metrics such as revenue, units sold, CVR, ROAS, ASP, and CPA.

- Perform budgeting, forecasting, and variance analysis (Budget vs. Actuals).

- Automate recurring tasks using Google Sheets scripts or advanced formulas (e.g., VLOOKUP, INDEX MATCH, SUMIFS, FILTER, Pivot Tables).

- Deliver weekly, monthly, and quarterly reports with actionable insights to drive performance.



What You'll Bring



- Advanced proficiency in Google Sheets/Excel for analysis and reporting.

- Strong ability to interpret data and generate actionable insights.

- Experience with budgeting, forecasting, financial modeling, and variance reporting.

- Familiarity with Seller Central or Vendor Central is a plus (training provided).

- Highly organized, proactive, and capable of managing deadlines independently.



What We Offer



What We Offer



- $800 AUD during the first month (internship period).

- $1000 to $1200 AUD per month after onboarding, based on experience.

- Fully remote role with significant growth potential.



Comprehensive Training and Mentorship

- Receive hands-on training from our expert Amazon specialists and direct guidance from our founders.

- Learn advanced Amazon strategies and operational best practices to set you up for success.

- Exciting Career Growth



Join a fully remote team with substantial growth potential as RocketAMS continues to expand.

Work in Australian time (10 AM Sydney start) and collaborate closely with seasoned professionals to refine your skills and grow in your career.



How to Apply: To apply, please use the following link: 







We will only consider applications submitted through this link.



Submit your application now, this role is moving quickly!

title: Amazon Data Analyst - Day Shift, Remote, FT (PH)
description:
About RocketAMS

RocketAMS is a thriving, fully remote Amazon eCommerce agency based in Australia, founded by ex-Amazon Australia employees with over $100 million in collective sales experience. We're a startup on the rise, aiming to redefine success on Amazon for our clients. Join a dynamic team that values expertise, collaboration, and growth.



Role Overview

We are seeking a detail-oriented Amazon Data Analyst to support internal teams by delivering accurate, timely, and actionable insights from Amazon and eCommerce data. This is a behind-the-scenes, non-client-facing role, focused on data analysis, reporting, and automation to enable informed decision-making across the business.



Responsibilities:

Data Analysis:

Collect, process, and analyze Amazon sales data, advertising data, and relevant marketplace metrics.  

Build, maintain, and optimize dashboards and reports related to sales performance, inventory levels, and advertising efficiency.  

Identify trends, patterns, and anomalies in datasets to support internal planning and strategy.  Use SQL and/or Amazon Marketing Cloud (AMC) to query, analyze, and validate large datasets.  Automate recurring reports and data workflows using Google Sheets, advanced formulas, or BI tools. 



Internal Team Support:

Work closely with Brand Managers, Account Specialists, and PPC teams to support strategy and execution through data insights.  

Provide clear, structured analysis to help internal teams optimize listings, advertising performance, and operational planning.  

Ensure data accuracy, consistency, and reliability across internal reports and dashboards.



Requirements

2+ years of data analytics experience 

Hands-on experience with Amazon Marketing Cloud (AMC) or SQL 

Experience with Amazon, advertising, or eCommerce data

Strong analytical skills with advanced Google Sheets / Excel capability

Experience with reporting, forecasting, and performance analysis

High-detail-oriented, organized, and able to manage tasks independently



Benefits

Paid Time Off

Work From Home

Training & Development

Private Health Insurance After 12 Months

Day Shift - 7am to 4pm PH Time

title: Social media manager with the right feeling
description:
Finding the right social media manager is difficult.

Someone who will use all our knowledge and experience of our program and our target audience and combine them with their experience and talent.



Plenty of people respond to my ads, but it’s hard to find that one right person. That person with the right skills, the right insights, and the right feeling for what we do.



Social media is a complex discipline. You learn this by understanding the specific market and target audience, by working with results and numbers, and by analyzing what worked and what didn’t. To start all over again tomorrow, because the algorithms have changed.



A feeling for what we are doing is important. Also talent in authentic writing, talent to make visuals that stand out, a good feeling for the different platforms, the ability to see what to post, when and where, and to monitor the results of your posts. This is where a certain talent comes in.



We are looking for a social media manager who fits this description.

The position is for 15-20 hours a week, including some tasks on weekends.

You can work from home and mostly plan your own working hours.



About us:

Arcticterns.global is a non profit foundation that creates gatherings for traveling families to build community they often miss because of their lifestyle. We host month long programs in different countries, where families come together, connect, learn, and grow. Community is at the heart of everything we do.



Interested?

- Please send a cover letter in which you explain why you are interested and the skills that make you a strong fit for this role. Please make sure your authentic writing skills show in the cover letter and do not use AI.

- Please include samples of your work that touch the above description

- Please include your salary range for the 20 hour/week job

title: Social media manager
description:
Finding the right social media manager is difficult.

Someone who does things the same way I would do them, with all my knowledge and experience of our program and our target audience internalized… but better. Of course that someone does not exist (yet!).



Plenty of people respond to my ads, but it’s hard to find that one right person. That person with the right skills, the right insights, and the right feeling for what we do.



Social media is a complex discipline. You do not learn this from a course, some online tips, or from experience in a previous position. You learn this by understanding the specific market and target audience, by working with results and numbers, and by analyzing what worked and what didn’t. To start all over again tomorrow, because the algorithms have changed.



A feeling for what we are doing is important. Also talent in authentic writing, good visual awareness, the ability to see what to post, when and where, and to monitor the results of your posts. This is where a certain talent comes in.



We are looking for a social media manager who fits this description.

The position is for 20 hours a week, including some tasks on weekends.

You can work from home and mostly plan your own working hours.

Payment is 15000 PHP/month, based on 20 hours/week.



About us:

Arcticterns.global is a non profit foundation that creates gatherings for traveling families to build community they often miss because of their lifestyle. We host month long programs in different countries, where families come together, connect, learn, and grow. Community is at the heart of everything we do.



Interested?

- Please send a cover letter in which you explain why you are interested and the skills that make you a strong fit for this role. Please make sure your authentic writing skills show in the cover letter and do not use AI.

- Please complete the IQ test and the DISC test this platform offers.

title: SENIOR Part-time Social Media Video Editor
description:
We are a fast-growing beauty brand* creating viral TikTok content for international markets. We are looking for a fast and detail-oriented video editor who can execute efficiently.

*PREFER SOMEONE WHO FAMILIAR WITH BEAUTY PRODUCTS.

Study trending TikTok / Reels videos

title: Short-Form Video Editor for Instagram Reels (UGC / Skincare Content)
description:
I’m looking for a creative and reliable video editor to help grow my Instagram page in the skincare niche and assist with developing AI avatar content in the future.



The main focus right now is creating engaging Instagram reels. The AI avatar work will be a secondary project once the Instagram content workflow is established.



This role is best suited for someone who specializes in editing short-form social media content (Instagram Reels / TikTok style videos) and understands pacing, hooks, and viewer retention.



Important: Please only apply if you have experience editing Instagram Reels or TikTok style short form videos. Applications without relevant reel examples will not be considered.



Responsibilities



Instagram Reels Editing

• Edit short form Instagram reels using raw clips provided  

• Create strong hooks within the first 2–3 seconds  

• Use a clean, aesthetic editing style  

• Add minimal text captions to communicate the message  

• Maintain smooth pacing to keep viewers engaged  

• Deliver Instagram-ready videos with a fast turnaround  



Content Direction



• Help structure content that is suitable for UGC-style content, PR opportunities, and brand collaborations  

• Ensure content looks clean, professional, and brand-friendly  

• Maintain a consistent visual aesthetic for the page  



Social Media Support



• Assist with preparing and posting daily Instagram reels  

• Engage with other content creators and relevant accounts  

• Reach out to skincare brands for potential PR and collaboration opportunities  

• Help support the growth and visibility of the page  



Content Style



The content should feel:

• Light and interesting  

• Visually clean and aesthetic  

• Engaging and easy to watch  

• Not overly clinical or lecture-style  



AI Avatar Content (Future Project)



• Assist with creating AI avatar style content  

• Use tools such as HeyGen, Midjourney, Runway, or similar  

• Help produce AI generated videos that align with the brand style  



Required Tools



Applicants must already have access to their own editing tools and software.



Examples include:

• CapCut Pro  

• Adobe Premiere Pro  

• After Effects  

• Canva  

• AI tools such as Midjourney, Runway, HeyGen, etc.



Please do not apply if you do not already have access to the tools required to complete the work.



Trial Period



We will begin with a short trial period of up to 14 days to determine if we are a good fit for a long-term working relationship.



Trial payment will be provided once the agreed trial deliverables are completed.



Compensation



This role will begin at approximately $150–$200 per month for around 12 hours per week.



Compensation may increase over time as the workflow grows and responsibilities expand.



Requirements



• Experience editing short form content for Instagram or TikTok  

• Understanding of hooks and viewer retention  

• Ability to follow creative direction  

• Good communication and reliability  

• Ability to deliver edits with a quick turnaround  



Communication



We will communicate through
 for updates and feedback.



Application Instructions



To confirm you have read this job post carefully, please begin your application with the word “Glow”.



Also include the following in your application:



1. Links to 2–3 Instagram Reels or short-form videos you have personally edited  

2. The editing tools you currently use  

3. One strong hook idea for a skincare reel  

4. Briefly explain how you would structure a 15 second skincare reel to keep viewers watching until the end



Applicants who include links to Instagram Reels they have edited will be prioritized.



Looking forward to working with someone creative and reliable who can help grow this brand.

title: Full-Time Graphic Designer / Ad Creative Designer
description:
We're a US-based digital agency running paid media, CRO, and web development for US e-commerce and lead-gen clients. We're expanding our design team. You'll own ad creative for specific client accounts and collaborate with our other designer on shared projects.



This is a full-time, long-term role - not a project gig. You'll be creating ad creative for Meta and Google campaigns, designing landing pages, and producing marketing assets daily. Speed and quality both matter.



What you'll do:

- Design static ad creatives for Meta 
/Instagram) and Google Display - multiple variations per concept, fast turnaround

- Design and iterate landing pages focused on conversion (not just aesthetics)

- Create social media graphics,
 headers, and marketing collateral

- Work within brand guidelines while pushing creative boundaries for performance

- Prep and organize design files in Figma for handoff

- Collaborate with our media strategist and account managers via Slack and Loom



AI-Powered Creative Production:

AI tools are a core part of how we work - not optional. We use tools like Nano Banana Pro, Adobe Firefly, and others daily. Bring your favorite AI tools and we'll support them. We expect working knowledge of at least 2-3 AI creative tools. AI is an accelerator, not a substitute for strong design fundamentals.



What we're looking for:

- 3+ years of design experience with a strong portfolio showing real ad creative (not just mockups)

- Proven experience designing Meta/Facebook/Instagram ads that actually ran

- Comfortable designing landing pages with conversion in mind (clear CTAs, mobile-first)

- Strong Figma skills (our primary design tool)

- Ability to produce multiple ad variations per day from approved concepts

- Familiar with ad format specs (1080x1080, 1080x1920, responsive display, etc.)

- Good written English for Slack/Loom communication

- Available to work with overlap during US Central hours (minimum 4 hours daily)



Nice to have:

- Experience with Shopify or e-commerce clients

- Motion design / simple video editing

- HTML/CSS basics for landing page implementation

- Experience with A/B testing creative or CRO principles



What we offer:

- $800-$1,200 USD/month depending on experience (paid via Wise on the 1st)

- Year-end bonus equivalent to one month's pay

- 15 days PTO + your local holidays observed

- Full-time, long-term position - we're building a team, not a project

- Work directly with agency leadership

- AI-forward team - we'll pay for your AI tools



All work begins on a 2-week paid trial at full rate to assess fit for both sides.



TO APPLY:

1. Link to your portfolio showing real ad creative that ran on Meta or Google

2. What kinds of ads have you designed? For what industries? What formats?

3. What design tools and AI tools do you use daily?

4. Your timezone and daily availability for US Central overlap

5. Your preferred monthly rate in USD



BONUS: Record a 2-3 minute Loom walking through 2-3 ads you designed. Applicants who include a Loom get a response within 48 hours.

title: Video editor
description:
I am looking for a full time video editor. 



I have about 35,000 followers between YouTube, tiktok,
, and Instagram 



Badgerfishing is my screen name and handle. 



I make fishing content as well as talk about the politics behind fishing in Washington State. 



I am looking for a full time person to join my team that can edit video and is creative with content. 



Fast and reliable internet is a must.



Being able to understand English and what I am needing is a must. 



I am looking for someone who has a great attention to detail and can edit film, and video at a professional level. 



Must be proficient with at least one of: Final Cut Pro, Adobe Premiere Pro and/or DaVinci Resolve.



I am looking for someone who has a fast turnaround and is a great communicator as I will be making and posting content daily.

Send me your
